stem: A retail company has a generative AI (GenAI) product recommendation application that uses Amazon Bedrock. The application suggests products to customers based on browsing history and demographics. The company needs to implement fairness evaluation across multiple demographic groups to detect and measure bias in recommendations between two prompt approaches. The company wants to collect and monitor fairness metrics in real time. The company must receive an alert if the fairness metrics show a discrepancy of more than 15% between demographic groups. The company must receive weekly reports that compare the performance of the two prompt approaches. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST custom development effort?

options.A: Configure an Amazon CloudWatch dashboard to display default metrics from Amazon Bedrock API calls. Create custom metrics based on model outputs. Set up Amazon EventBridge rules to invoke AWS lambda functions that perform post-processing analysis on model responses and publish custom fairness metrics.
options.B: Create the two prompt variants in Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management. Use Amazon Bedrock Flows to deploy the prompt variants with defined traffic allocation. Configure Amazon Bedrock guardrails that have content filters to monitor demographic fairness. Set up Amazon CloudWatch alarms on the GuardrailContentSource dimension that use InvocationsIntervened metrics to detect recommendation discrepancy threshold violations.
options.C: Set up Amazon SageMaker Clarify to analyze model outputs. Publish fairness metrics to Amazon CloudWatch. Create CloudWatch composite alarms that combine SageMaker Clarify bias metrics with Amazon Bedrock latency metrics to provide a comprehensive fairness evaluation dashboard.
options.D: Create an Amazon Bedrock model evaluation job to compare fairness between the two prompt variants. Enable model invocation logging in Amazon CloudWatch. Set up CloudWatch alarms for InvocationsIntervened metrics with a dimension for each demographic group.

explain: 「比較兩 prompt 公平性/偏差 + 最少自訂開發」→ Bedrock model evaluation job(內建評估)+ 依 demographic group 維度設 CloudWatch alarm。SageMaker Clarify(C)是 SageMaker ML 模型工具且需較多整合;自建 Lambda 後處理(A)開發量大。
stem_zh: 一家零售公司有一個使用 Amazon Bedrock 的生成式 AI (GenAI) 產品推薦應用程式。該應用程式會根據瀏覽記錄與人口統計資料向客戶推薦產品。公司需要在多個人口統計群組之間實作公平性評估，以偵測並衡量兩種 prompt 方法之間在推薦上的偏差。公司希望即時收集並監控公平性 metrics。當公平性 metrics 在不同人口統計群組之間顯示出超過 15% 的差異時，公司必須收到警示。公司必須收到每週報告，比較兩種 prompt 方法的表現。哪一個解決方案能以最少的自訂開發工作量滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 設定一個 Amazon CloudWatch dashboard 來顯示來自 Amazon Bedrock API 呼叫的預設 metrics。根據模型輸出建立自訂 metrics。設定 Amazon EventBridge 規則來叫用 AWS Lambda functions，對模型回應執行後處理分析並發佈自訂的公平性 metrics。
options_zh.B: 在 Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management 中建立這兩個 prompt 變體。使用 Amazon Bedrock Flows 以已定義的流量分配來部署這些 prompt 變體。設定具有內容過濾器的 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 來監控人口統計公平性。在 GuardrailContentSource 維度上設定使用 InvocationsIntervened metrics 的 Amazon CloudWatch alarms，以偵測推薦差異門檻的違規情形。
options_zh.C: 設定 Amazon SageMaker Clarify 來分析模型輸出。將公平性 metrics 發佈到 Amazon CloudWatch。建立 CloudWatch 複合 alarms，將 SageMaker Clarify 偏差 metrics 與 Amazon Bedrock 延遲 metrics 結合，以提供全面的公平性評估 dashboard。
options_zh.D: 建立一個 Amazon Bedrock 模型評估工作，以比較兩個 prompt 變體之間的公平性。在 Amazon CloudWatch 中啟用模型叫用記錄。針對 InvocationsIntervened metrics 設定 CloudWatch alarms，並為每個人口統計群組設定一個維度。

stem: A finance company is developing an AI assistant to help clients plan investments and manage their portfolios. The company identifies several high-risk conversation patterns such as requests for specific stock recommendations or guaranteed returns. High-risk conversation patterns could lead to regulatory violations if the company cannot implement appropriate controls. The company must ensure that the AI assistant does not provide inappropriate financial advice, generate content about competitors, or make claims that are not factually grounded in the company's approved financial guidance. The company wants to use Amazon Bedrock Guardrails to implement a solution. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.A: Add the high-risk conversation patterns to a denied topics guardrail.
options.B: Configure a content filter guardrail to filter prompts that contain the high-risk conversation patterns.
options.C: Configure a content filter guardrail to filter prompts that contain competitor names.
options.D: Add the names of competitors as custom word filters. Set the input and output actions to block.
options.E: Set a low grounding score threshold.
options.F: Set a high grounding score threshold.

explain: 高風險主題→denied topics(A);競爭對手名稱(特定詞)→custom word filters 設 block(D);事實接地強→高 grounding 門檻(F,門檻越高越嚴格)。content filter 是有害類別,不適合「特定主題/競爭對手名稱」。
stem_zh: 一家金融公司正在開發一個 AI 助理，以協助客戶規劃投資並管理其投資組合。公司辨識出數種高風險的對話模式，例如要求提供特定股票推薦或保證報酬。如果公司無法實作適當的控管，這些高風險對話模式可能導致違反法規。公司必須確保 AI 助理不會提供不當的財務建議、不會產生關於競爭對手的內容，也不會做出無法以公司核可的財務指引為事實依據的聲稱。公司希望使用 Amazon Bedrock Guardrails 來實作解決方案。哪一組步驟能滿足這些需求？（選擇三項。）

options_zh.A: 將這些高風險對話模式加入到 denied topics guardrail 中。
options_zh.B: 設定 content filter guardrail，以過濾包含高風險對話模式的 prompts。
options_zh.C: 設定 content filter guardrail，以過濾包含競爭對手名稱的 prompts。
options_zh.D: 將競爭對手的名稱加入為自訂字詞過濾器。將輸入與輸出動作設定為封鎖。
options_zh.E: 設定較低的 grounding score 門檻。
options_zh.F: 設定較高的 grounding score 門檻。

stem: A company has deployed an AI assistant as a React application that uses AWS Amplify, an AWS AppSync GraphQL API, and Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases. The application uses the GraphQL API to call the Amazon Bedrock RetrieveAndGenerate API for knowledge base interactions. The company configures an AWS Lambda resolver to use the RequestResponse invocation type. Application users report frequent timeouts and slow response times. Users report these problems more frequently for complex questions that require longer processing. The company needs a solution to fix these performance issues and enhance the user experience. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Amplify AI Kit to implement streaming responses from the GraphQL API and to optimize client-side rendering.
options.B: Increase the timeout value of the Lambda resolver. Implement retry logic with exponential backoff.
options.C: Update the application to send an API request to an Amazon SQS queue. Update the AWS AppSync resolver to poll and process the queue.
options.D: Change the RetrieveAndGenerate API to the InvokeModelWithResponseStream API. Update the application to use an Amazon API Gateway WebSocket API to support the streaming response.

explain: 複雜問題逾時/慢→改串流:InvokeModelWithResponseStream + WebSocket API,降低感知延遲。加大逾時/重試(B)不解決根本;SQS 輪詢(C)非即時串流。
stem_zh: 一家公司部署了一個 AI 助理，作為使用 AWS Amplify、AWS AppSync GraphQL API 與 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases 的 React 應用程式。該應用程式使用 GraphQL API 來呼叫 Amazon Bedrock 的 RetrieveAndGenerate API，以進行 knowledge base 互動。公司設定了一個 AWS Lambda resolver，使用 RequestResponse 叫用類型。應用程式使用者回報頻繁的逾時與緩慢的回應時間。使用者回報這些問題在需要較長處理時間的複雜問題上更為頻繁。公司需要一個解決方案來修正這些效能問題並提升使用者體驗。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 AWS Amplify AI Kit 來實作來自 GraphQL API 的串流回應，並最佳化用戶端的渲染。
options_zh.B: 增加 Lambda resolver 的逾時值。實作具有指數退避（exponential backoff）的重試邏輯。
options_zh.C: 更新應用程式，將 API 請求傳送到 Amazon SQS 佇列。更新 AWS AppSync resolver 以輪詢並處理該佇列。
options_zh.D: 將 RetrieveAndGenerate API 改為 InvokeModelWithResponseStream API。更新應用程式以使用 Amazon API Gateway WebSocket API 來支援串流回應。

stem: An ecommerce company operates a global product recommendation system that needs to switch between multiple foundation models (FM) in Amazon Bedrock based on regulations, cost optimization, and performance requirements. The company must apply custom controls based on proprietary business logic, including dynamic cost thresholds, AWS Region-specific compliance rules, and real-time A/B testing across multiple FMs. The system must be able to switch between FMs without deploying new code. The system must route user requests based on complex rules including user tier, transaction value, regulatory zone, and real-time cost metrics that change hourly and require immediate propagation across thousands of concurrent requests. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy an AWS Lambda function that uses environment variables to store routing rules and Amazon Bedrock FM IDs. Use the Lambda console to update the environment variables when business requirements change. Configure an Amazon API Gateway REST API to read request parameters to make routing decisions.
options.B: Deploy Amazon API Gateway REST API request transformation templates to implement routing logic based on request attributes. Store Amazon Bedrock FM endpoints as REST API stage variables. Update the variables when the system switches between models.
options.C: Configure an AWS Lambda function to fetch routing configurations from the AWS AppConfig Agent for each user request. Run business logic in the Lambda function to select the appropriate FM for each request. Expose the FM through a single Amazon API Gateway REST API endpoint.
options.D: Use AWS Lambda authorizers for an Amazon API Gateway REST API to evaluate routing rules that are stored in AWS AppConfig. Return authorization contexts based on business logic. Route requests to model-specific Lambda functions for each Amazon Bedrock FM.

explain: 不重部署即時切換 + 複雜業務邏輯 + 即時傳播 → Lambda 讀 AWS AppConfig Agent 動態配置 + 在 Lambda 跑業務邏輯選 FM。環境變數/stage variables(A、B)需重設;Lambda authorizer(D)是認證用途,不適合複雜路由。
stem_zh: 一家電子商務公司營運一套全球產品推薦系統，需要根據法規、成本最佳化與效能需求，在 Amazon Bedrock 中的多個 foundation model (FM) 之間切換。公司必須根據專有的商業邏輯套用自訂控管，包括動態成本門檻、特定 AWS Region 的合規規則，以及跨多個 FM 的即時 A/B 測試。系統必須能夠在不部署新程式碼的情況下於各 FM 之間切換。系統必須根據複雜的規則來路由使用者請求，這些規則包括使用者層級、交易金額、法規區域，以及每小時變動且需要在數千個並行請求間立即傳播的即時成本 metrics。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 部署一個 AWS Lambda function，使用環境變數來儲存路由規則與 Amazon Bedrock FM ID。當商業需求變更時，使用 Lambda 主控台來更新環境變數。設定一個 Amazon API Gateway REST API 來讀取請求參數以做出路由決策。
options_zh.B: 部署 Amazon API Gateway REST API 請求轉換範本，以根據請求屬性實作路由邏輯。將 Amazon Bedrock FM endpoints 儲存為 REST API 的 stage variables。當系統在模型之間切換時更新這些變數。
options_zh.C: 設定一個 AWS Lambda function，針對每個使用者請求從 AWS AppConfig Agent 擷取路由設定。在 Lambda function 中執行商業邏輯，為每個請求選擇適當的 FM。透過單一 Amazon API Gateway REST API endpoint 公開該 FM。
options_zh.D: 為 Amazon API Gateway REST API 使用 AWS Lambda authorizers，以評估儲存在 AWS AppConfig 中的路由規則。根據商業邏輯回傳授權內容（authorization contexts）。將請求路由到對應每個 Amazon Bedrock FM 的特定模型 Lambda functions。

stem: A company is developing an internal generative AI (GenAI) assistant that uses Amazon Bedrock to summarize corporate documents for multiple business units. The GenAI assistant must generate responses in a consistent format that includes a document summary, classification of business risks, and terms that are flagged for review. The GenAI assistant must adapt the tone of responses for each user's business unit, such as legal, human resources, or finance. The GenAI assistant must block hate speech, inappropriate topics, and sensitive information such as personal health information. The company needs a solution to centrally manage prompt variants across business units and teams. The company wants to minimize ongoing orchestration efforts and maintenance for post-processing logic. The company also wants to have the ability to adjust content moderation criteria for the GenAI assistant over time. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST maintenance overhead?

options.A: Use Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management to configure reusable templates and business unit-specific prompt variants. Apply Amazon Bedrock guardrails that have category filters and sensitive term lists to block prohibited content.
options.B: Use Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management to define base templates. Enforce business unit-specific tone by using system prompt variables. Configure Amazon Bedrock guardrails to apply audience-based threshold tuning. Manage the guardrails by using an internal administration API.
options.C: Use Amazon Bedrock with business unit-based instruction injection in API calls. Store response formatting rules in Amazon DynamoDB. Use AWS Step functions to validate responses. Use Amazon Comprehend to apply content filters after the GenAI assistant generates responses.
options.D: Use Amazon Bedrock with custom prompt templates that are stored in Amazon DynamoDB. Create one AWS Lambda function to select business unit-specific prompts. Create a second Lambda function to call Amazon Comprehend to filter prohibited content from responses.

explain: 集中管理 prompt 變體 + 最少維護 → Bedrock Prompt Management(可重用模板/變體)+ Guardrails(類別過濾 + 敏感詞清單)。自建 DynamoDB+Lambda+Comprehend 後處理(C、D)維護負擔高。
stem_zh: 一家公司正在開發一個內部生成式 AI (GenAI) 助理，使用 Amazon Bedrock 為多個業務單位摘要公司文件。該 GenAI 助理必須以一致的格式產生回應，包括文件摘要、業務風險分類，以及標記供審查的條款。該 GenAI 助理必須為每個使用者所屬的業務單位（例如法務、人力資源或財務）調整回應的語氣。該 GenAI 助理必須封鎖仇恨言論、不當主題，以及如個人健康資訊等敏感資訊。公司需要一個解決方案，能集中管理跨業務單位與團隊的 prompt 變體。公司希望盡量減少後處理邏輯持續的協調作業與維護工作。公司也希望能夠隨時間調整該 GenAI 助理的內容審核標準。哪一個解決方案能以最少的維護負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management 來設定可重複使用的範本與特定業務單位的 prompt 變體。套用具有類別過濾器與敏感字詞清單的 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 來封鎖被禁止的內容。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management 來定義基礎範本。透過 system prompt 變數來強制執行特定業務單位的語氣。設定 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 以套用基於受眾的門檻調整。透過內部管理 API 來管理這些 guardrails。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon Bedrock，並在 API 呼叫中注入基於業務單位的指示。將回應格式規則儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中。使用 AWS Step Functions 來驗證回應。在該 GenAI 助理產生回應後，使用 Amazon Comprehend 來套用內容過濾器。
options_zh.D: 使用 Amazon Bedrock，並搭配儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中的自訂 prompt 範本。建立一個 AWS Lambda function 來選擇特定業務單位的 prompts。建立第二個 Lambda function 來呼叫 Amazon Comprehend，以從回應中過濾被禁止的內容。

stem: A financial services company is building a customer support application that retrieves relevant financial regulation documents from a database based on semantic similarities to user queries. The application must integrate with Amazon Bedrock to generate responses. The application must be able to search documents that are in English, Spanish, and Portuguese. The application must filter documents by metadata such as publication date, regulatory agency, and document type. The database stores approximately 10 million document embeddings. To minimize operational overhead, the company wants a solution that minimizes management and maintenance effort. The application must provide low-latency responses for real-time customer interactions. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon OpenSearch Serverless to provide vector search capabilities and metadata filtering. Connect to Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases to enable Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) capabilities that use an Anthropic Claude foundation model (FM).
options.B: Deploy an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL database with the pgvector extension. Define tables to store embeddings and metadata. Use SQL queries to perform similarity searches. Send retrieved documents to Amazon Bedrock to generate responses.
options.C: Use Amazon S3 Vectors to configure a vector index and non-filterable metadata fields. Integrate S3 Vectors with Amazon Bedrock to enable Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) capabilities.
options.D: Set up an Amazon Neptune Analytics graph database. Configure a vector index that has appropriate dimensionality to store document embeddings. Use Amazon Bedrock to perform graph-based retrieval and to generate responses.

explain: 大規模(1000萬)向量 + metadata 過濾 + 低延遲 + 最少管理 → OpenSearch Serverless(向量+metadata filter)+ Bedrock Knowledge Bases RAG。S3 Vectors 的 metadata 不可過濾(C);Aurora pgvector(B)較適合中小規模且需自管。
stem_zh: 一家金融服務公司正在建構一個客戶支援應用程式，根據與使用者查詢的語意相似度，從資料庫中擷取相關的金融法規文件。該應用程式必須與 Amazon Bedrock 整合以產生回應。該應用程式必須能夠搜尋英文、西班牙文與葡萄牙文的文件。該應用程式必須能依據 metadata（例如發佈日期、監管機構與文件類型）來過濾文件。資料庫儲存約 1,000 萬筆文件 embeddings。為了將營運負擔降到最低，公司希望採用一個能盡量減少管理與維護工作的解決方案。該應用程式必須為即時的客戶互動提供低延遲的回應。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon OpenSearch Serverless 來提供向量搜尋功能與 metadata 過濾。連接到 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases，以啟用使用 Anthropic Claude foundation model (FM) 的 Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) 功能。
options_zh.B: 部署一個具有 pgvector 擴充功能的 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 資料庫。定義資料表來儲存 embeddings 與 metadata。使用 SQL 查詢來執行相似度搜尋。將擷取到的文件傳送到 Amazon Bedrock 以產生回應。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon S3 Vectors 來設定向量索引與不可過濾的 metadata 欄位。將 S3 Vectors 與 Amazon Bedrock 整合，以啟用 Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) 功能。
options_zh.D: 設定一個 Amazon Neptune Analytics 圖形資料庫。設定一個具有適當維度的向量索引來儲存文件 embeddings。使用 Amazon Bedrock 來執行基於圖形的擷取並產生回應。

stem: A medical company is building a generative AI (GenAI) application that uses RAG to provide evidence-based medical information. The application uses Amazon OpenSearch Service to retrieve vector embeddings. Users report that searches frequently miss results that contain exact medical terms and acronyms and return too many semantically similar but irrelevant documents. The company needs to improve retrieval quality and maintain low end user latency, even as the document collection grows to millions of documents. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Configure hybrid search by combining vector similarity with keyword matching to improve semantic understanding and exact term and acronym matching.
options.B: Increase the dimensions of the vector embeddings from 384 to 1536. Use a post-processing AWS Lambda function to filter out irrelevant results after retrieval.
options.C: Replace OpenSearch Service with Amazon Kendra. Use query expansion to handle medical acronyms and terminology variants during pre-processing.
options.D: Implement a two-stage retrieval architecture in which initial vector search results are re-ranked by an ML model that is hosted on Amazon SageMaker AI.

explain: 漏精確術語/縮寫 + 回太多語意近但不相關 + 最少負擔 → hybrid search(向量語意 + 關鍵字精確匹配)。自建 SageMaker rerank(D)或換 Kendra(C)負擔較高。
stem_zh: 一家醫療公司正在建構一個使用 RAG 的生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式，以提供以實證為基礎的醫療資訊。該應用程式使用 Amazon OpenSearch Service 來擷取向量 embeddings。使用者回報搜尋經常遺漏包含確切醫療名詞與縮寫的結果，並回傳過多語意相似但不相關的文件。即使文件集合成長到數百萬份文件，公司也需要改善擷取品質並維持低終端使用者延遲。哪一個解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 透過結合向量相似度與關鍵字比對來設定混合搜尋（hybrid search），以改善語意理解，以及確切名詞與縮寫的比對。
options_zh.B: 將向量 embeddings 的維度從 384 增加到 1536。使用後處理 AWS Lambda function，在擷取後過濾掉不相關的結果。
options_zh.C: 以 Amazon Kendra 取代 OpenSearch Service。在預處理期間使用查詢擴充（query expansion）來處理醫療縮寫與名詞變體。
options_zh.D: 實作兩階段擷取架構，其中初始向量搜尋的結果由託管在 Amazon SageMaker AI 上的 ML 模型重新排序。

stem: A company runs a generative AI (GenAI)-powered summarization application in an application AWS account that uses Amazon Bedrock. The application architecture includes an Amazon API Gateway REST API that forwards requests to AWS Lambda functions that are attached to private VPC subnets. The application summarizes sensitive customer records that the company stores in a governed data lake in a centralized data storage account. The company has enabled Amazon S3, Amazon Athena, and AWS Glue in the data storage account. The company must ensure that calls that the application makes to Amazon Bedrock use only private connectivity between the company's application VPC and Amazon Bedrock. The company's data lake must provide fine-grained column-level access across the company's AWS accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: In the application account, create interface VPC endpoints for Amazon Bedrock runtimes. Run Lambda functions in private subnets. Use IAM conditions on inference and data-plane policies to allow calls only to approved endpoints and roles. In the data storage account, use AWS Lake Formation LF-tag-based access control to create table and column-level cross-account grants.
options.B: Run Lambda functions in private subnets. Configure a NAT gateway to provide access to Amazon Bedrock and the data lake. Use S3 bucket policies and ACLs to manage permissions. Export AWS CloudTrail logs to Amazon S3 to perform weekly reviews.
options.C: Create a gateway endpoint only for Amazon S3 in the application account. Invoke Amazon Bedrock through public endpoints. Use database-level grants in AWS Lake Formation to manage data access. Stream AWS CloudTrail logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Do not set up metric filters or alarms.
options.D: Use VPC endpoints to provide access to Amazon Bedrock and Amazon S3 in the application account. Use only IAM path-based policies to manage data lake access. Send AWS CloudTrail logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Periodically create dashboards and allow public fallback for cross-Region reads to reduce setup time.

explain: 私有連線→Bedrock interface VPC endpoint(PrivateLink);欄位層級跨帳號存取→Lake Formation LF-Tag。NAT gateway/公網(B、C)非私有;S3 桶政策/IAM path(B、D)做不到欄位層級。
stem_zh: 一家公司在一個使用 Amazon Bedrock 的應用程式 AWS 帳戶中執行一個由生成式 AI (GenAI) 驅動的摘要應用程式。該應用程式架構包含一個 Amazon API Gateway REST API，會將請求轉發到附加在私有 VPC 子網路的 AWS Lambda functions。該應用程式會摘要公司儲存在集中式資料儲存帳戶中、受治理的 data lake 內的敏感客戶記錄。公司已在該資料儲存帳戶中啟用 Amazon S3、Amazon Athena 與 AWS Glue。公司必須確保該應用程式對 Amazon Bedrock 的呼叫只透過公司應用程式 VPC 與 Amazon Bedrock 之間的私有連線進行。公司的 data lake 必須在公司的各個 AWS 帳戶之間提供細緻的欄位層級存取控制。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 在應用程式帳戶中，為 Amazon Bedrock runtimes 建立介面 VPC endpoints。在私有子網路中執行 Lambda functions。在推論與資料平面政策上使用 IAM 條件，僅允許對已核准的 endpoints 與角色進行呼叫。在資料儲存帳戶中，使用 AWS Lake Formation 基於 LF-tag 的存取控制來建立資料表與欄位層級的跨帳戶授權。
options_zh.B: 在私有子網路中執行 Lambda functions。設定一個 NAT gateway 以提供對 Amazon Bedrock 與 data lake 的存取。使用 S3 bucket 政策與 ACLs 來管理權限。將 AWS CloudTrail 記錄匯出到 Amazon S3 以進行每週審查。
options_zh.C: 在應用程式帳戶中僅為 Amazon S3 建立一個 gateway endpoint。透過公開 endpoints 叫用 Amazon Bedrock。使用 AWS Lake Formation 中的資料庫層級授權來管理資料存取。將 AWS CloudTrail 記錄串流到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。不要設定 metric filters 或 alarms。
options_zh.D: 使用 VPC endpoints 在應用程式帳戶中提供對 Amazon Bedrock 與 Amazon S3 的存取。僅使用基於 IAM 路徑的政策來管理 data lake 存取。將 AWS CloudTrail 記錄傳送到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。定期建立 dashboards，並允許公開後援（public fallback）以進行跨 Region 讀取來縮短設定時間。

stem: A media company must use Amazon Bedrock to implement a robust governance process for AI-generated content. The company needs to manage hundreds of prompt templates. Multiple teams use the templates across multiple AWS Regions to generate content. The solution must provide version control with approval workflows that include notifications for pending reviews. The solution must also provide detailed audit trails that document prompt activities and consistent prompt parameterization to enforce quality standards. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure Amazon Bedrock Studio prompt templates. Use Amazon CloudWatch to create dashboards that display prompt usage metrics. Store the approval status of content in Amazon DynamoDB. Use AWS Lambda functions to enforce approvals.
options.B: Use Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management to implement version control. Configure AWS CloudTrail for audit logging. Use IAM policies to control approval permissions. Create parameterized prompt templates by specifying variables.
options.C: Use AWS Step Functions to create an approval workflow. Store prompts as documents in Amazon S3. Use tags to implement version control. Use Amazon EventBridge to send notifications.
options.D: Deploy Amazon SageMaker Canvas with prompt templates that are stored in Amazon S3. Use AWS CloudFormation to implement version control. Use AWS Config to enforce approval policies.

explain: prompt 版本控制 + 稽核 + 參數化 → Bedrock Prompt Management(版本控制+變數參數化)+ CloudTrail(稽核)+ IAM(審批權限)。自建 S3/tags/Step Functions(C、D)較零散。
stem_zh: 一家媒體公司必須使用 Amazon Bedrock，為 AI 生成的內容實作一套穩健的治理流程。公司需要管理數百個 prompt 範本。多個團隊跨多個 AWS Regions 使用這些範本來產生內容。該解決方案必須提供版本控制與核准工作流程，並包含待審查的通知。該解決方案還必須提供詳細的稽核軌跡，以記錄 prompt 活動，並提供一致的 prompt 參數化以強制執行品質標準。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 設定 Amazon Bedrock Studio prompt 範本。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 建立顯示 prompt 使用量 metrics 的 dashboards。將內容的核准狀態儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中。使用 AWS Lambda functions 來強制執行核准。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management 來實作版本控制。設定 AWS CloudTrail 以進行稽核記錄。使用 IAM 政策來控制核准權限。透過指定變數來建立參數化的 prompt 範本。
options_zh.C: 使用 AWS Step Functions 建立核准工作流程。將 prompts 以文件形式儲存在 Amazon S3 中。使用 tags 來實作版本控制。使用 Amazon EventBridge 傳送通知。
options_zh.D: 部署 Amazon SageMaker Canvas，並搭配儲存在 Amazon S3 中的 prompt 範本。使用 AWS CloudFormation 來實作版本控制。使用 AWS Config 來強制執行核准政策。

stem: A company is developing a customer support application that uses Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs) to provide real-time AI assistance to the company's employees. The application must display AI-generated responses character by character as the responses are generated. The application needs to support thousands of concurrent users with minimal latency. The responses typically take 15 to 45 seconds to finish. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure an Amazon API Gateway WebSocket API with an AWS Lambda integration. Configure the WebSocket API to invoke the Amazon Bedrock InvokeModelWithResponseStream API and stream partial responses through WebSocket connections.
options.B: Configure an Amazon API Gateway REST API with an AWS Lambda integration. Configure the REST API to invoke the Amazon Bedrock standard InvokeModel API and implement frontend client-side polling every 100 ms for complete response chunks.
options.C: Implement direct frontend client connections to Amazon Bedrock by using IAM user credentials and the InvokeModelWithResponseStream API without any intermediate gateway or proxy layer.
options.D: Configure an Amazon API Gateway HTTP API with an AWS Lambda integration. Configure the HTTP API to cache complete responses in an Amazon DynamoDB table and serve the responses through multiple paginated GET requests to frontend clients.

explain: 逐字串流 + 高並發 + 長回應(15-45s)→ WebSocket API + Lambda + InvokeModelWithResponseStream。前端輪詢(B)非真串流;前端直連用 IAM 憑證(C)不安全。
stem_zh: 一家公司正在開發一個客戶支援應用程式，使用 Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs) 為公司員工提供即時的 AI 協助。該應用程式必須在回應產生的同時，逐字元顯示 AI 生成的回應。該應用程式需要以最小的延遲支援數千名並行使用者。回應通常需要 15 到 45 秒才能完成。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 設定一個搭配 AWS Lambda 整合的 Amazon API Gateway WebSocket API。設定該 WebSocket API 以叫用 Amazon Bedrock 的 InvokeModelWithResponseStream API，並透過 WebSocket 連線串流部分回應。
options_zh.B: 設定一個搭配 AWS Lambda 整合的 Amazon API Gateway REST API。設定該 REST API 以叫用 Amazon Bedrock 標準的 InvokeModel API，並在前端用戶端實作每 100 毫秒一次的輪詢以取得完整的回應區塊。
options_zh.C: 使用 IAM 使用者憑證與 InvokeModelWithResponseStream API，實作前端用戶端直接連線到 Amazon Bedrock，不使用任何中介的 gateway 或 proxy 層。
options_zh.D: 設定一個搭配 AWS Lambda 整合的 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API。設定該 HTTP API 以將完整回應快取在 Amazon DynamoDB 資料表中，並透過多個分頁的 GET 請求將回應提供給前端用戶端。

stem: A company is using Amazon Bedrock to design an application to help researchers apply for grants. The application is based on an Amazon Nova Pro foundation model (FM). The application contains four required inputs and must provide responses in a consistent text format. The company wants to receive a notification in Amazon Bedrock if a response contains bullying language. However, the company does not want to block all flagged responses. The company creates an Amazon Bedrock flow that takes an input prompt and sends it to the Amazon Nova Pro FM. The Amazon Nova Pro FM provides a response. Which additional steps must the company take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management to specify the required inputs as variables. Select an Amazon Nova Pro FM. Specify the output format for the response. Add the prompt to the prompts node of the flow.
options.B: Create an Amazon Bedrock guardrail that applies the hate content filter. Set the filter response to block. Add the guardrail to the prompts node of the flow.
options.C: Create an Amazon Bedrock prompt router. Specify an Amazon Nova Pro FM. Add the required inputs as variables to the input node of the flow. Add the prompt router to the prompts node. Add the output format to the output node.
options.D: Create an Amazon Bedrock guardrail that applies the insults content filter. Set the filter response to detect. Add the guardrail to the prompts node of the flow.
options.E: Create an Amazon Bedrock application inference profile that specifies an Amazon Nova Pro FM. Specify the output format for the response in the description. Include a tag for each of the input variables. Add the profile to the prompts node of the flow.

explain: 必填輸入為變數 + 一致輸出格式 → Prompt Management(A);偵測霸凌但不阻擋 → insults filter 設 detect(D,detect=只偵測通知不阻擋)。設 block(B)會阻擋,違反「不阻擋」。
stem_zh: 一家公司正在使用 Amazon Bedrock 設計一個應用程式，以協助研究人員申請補助金。該應用程式以 Amazon Nova Pro foundation model (FM) 為基礎。該應用程式包含四個必填輸入，且必須以一致的文字格式提供回應。如果回應包含霸凌性語言，公司希望在 Amazon Bedrock 中收到通知。然而，公司並不想封鎖所有被標記的回應。公司建立了一個 Amazon Bedrock flow，會接收一個輸入 prompt 並將其傳送到 Amazon Nova Pro FM。Amazon Nova Pro FM 會提供回應。公司必須採取哪些額外步驟來滿足這些需求？（選擇兩項。）

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management 將必填輸入指定為變數。選擇一個 Amazon Nova Pro FM。指定回應的輸出格式。將該 prompt 加入到 flow 的 prompts 節點中。
options_zh.B: 建立一個套用 hate 內容過濾器的 Amazon Bedrock guardrail。將過濾器回應設定為封鎖（block）。將該 guardrail 加入到 flow 的 prompts 節點中。
options_zh.C: 建立一個 Amazon Bedrock prompt router。指定一個 Amazon Nova Pro FM。將必填輸入作為變數加入到 flow 的 input 節點中。將 prompt router 加入到 prompts 節點中。將輸出格式加入到 output 節點中。
options_zh.D: 建立一個套用 insults 內容過濾器的 Amazon Bedrock guardrail。將過濾器回應設定為偵測（detect）。將該 guardrail 加入到 flow 的 prompts 節點中。
options_zh.E: 建立一個指定 Amazon Nova Pro FM 的 Amazon Bedrock application inference profile。在描述中指定回應的輸出格式。為每個輸入變數加入一個 tag。將該 profile 加入到 flow 的 prompts 節點中。

stem: A healthcare company is using Amazon Bedrock to build a Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) application that helps practitioners make clinical decisions. The application must achieve high accuracy for patient information retrievals, identify hallucinations in generated content, and reduce human review costs. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon Comprehend to analyze and classify RAG responses and to extract medical entities and relationships. Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate automated evaluations. Configure Amazon CloudWatch metrics to track entity recognition confidence scores. Configure Amazon CloudWatch to send an alert when accuracy falls below specified thresholds.
options.B: Implement automated large language model (LLM)-based evaluations that use a specialized model that is fine-tuned for medical content to assess all responses. Deploy AWS Lambda functions to parallelize evaluations. Publish results to Amazon CloudWatch metrics that track relevance and factual accuracy.
options.C: Configure Amazon CloudWatch Synthetics to generate test queries that have known answers on a regular schedule, and track model success rates. Set up dashboards that compare synthetic test results against expected outcomes.
options.D: Deploy a hybrid evaluation system that uses an automated LLM-as-a-judge evaluation to initially screen responses and targeted human reviews for edge cases. Use Amazon SageMaker Feature Store to maintain evaluation datasets. Use a built-in Amazon Bedrock evaluation to track retrieval precision and hallucination rates.

explain: 高準確 + 偵測幻覺 + 降人工成本 → 混合評估:LLM-as-a-judge 初篩 + 人工審 edge case + Bedrock 內建評估(檢索精度/幻覺率)。全人工或全 Comprehend 不符成本/能力。
stem_zh: 一家醫療保健公司正在使用 Amazon Bedrock 建構一個 Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) 應用程式，以協助醫療從業人員做出臨床決策。該應用程式必須在病患資訊擷取上達到高準確度、辨識生成內容中的幻覺（hallucinations），並降低人工審查成本。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon Comprehend 來分析並分類 RAG 回應，並擷取醫療實體與其關係。使用 AWS Step Functions 來協調自動化評估。設定 Amazon CloudWatch metrics 來追蹤實體辨識的信心分數。設定 Amazon CloudWatch，在準確度低於指定門檻時傳送警示。
options_zh.B: 實作自動化的大型語言模型 (LLM) 評估，使用一個針對醫療內容微調的專用模型來評估所有回應。部署 AWS Lambda functions 以平行處理評估。將結果發佈到追蹤相關性與事實準確度的 Amazon CloudWatch metrics。
options_zh.C: 設定 Amazon CloudWatch Synthetics，定期產生具有已知答案的測試查詢，並追蹤模型的成功率。設定 dashboards 來比較合成測試結果與預期結果。
options_zh.D: 部署一個混合式評估系統，使用自動化的 LLM-as-a-judge 評估來初步篩選回應，並針對邊緣案例進行有針對性的人工審查。使用 Amazon SageMaker Feature Store 來維護評估資料集。使用內建的 Amazon Bedrock 評估來追蹤擷取精確度與幻覺率。

stem: Company configures a landing zone in AWS Control Tower. The company handles sensitive data that must remain within the European Union. The company must use only the eu-central-1 Region. The company uses SCPs to enforce data residency policies. GenAI developers at the company are assigned IAM roles that have full permissions for Amazon Bedrock. The company must ensure that GenAI developers can use the Amazon Nova Pro model through Amazon Bedrock only by using cross-Region inference (CRI) and only in eu-central-1. The company enables model access for the GenAI developer IAM roles in Amazon Bedrock. However, when a GenAI developer attempts to invoke the model through the Amazon Bedrock Chat/Text playground, the GenAI developer receives the following error. User: arn:aws:sts::123456789012:assumed-role/AssumedDevRole/DevUserName Action: bedrock:InvokeModelWithResponseStream On resource(s): arn:aws:bedrock:eu-west-3::foundation-model/amazon.nova-pro-v1:0 Context: a service control policy explicitly denies the action The company needs a solution to resolve the error. The solution must retain the company's existing governance controls and must provide precise access control. The solution must comply with the company's existing data residency policies. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Add an AdministratorAccess policy to the GenAI developer IAM role.
options.B: Extend the existing SCPs to enable CRI for the eu.amazon.nova-pro-v1:0 inference profile.
options.C: Enable Amazon Bedrock model access for Amazon Nova Pro in the eu-west-3 Region.
options.D: Validate that the GenAI developer IAM roles have permissions to invoke Amazon Nova Pro through the eu.amazon.nova-pro.v1:0 inference profile on all European Union AWS Regions that can serve the model.
options.E: Extend the existing SCP to enable CRI for the eu.* inference profile.

explain: CRI 透過 eu.* 地理推理設定檔 → 擴展 SCP 允許 eu.amazon.nova-pro 推理設定檔(B,精確控制)+ 驗證 IAM 角色可在歐洲區透過該設定檔呼叫(D)。AdministratorAccess(A)過寬;eu.*(E)過寬不精確。
stem_zh: 一家公司在 AWS Control Tower 中設定了一個 landing zone。該公司處理必須留在歐盟境內的敏感資料。公司必須只使用 eu-central-1 Region。公司使用 SCPs 來強制執行資料駐留政策。公司的 GenAI 開發人員被指派了對 Amazon Bedrock 具有完整權限的 IAM 角色。公司必須確保 GenAI 開發人員只能透過 cross-Region inference (CRI) 並且只能在 eu-central-1 中，透過 Amazon Bedrock 使用 Amazon Nova Pro 模型。公司在 Amazon Bedrock 中為 GenAI 開發人員的 IAM 角色啟用了模型存取權。然而，當 GenAI 開發人員嘗試透過 Amazon Bedrock Chat/Text playground 叫用該模型時，GenAI 開發人員收到以下錯誤。User: arn:aws:sts::123456789012:assumed-role/AssumedDevRole/DevUserName Action: bedrock:InvokeModelWithResponseStream On resource(s): arn:aws:bedrock:eu-west-3::foundation-model/amazon.nova-pro-v1:0 Context: a service control policy explicitly denies the action（一項服務控制政策明確拒絕了該動作）。公司需要一個解決方案來解決此錯誤。該解決方案必須保留公司現有的治理控管，並提供精確的存取控制。該解決方案必須符合公司現有的資料駐留政策。哪一組解決方案能滿足這些需求？（選擇兩項。）

options_zh.A: 為 GenAI 開發人員的 IAM 角色加入 AdministratorAccess 政策。
options_zh.B: 擴充現有的 SCPs，以針對 eu.amazon.nova-pro-v1:0 inference profile 啟用 CRI。
options_zh.C: 在 eu-west-3 Region 為 Amazon Nova Pro 啟用 Amazon Bedrock 模型存取權。
options_zh.D: 驗證 GenAI 開發人員的 IAM 角色在所有能提供該模型的歐盟 AWS Regions 上，都具有透過 eu.amazon.nova-pro.v1:0 inference profile 叫用 Amazon Nova Pro 的權限。
options_zh.E: 擴充現有的 SCP，以針對 eu.* inference profile 啟用 CRI。

stem: A financial services company is developing a customer service AI assistant by using Amazon Bedrock. The AI assistant must not discuss investment advice with users. The AI assistant must block harmful content, mask personally identifiable information (PII), and maintain audit trails for compliance reporting. The AI assistant must apply content filtering to both user inputs and model responses based on content sensitivity. The company requires an Amazon Bedrock guardrail configuration that will effectively enforce policies with minimal false positives. The solution must provide multiple handling strategies for multiple types of sensitive content. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure a single guardrail and set content filters to high for all categories. Set up denied topics for investment advice and include sample phrases to block. Set up sensitive information filters that apply the block action for all PII entities. Apply the guardrail to all model inference calls.
options.B: Configure multiple guardrails by using tiered policies. Create one guardrail and set content filters to high. Configure the guardrail to block PII for public interactions. Configure a second guardrail and set content filters to medium. Configure the second guardrail to mask PII for internal use. Configure multiple topic-specific guardrails to block investment advice and set up contextual grounding checks.
options.C: Configure a guardrail and set content filters to medium for harmful content. Set up denied topics for investment advice and include clear definitions and sample phrases to block. Configure sensitive information filters to mask PII in responses and to block financial information in inputs. Enable both input and output evaluations that use custom blocked messages for audits.
options.D: Create a separate guardrail for each use case. Create one guardrail that applies a harmful content filter. Create a guardrail to apply topic filters for investment advice. Create a guardrail to apply sensitive information filters to block PII. Use AWS Step Functions to chain the guardrails together sequentially. Use conditional logic based on content classification.

explain: 少誤報 + 多種處理策略 + 輸入輸出皆過濾 → 單一 guardrail:content medium(降誤報)+ denied topics(投資建議)+ PII mask(回應)/block 金融資訊(輸入)+ 輸入輸出評估。全 high(A)誤報高;多 guardrail 串接(D)複雜。
stem_zh: 一家金融服務公司正在使用 Amazon Bedrock 開發一個客戶服務 AI 助理。該 AI 助理不得與使用者討論投資建議。該 AI 助理必須封鎖有害內容、遮蔽個人識別資訊 (PII)，並為合規報告維護稽核軌跡。該 AI 助理必須根據內容敏感度，對使用者輸入與模型回應兩者都套用內容過濾。公司需要一個能有效強制執行政策且誤判（false positives）最少的 Amazon Bedrock guardrail 設定。該解決方案必須為多種類型的敏感內容提供多種處理策略。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 設定單一 guardrail，並將所有類別的 content filters 設定為 high。針對投資建議設定 denied topics，並納入要封鎖的範例語句。設定對所有 PII 實體套用封鎖動作的敏感資訊過濾器。將該 guardrail 套用到所有模型推論呼叫。
options_zh.B: 使用分層政策設定多個 guardrails。建立一個 guardrail 並將 content filters 設定為 high。將該 guardrail 設定為針對公開互動封鎖 PII。設定第二個 guardrail 並將 content filters 設定為 medium。將第二個 guardrail 設定為針對內部使用遮蔽 PII。設定多個特定主題的 guardrails 來封鎖投資建議，並設定 contextual grounding 檢查。
options_zh.C: 設定一個 guardrail，並將有害內容的 content filters 設定為 medium。針對投資建議設定 denied topics，並納入清楚的定義與要封鎖的範例語句。設定敏感資訊過濾器，以在回應中遮蔽 PII 並在輸入中封鎖財務資訊。同時啟用輸入與輸出評估，並使用自訂的封鎖訊息以供稽核之用。
options_zh.D: 為每個使用案例建立一個獨立的 guardrail。建立一個套用有害內容過濾器的 guardrail。建立一個針對投資建議套用主題過濾器的 guardrail。建立一個套用敏感資訊過濾器以封鎖 PII 的 guardrail。使用 AWS Step Functions 將這些 guardrails 依序串接在一起。根據內容分類使用條件邏輯。

stem: An ecommerce company is developing a generative AI (GenAI) solution that uses Amazon Bedrock with Anthropic Claude to recommend products to customers. Customers report that some of the recommended products are not available for sale on the website or are not relevant to the customer. Customers also report that the solutions takes a long time to generate some recommendations. The company investigates the issues and finds that most interactions between customers and the product recommendation solution are unique. The company confirms that the solutions recommends products that are not in the company's product catalog. The company must resolve these issues. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.A: Increase grounding within Amazon Bedrock Guardrails. Enable Automated Reasoning checks. Set up provisioned throughput.
options.B: Use prompt engineering to restrict the model responses to relevant products. Use streaming techniques such as the InvokeModelWithResponseStream action to reduce perceived latency for the customers.
options.C: Create an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base. Implement Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). Set the PerformanceConfigLatency parameter to optimized.
options.D: Store product catalog data in Amazon OpenSearch Service. Validate the model's product recommendations against the product catalog. Use Amazon DynamoDB to implement response caching.

explain: 「推薦了不在目錄的產品(幻覺)+ 慢」→ 建 Bedrock Knowledge Base + RAG(先從目錄檢索相關商品→提供給 Claude→只依檢索結果推薦,接地防幻覺)+ PerformanceConfigLatency=optimized(降延遲)。〔註:D 亦為部分題庫答案——OpenSearch 存目錄 + 對照目錄「驗證」推薦 + DynamoDB 快取;若考點強調「對推薦做存在性驗證」則選 D。本題依使用者定案選 C。〕
stem_zh: 一家電子商務公司正在開發一個生成式 AI (GenAI) 解決方案，使用 Amazon Bedrock 搭配 Anthropic Claude 來向客戶推薦產品。客戶回報部分推薦的產品在網站上並未開放販售，或與客戶不相關。客戶也回報該解決方案產生某些推薦時花費很長時間。公司調查這些問題後發現，客戶與產品推薦解決方案之間的大多數互動都是獨特的。公司確認該解決方案推薦了不在公司產品型錄中的產品。公司必須解決這些問題。哪一個解決方案能滿足此需求？

options_zh.A: 提高 Amazon Bedrock Guardrails 中的 grounding。啟用 Automated Reasoning 檢查。設定 provisioned throughput。
options_zh.B: 使用 prompt engineering 將模型回應限制在相關產品上。使用串流技術（例如 InvokeModelWithResponseStream 動作）來降低客戶感知到的延遲。
options_zh.C: 建立一個 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base。實作 Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)。將 PerformanceConfigLatency 參數設定為 optimized。
options_zh.D: 將產品型錄資料儲存在 Amazon OpenSearch Service 中。對照產品型錄驗證模型的產品推薦。使用 Amazon DynamoDB 來實作回應快取。

stem: A company is using AWS Lambda and REST APIs to build a reasoning agent to automate support workflows. The system must preserve memory across interactions, share the relevant agent state, and support event-driven invocation and synchronous invocation. The system must also enforce access control and session-based permissions. Which combination of steps provides the MOST scalable solution? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to manage memory and session-aware reasoning. Deploy the agent with built-in identity support, event handling, and observability.
options.B: Register the Lambda functions and the REST APIs as actions by using Amazon API Gateway and Amazon EventBridge. Enable Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to invoke the Lambda functions and the REST APIs without custom orchestration code.
options.C: Use Amazon Bedrock Agents for reasoning and conversation management. Use AWS Step Functions and Amazon SQS queues for orchestration. Store the agent state in Amazon DynamoDB to maintain memory between steps.
options.D: Deploy the reasoning logic as a container on Amazon ECS behind Amazon API Gateway. Use Amazon Aurora to store memory data and identity data.
options.E: Build a custom RAG pipeline by using Amazon Kendra and Amazon Bedrock. Use AWS Lambda to orchestrate tool invocations. Store the agent state in Amazon S3.

explain: 可擴展 agent + 記憶 + session 權限 + 事件/同步呼叫 → Bedrock AgentCore(內建記憶/身分/事件/可觀測,A)+ 用 API Gateway/EventBridge 註冊動作讓 AgentCore 呼叫(B,免自建編排)。
stem_zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS Lambda 與 REST APIs 建構一個推理代理（reasoning agent），以自動化支援工作流程。該系統必須跨互動保留記憶、共享相關的代理狀態，並支援事件驅動的叫用與同步叫用。該系統還必須強制執行存取控制與基於工作階段（session）的權限。哪一組步驟能提供最具擴展性的解決方案？（選擇兩項。）

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon Bedrock AgentCore 來管理記憶與具工作階段感知的推理。部署具有內建身分支援、事件處理與可觀測性（observability）的代理。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon API Gateway 與 Amazon EventBridge 將 Lambda functions 與 REST APIs 註冊為動作（actions）。啟用 Amazon Bedrock AgentCore 以叫用這些 Lambda functions 與 REST APIs，而無需自訂協調程式碼。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Agents 進行推理與對話管理。使用 AWS Step Functions 與 Amazon SQS 佇列進行協調。將代理狀態儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中，以在各步驟之間維護記憶。
options_zh.D: 將推理邏輯部署為 Amazon ECS 上、位於 Amazon API Gateway 後方的容器。使用 Amazon Aurora 來儲存記憶資料與身分資料。
options_zh.E: 使用 Amazon Kendra 與 Amazon Bedrock 建構自訂的 RAG pipeline。使用 AWS Lambda 來協調工具叫用。將代理狀態儲存在 Amazon S3 中。

stem: A financial services company is developing a Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) application to help investment analysts query complex financial relationships across multiple investment vehicles, market sectors, and regulatory environments. The dataset contains highly interconnected entities that have multi-hop relationships. The analysts must be able to examine the relationships holistically to provide accurate investment guidance. The application must deliver comprehensive answers that capture indirect relationships between financial entities. The application must produce responses in less than 3 seconds. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases with Graph RAG and Amazon Neptune Analytics to store the financial data. Analyze the multi-hop relationships between entities and automatically identify related information across documents.
options.B: Use Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases and an Amazon OpenSearch Service vector store to implement custom relationship identification logic that uses AWS Lambda functions to query multiple vector embeddings in sequence.
options.C: Use an Amazon OpenSearch Serverless vector database with k-nearest neighbor (k-NN) searches. Implement manual relationship mapping in an application layer that runs in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group.
options.D: Use Amazon DynamoDB to store financial data in a custom indexing system. Use an AWS Lambda function to query relevant records based on input questions. Use Amazon SageMaker AI to generate responses.

explain: 多跳關係 + 捕捉間接關係 + 最少負擔 → Bedrock Knowledge Bases Graph RAG + Neptune Analytics(圖資料庫,內建多跳關係分析)。自建關係邏輯(B、C)負擔高。
stem_zh: 一家金融服務公司正在開發一個 Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) 應用程式，以協助投資分析師查詢跨多種投資工具、市場類別與法規環境的複雜金融關係。該資料集包含高度互聯且具有多跳（multi-hop）關係的實體。分析師必須能夠全面性地檢視這些關係，以提供準確的投資指引。該應用程式必須提供能掌握金融實體之間間接關係的完整答案。該應用程式必須在 3 秒內產生回應。哪一個解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases 搭配 Graph RAG 與 Amazon Neptune Analytics 來儲存金融資料。分析實體之間的多跳關係，並自動辨識跨文件的相關資訊。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases 與 Amazon OpenSearch Service 向量儲存，以實作自訂的關係辨識邏輯，使用 AWS Lambda functions 依序查詢多個向量 embeddings。
options_zh.C: 使用具有 k-最近鄰（k-NN）搜尋的 Amazon OpenSearch Serverless 向量資料庫。在執行於 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 群組的應用程式層中實作手動的關係對應。
options_zh.D: 使用 Amazon DynamoDB 以自訂索引系統儲存金融資料。使用 AWS Lambda function 根據輸入問題查詢相關記錄。使用 Amazon SageMaker AI 來產生回應。

stem: A healthcare company uses Amazon Bedrock to deploy an application that generates summaries of clinical documents. The application experiences inconsistent response quality with occasional factual hallucinations. Monthly costs exceed the company's projections by 40%. A GenAI developer must implement a near real-time monitoring solution to detect hallucinations, identify abnormal token consumption, and provide early warnings of cost anomalies. The solution must require minimal custom development work and maintenance overhead. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure Amazon CloudWatch alarms to monitor InputTokenCount and OutputTokenCount metrics to detect anomalies. Store model invocation logs in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use AWS Glue and Amazon Athena to identify potential hallucinations.
options.B: Run Amazon Bedrock evaluation jobs that use LLM-based judgments to detect hallucinations. Configure Amazon CloudWatch to track token usage. Create an AWS Lambda function to process CloudWatch metrics. Configure the Lambda function to send usage pattern notifications.
options.C: Configure Amazon Bedrock to store model invocation logs in an Amazon S3 bucket. Enable text output logging. Configure Amazon Bedrock guardrails to run contextual grounding checks to detect hallucinations. Create Amazon CloudWatch anomaly detection alarms for token usage metrics.
options.D: Use AWS CloudTrail to log all Amazon Bedrock API calls. Create a custom dashboard in Amazon QuickSight to visualize token usage patterns. Use Amazon SageMaker Model Monitor to detect quality drift in generated summaries.

explain: 近即時偵測幻覺 + token 異常 + 最少開發 → Guardrails contextual grounding(偵測幻覺)+ invocation logging(S3)+ CloudWatch anomaly detection(token 異常自動基準)。SageMaker Model Monitor(D)是 SageMaker 模型用,不適用 Bedrock。
stem_zh: 一家醫療保健公司使用 Amazon Bedrock 部署一個應用程式，以產生臨床文件的摘要。該應用程式的回應品質不一致，偶爾會出現事實性幻覺（hallucinations）。每月成本超出公司預估的 40%。一位 GenAI 開發人員必須實作一個近即時的監控解決方案，以偵測幻覺、辨識異常的 token 消耗，並提供成本異常的早期警告。該解決方案必須只需最少的自訂開發工作與維護負擔。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 設定 Amazon CloudWatch alarms 來監控 InputTokenCount 與 OutputTokenCount metrics 以偵測異常。將模型叫用記錄儲存在 Amazon S3 bucket 中。使用 AWS Glue 與 Amazon Athena 來辨識潛在的幻覺。
options_zh.B: 執行使用 LLM 判斷的 Amazon Bedrock 評估工作來偵測幻覺。設定 Amazon CloudWatch 來追蹤 token 使用量。建立一個 AWS Lambda function 來處理 CloudWatch metrics。設定該 Lambda function 以傳送使用模式通知。
options_zh.C: 設定 Amazon Bedrock，將模型叫用記錄儲存在 Amazon S3 bucket 中。啟用文字輸出記錄。設定 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 以執行 contextual grounding 檢查來偵測幻覺。為 token 使用量 metrics 建立 Amazon CloudWatch 異常偵測 alarms。
options_zh.D: 使用 AWS CloudTrail 記錄所有 Amazon Bedrock API 呼叫。在 Amazon QuickSight 中建立自訂 dashboard 以視覺化 token 使用模式。使用 Amazon SageMaker Model Monitor 來偵測生成摘要中的品質漂移（quality drift）。

stem: A company is building a generative AI (GenAI) application that produces content based on a variety of internal and external data sources. The company wants to ensure that the generated output is fully traceable. The application must support data source registration and enable metadata tagging to attribute content to its original source. The application must also maintain audit logs of data access and usage throughout the pipeline. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Lake Formation to catalog data sources and control access. Apply metadata tags directly in Amazon S3. Use AWS CloudTrail to monitor API activity.
options.B: Use AWS Glue Data Catalog to register and tag data sources. Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs to monitor access patterns and application behavior.
options.C: Store data in Amazon S3 and use object tagging for attribution. Use AWS Glue Data Catalog to manage schema information. Use AWS CloudTrail to log access to S3 buckets.
options.D: Use AWS Glue Data Catalog to register all data sources. Apply metadata tags to attribute data sources. Use AWS CloudTrail to log access and activity across services.

explain: 資料源註冊 + metadata 標記歸因 + 跨服務稽核 → Glue Data Catalog 註冊+標記 + CloudTrail 跨服務日誌。CloudWatch Logs(B)非存取稽核;只標 S3(A、C)不夠全面註冊。
stem_zh: 一家公司正在建構一個生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式，根據各種內部與外部資料來源產生內容。公司希望確保生成的輸出完全可追溯。該應用程式必須支援資料來源註冊，並啟用 metadata 標記，以將內容歸因到其原始來源。該應用程式還必須在整個 pipeline 中維護資料存取與使用的稽核記錄。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 AWS Lake Formation 來編目資料來源並控制存取。直接在 Amazon S3 中套用 metadata tags。使用 AWS CloudTrail 來監控 API 活動。
options_zh.B: 使用 AWS Glue Data Catalog 來註冊並標記資料來源。使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 來監控存取模式與應用程式行為。
options_zh.C: 將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中，並使用物件標記（object tagging）進行歸因。使用 AWS Glue Data Catalog 來管理結構描述（schema）資訊。使用 AWS CloudTrail 來記錄對 S3 buckets 的存取。
options_zh.D: 使用 AWS Glue Data Catalog 來註冊所有資料來源。套用 metadata tags 以歸因資料來源。使用 AWS CloudTrail 來記錄跨各服務的存取與活動。

stem: A financial services company needs to build a document analysis system that uses Amazon Bedrock to process quarterly reports. The system must analyze financial data, perform sentiment analysis, and validate compliance across batches of reports. Each batch contains 5 reports. Each report requires multiple foundation model (FM) calls. The solution must finish the analysis within 10 seconds for each batch. Current sequential processing takes 45 seconds for each batch. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Lambda functions with provisioned concurrency to process each analysis type sequentially. Configure the Lambda function timeouts to 10 seconds. Configure automatic retries with exponential backoff.
options.B: Use AWS Step Functions with a Parallel state to invoke separate AWS Lambda functions for each analysis type simultaneously. Configure Amazon Bedrock client timeouts. Use Amazon CloudWatch metrics to track execution time and model inference latency.
options.C: Create an Amazon SQS queue to buffer analysis requests. Deploy multiple AWS Lambda functions with reserved concurrency. Configure each Lambda function to process different aspects of each report sequentially and then combine the results.
options.D: Deploy an Amazon ECS cluster that runs containers that process each report sequentially. Use a load balancer to distribute batch workloads. Configure an auto-scaling policy based on CPU utilization to handle demand fluctuations.

explain: 45s→10s + 多分析類型 → Step Functions Parallel state 同時呼叫多 Lambda(並行)。並行才能大幅縮短;序列處理(A、C、D)無法達標。
stem_zh: 一家金融服務公司需要建構一個文件分析系統，使用 Amazon Bedrock 來處理季度報告。該系統必須分析財務資料、執行情緒分析，並驗證跨多批報告的合規性。每批包含 5 份報告。每份報告需要多次 foundation model (FM) 呼叫。該解決方案必須在 10 秒內完成每批的分析。目前的循序處理每批需要 45 秒。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用具有 provisioned concurrency 的 AWS Lambda functions 來循序處理每種分析類型。將 Lambda function 逾時設定為 10 秒。設定具有指數退避（exponential backoff）的自動重試。
options_zh.B: 使用具有 Parallel 狀態的 AWS Step Functions，同時為每種分析類型叫用各自獨立的 AWS Lambda functions。設定 Amazon Bedrock 用戶端逾時。使用 Amazon CloudWatch metrics 來追蹤執行時間與模型推論延遲。
options_zh.C: 建立一個 Amazon SQS 佇列來緩衝分析請求。部署多個具有 reserved concurrency 的 AWS Lambda functions。設定每個 Lambda function 循序處理每份報告的不同面向，然後合併結果。
options_zh.D: 部署一個 Amazon ECS 叢集，執行循序處理每份報告的容器。使用負載平衡器來分配批次工作負載。設定基於 CPU 使用率的自動擴展政策，以因應需求波動。

stem: A company is using Amazon Bedrock to build a customer-facing AI assistant to handle sensitive customer inquiries. The company must use defense-in-depth safety controls to block sophisticated prompt injection attacks. The company must keep audit logs of all safety interventions. The AI assistant must have cross-Region failover capabilities. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure Amazon Bedrock guardrails to use content filters to protect against prompt injection attacks. Set the content filters to high. Use a guardrail profile to implement cross-Region guardrail inference. Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs with custom metrics to capture detailed guardrail intervention events.
options.B: Configure Amazon Bedrock guardrails to use content filters to protect against prompt injection attacks. Set the content filters to high. Use AWS WAF to block suspicious inputs. Use AWS CloudTrail to log API calls for audits.
options.C: Deploy Amazon Comprehend custom classification to detect prompt injection attacks. Use Amazon API Gateway to validate requests. Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs with custom metrics to capture detailed intervention events.
options.D: Configure Amazon Bedrock guardrails to use custom content filters to protect against harmful content. Set the content filters to high. Use word filters to protect against known attack patterns. Configure cross-Region guardrail replication to provide failover capabilities. Store logs in AWS CloudTrail for compliance auditing.

explain: 防 prompt injection(Guardrails content filter)+ 跨區故障轉移(guardrail profile 跨區推理)+ 稽核干預事件(CloudWatch Logs 自訂指標)。WAF(B)非 AI 內容防護;Comprehend 自訓分類(C)負擔高。
stem_zh: 某公司正在使用 Amazon Bedrock 建構一個面向客戶的 AI 助理，用來處理敏感的客戶詢問。公司必須採用縱深防禦 (defense-in-depth) 的安全控制機制，以阻擋複雜的 prompt injection 攻擊。公司必須保留所有安全介入動作的稽核日誌。這個 AI 助理還必須具備跨 Region 的容錯移轉 (failover) 能力。哪一個解決方案可以滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 設定 Amazon Bedrock guardrails，使用 content filters 來防範 prompt injection 攻擊。將 content filters 設為 high。使用 guardrail profile 來實作跨 Region 的 guardrail 推論。使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 搭配自訂 metrics 來擷取詳細的 guardrail 介入事件。
options_zh.B: 設定 Amazon Bedrock guardrails，使用 content filters 來防範 prompt injection 攻擊。將 content filters 設為 high。使用 AWS WAF 來阻擋可疑的輸入。使用 AWS CloudTrail 記錄 API 呼叫以供稽核。
options_zh.C: 部署 Amazon Comprehend 自訂分類功能來偵測 prompt injection 攻擊。使用 Amazon API Gateway 驗證請求。使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 搭配自訂 metrics 來擷取詳細的介入事件。
options_zh.D: 設定 Amazon Bedrock guardrails，使用自訂 content filters 來防範有害內容。將 content filters 設為 high。使用 word filters 來防範已知的攻擊模式。設定跨 Region 的 guardrail 複寫以提供容錯移轉能力。將日誌儲存在 AWS CloudTrail 中以供合規稽核。

stem: A company is designing a canary deployment strategy for a payment processing API. The system must support automated gradual traffic shifting between multiple Amazon Bedrock models based on real-time inference metrics, historical traffic patterns, and service health. The solution must be able to gradually increase traffic to new model versions. The system must increase traffic if metrics remain healthy and decrease traffic if the performance degrades below acceptable thresholds. The company needs to comprehensively monitor inference latency and error rates during the deployment phase. The company must also be able to halt deployments and revert to a previous model version without any manual intervention. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon Bedrock with provisioned throughput to host the versions of the model. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Step Functions workflow when a new model version is released. Configure the workflow to shift traffic in stages, wait for a specified time period, and invoke an AWS Lambda function to check Amazon CloudWatch performance metrics. Configure the workflow to increase traffic if the metrics meet thresholds and to trigger a traffic rollback if performance metrics fall below thresholds.
options.B: Use AWS Lambda functions to invoke various Amazon Bedrock model versions. Use an Amazon API Gateway HTTP API with stage variables and weighted routing to shift traffic gradually to new model versions. Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor performance metrics. Use external logic to adjust traffic between model versions and to roll back if performance falls below thresholds.
options.C: Use Amazon SageMaker AI endpoint variants to represent multiple Amazon Bedrock model versions. Use variant weights to shift traffic. Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor performance metrics. Use SageMaker Model Monitor to trigger AWS Lambda functions to roll back a model deployment if performance drops below a specified threshold. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to roll back model deployments if an anomaly is detected.
options.D: Use Amazon OpenSearch Service to track inference logs. Configure OpenSearch Service to invoke an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook to update Amazon Bedrock model endpoints to shift traffic based on the inference logs.

explain: 金絲雀漸進切流 + 自動回滾(無人工)→ EventBridge → Step Functions 分階段切流 + 等待 + Lambda 檢查 CloudWatch + 達標增流/未達自動回滾。SageMaker endpoint variants(C)不能代表 Bedrock 模型。
stem_zh: 某公司正在為一個支付處理 API 設計金絲雀部署 (canary deployment) 策略。系統必須支援根據即時推論 metrics、歷史流量模式與服務健康狀態，在多個 Amazon Bedrock 模型之間自動逐步轉移流量。此解決方案必須能夠逐步增加流向新模型版本的流量。當 metrics 維持健康時，系統必須增加流量；當效能降到可接受門檻以下時，系統必須減少流量。公司需要在部署階段全面監控推論延遲與錯誤率。公司還必須能夠停止部署並回復到先前的模型版本，且不需要任何人工介入。哪一個解決方案可以滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon Bedrock 搭配 provisioned throughput 來託管模型的各個版本。設定一個 Amazon EventBridge 規則，在發布新模型版本時觸發一個 AWS Step Functions 工作流程。設定該工作流程分階段轉移流量、等待指定的時間區間，並呼叫一個 AWS Lambda 函式來檢查 Amazon CloudWatch 的效能 metrics。設定該工作流程在 metrics 達到門檻時增加流量，並在效能 metrics 降到門檻以下時觸發流量回復。
options_zh.B: 使用 AWS Lambda 函式來呼叫各種 Amazon Bedrock 模型版本。使用 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API 搭配 stage variables 與加權路由，逐步將流量轉移到新模型版本。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 監控效能 metrics。使用外部邏輯來調整模型版本之間的流量，並在效能降到門檻以下時進行回復。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon SageMaker AI endpoint variants 來表示多個 Amazon Bedrock 模型版本。使用 variant weights 來轉移流量。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 監控效能 metrics。使用 SageMaker Model Monitor 在效能降到指定門檻以下時觸發 AWS Lambda 函式來回復模型部署。設定一個 Amazon EventBridge 規則，在偵測到異常時回復模型部署。
options_zh.D: 使用 Amazon OpenSearch Service 來追蹤推論日誌。設定 OpenSearch Service 呼叫一個 AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook，以根據推論日誌更新 Amazon Bedrock 模型 endpoint 來轉移流量。

stem: A financial services company uses an AI application to process financial documents by using Amazon Bedrock. During business hours, the application handles approximately 10,000 requests each hour, which requires consistent throughput. The company uses the CreateProvisionedModelThroughput API to purchase provisioned throughput. Amazon CloudWatch metrics show that the provisioned capacity is unused while on-demand requests are being throttled. The company finds the following code in the application: python response = bedrock_runtime.invoke_model(modelId="anthropic.claude-v2", body=json.dumps(payload)) The company needs the application to use the provisioned throughput and to resolve the throttling issues. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Increase the number of model units (MUs) in the provisioned throughput configuration.
options.B: Replace the model ID parameter with the ARN of the provisioned model that the CreateProvisionedModelThroughput API returns.
options.C: Add exponential backoff retry logic to handle throttling exceptions during peak hours.
options.D: Modify the application to use the InvokeModelWithResponseStream API instead of the InvokeModel API.

explain: provisioned 未用但被節流 → 程式碼仍用 base model ID(走 on-demand)。把 modelId 換成 CreateProvisionedModelThroughput 回傳的 provisioned model ARN,才會用到已購產能。
stem_zh: 某金融服務公司使用一個 AI 應用程式透過 Amazon Bedrock 來處理財務文件。在營業時間內，該應用程式每小時處理約 10,000 個請求，這需要一致的 throughput。公司使用 CreateProvisionedModelThroughput API 來購買 provisioned throughput。Amazon CloudWatch metrics 顯示 provisioned 容量並未被使用，而 on-demand 請求卻遭到 throttling。公司在應用程式中發現以下程式碼：python response = bedrock_runtime.invoke_model(modelId="anthropic.claude-v2", body=json.dumps(payload)) 公司需要讓應用程式使用 provisioned throughput 並解決 throttling 問題。哪一個解決方案可以滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 增加 provisioned throughput 設定中的 model units (MUs) 數量。
options_zh.B: 將 model ID 參數替換為 CreateProvisionedModelThroughput API 所回傳的 provisioned 模型的 ARN。
options_zh.C: 加入指數退避 (exponential backoff) 重試邏輯，以處理尖峰時段的 throttling 例外。
options_zh.D: 修改應用程式，改用 InvokeModelWithResponseStream API 而非 InvokeModel API。

stem: A company is building an AI advisory application by using Amazon Bedrock. The application will provide recommendations to customers. The company needs the application to explain its reasoning process and cite specific sources for data. The application must retrieve information from company data sources and show step-by-step reasoning for recommendations. The application must also link data claims to source documents and maintain response latency under 3 seconds. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases with source attribution enabled. Use the Anthropic Claude Messages API with RAG to set high-relevance thresholds for source documents. Store reasoning and citations in Amazon S3 for auditing purposes.
options.B: Use Amazon Bedrock with Anthropic Claude models and extended thinking. Configure a 4,000-token thinking budget. Store reasoning traces and citations in Amazon DynamoDB for auditing purposes.
options.C: Configure Amazon SageMaker AI with a custom Anthropic Claude model. Use the model's reasoning parameter and AWS Lambda to process responses. Add source citations from a separate Amazon RDS database.
options.D: Use Amazon Bedrock with Anthropic Claude models and chain-of-thought reasoning. Configure custom retrieval tracking with the Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases API. Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor response latency metrics.

explain: 推理 + 引用來源 + 最少負擔 → Bedrock Knowledge Bases 啟用來源歸因(內建引用)+ Claude Messages RAG 高相關門檻。自建追蹤(D)或 SageMaker 自訂模型(C)負擔高。
stem_zh: 某公司正在使用 Amazon Bedrock 建構一個 AI 顧問應用程式。該應用程式將為客戶提供建議。公司需要該應用程式能夠解釋其推理過程，並為資料引用特定來源。該應用程式必須從公司資料來源擷取資訊，並為建議顯示逐步推理過程。該應用程式還必須將資料論述連結到來源文件，並將回應延遲維持在 3 秒以下。哪一個解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases 並啟用來源歸屬 (source attribution)。使用 Anthropic Claude Messages API 搭配 RAG，為來源文件設定高相關性門檻。將推理過程與引用來源儲存在 Amazon S3 中以供稽核。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon Bedrock 搭配 Anthropic Claude 模型並啟用 extended thinking。設定 4,000 個 token 的 thinking budget。將推理軌跡與引用來源儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中以供稽核。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon SageMaker AI 搭配自訂的 Anthropic Claude 模型。使用該模型的 reasoning 參數與 AWS Lambda 來處理回應。從另一個獨立的 Amazon RDS 資料庫加入來源引用。
options_zh.D: 使用 Amazon Bedrock 搭配 Anthropic Claude 模型與思維鏈 (chain-of-thought) 推理。使用 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases API 設定自訂的擷取追蹤。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 監控回應延遲 metrics。

stem: A financial services company uses multiple foundation models (FMs) through Amazon Bedrock for its generative AI (GenAI) applications. To comply with a new regulation for GenAI use with sensitive financial data, the company needs a token management solution. The token management solution must proactively alert when applications approach model-specific token limits. The solution must also process more than 5,000 requests each minute and maintain token usage metrics to allocate costs across business units. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Develop model-specific tokenizers in an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to estimate token usage before sending requests to Amazon Bedrock. Configure the Lambda function to publish metrics to Amazon CloudWatch and trigger alarms when requests approach thresholds. Store detailed token usage in Amazon DynamoDB to report costs.
options.B: Implement Amazon Bedrock Guardrails with token quota policies. Capture metrics on rejected requests. Configure Amazon EventBridge rules to trigger notifications based on Amazon Bedrock Guardrails metrics. Use Amazon CloudWatch dashboards to visualize token usage trends across models.
options.C: Deploy an Amazon SQS dead-letter queue for failed requests. Configure an AWS Lambda function to analyze token-related failures. Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights to generate reports on token usage patterns based on error logs from Amazon Bedrock API responses.
options.D: Use Amazon API Gateway to create a proxy for all Amazon Bedrock API calls. Configure request throttling based on custom usage plans with predefined token quotas. Configure API Gateway to reject requests that will exceed token limits.

explain: model-specific token 限制 + 提前告警 + 成本分攤 → Lambda model-specific tokenizer 預估 token + CloudWatch alarm(接近門檻)+ DynamoDB 記錄成本。Guardrails 無 token quota policy(B 為虛構)。
stem_zh: 某金融服務公司透過 Amazon Bedrock 使用多個 foundation models (FMs) 來支援其生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式。為了遵守一項關於在敏感財務資料上使用 GenAI 的新法規，公司需要一個 token 管理解決方案。該 token 管理解決方案必須在應用程式接近模型專屬的 token 上限時主動發出警示。此解決方案還必須每分鐘處理超過 5,000 個請求，並維護 token 使用 metrics 以便將成本分攤到各事業單位。哪一個解決方案可以滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 在 AWS Lambda 函式中開發模型專屬的 tokenizer。設定該 Lambda 函式在將請求送往 Amazon Bedrock 之前估算 token 使用量。設定該 Lambda 函式將 metrics 發布到 Amazon CloudWatch，並在請求接近門檻時觸發警報。將詳細的 token 使用量儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中以報告成本。
options_zh.B: 實作具有 token 配額政策的 Amazon Bedrock Guardrails。擷取遭拒請求的 metrics。設定 Amazon EventBridge 規則，根據 Amazon Bedrock Guardrails 的 metrics 觸發通知。使用 Amazon CloudWatch dashboards 來視覺化跨模型的 token 使用趨勢。
options_zh.C: 為失敗的請求部署一個 Amazon SQS dead-letter queue。設定一個 AWS Lambda 函式來分析與 token 相關的失敗。使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights，根據 Amazon Bedrock API 回應中的錯誤日誌產生 token 使用模式的報告。
options_zh.D: 使用 Amazon API Gateway 為所有 Amazon Bedrock API 呼叫建立一個 proxy。根據具有預定義 token 配額的自訂使用方案來設定請求 throttling。設定 API Gateway 拒絕將超出 token 上限的請求。

stem: A retail company is developing a customer service application that must process 10,000 daily queries about products, orders, and warranties. The application must be able to respond to queries about 50,000 product documents that are updated every day. The application must integrate with an order management API to check the status of orders and to help process returns. The application must maintain context throughout multi-turn interactions with customers. The company must collect complete audit trails for application responses. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Deploy a fine-tuned Amazon Bedrock Anthropic Claude model for each product category. Create AWS Lambda functions to connect each model to the order management API. Store conversation history in Amazon DynamoDB.
options.B: Create a custom model that uses continued pre-training on Amazon Bedrock to handle all product documentation. Set up an Amazon API Gateway REST API that uses AWS Lambda functions to connect the model to the order management API.
options.C: Use Amazon SageMaker AI with containers to deploy models. Use Amazon Kendra to search product documents. Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate calls to the order management API.
options.D: Use an Amazon Bedrock agent with action groups to integrate with the order management API. Associate an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base with the agent to search product documentation by using Retrieval Augmentation Generation (RAG). Enable trace events to capture audit trails.

explain: 多輪 + 每日更新文件(RAG)+ 訂單 API + 稽核 + 最少負擔 → Bedrock agent + action groups(訂單 API)+ Knowledge Base(RAG)+ trace events(稽核)。每日更新用 RAG,不用 fine-tune/continued pre-training(A、B)。
stem_zh: 某零售公司正在開發一個客服應用程式，該應用程式每天必須處理 10,000 個關於產品、訂單與保固的查詢。該應用程式必須能夠回應關於 50,000 份每天都會更新的產品文件的查詢。該應用程式必須與一個訂單管理 API 整合，以查詢訂單狀態並協助處理退貨。該應用程式必須在與客戶的多輪互動過程中維持上下文。公司必須為應用程式的回應收集完整的稽核軌跡。哪一個解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 為每個產品類別部署一個經過微調的 Amazon Bedrock Anthropic Claude 模型。建立 AWS Lambda 函式將每個模型連接到訂單管理 API。將對話歷史儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中。
options_zh.B: 在 Amazon Bedrock 上建立一個使用持續預訓練 (continued pre-training) 的自訂模型來處理所有產品文件。設定一個 Amazon API Gateway REST API，使用 AWS Lambda 函式將模型連接到訂單管理 API。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon SageMaker AI 搭配容器來部署模型。使用 Amazon Kendra 搜尋產品文件。使用 AWS Step Functions 來協調對訂單管理 API 的呼叫。
options_zh.D: 使用具有 action groups 的 Amazon Bedrock agent 來與訂單管理 API 整合。將一個 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base 與該 agent 關聯，以使用檢索增強生成 (Retrieval Augmentation Generation, RAG) 來搜尋產品文件。啟用 trace events 來擷取稽核軌跡。

stem: An ecommerce company is using Amazon Bedrock to build a generative AI (GenAI) application. The application uses AWS Step Functions to orchestrate a multi-agent workflow to produce detailed product descriptions. The workflow consists of three sequential states: a description generator, a technical specifications validator, and a brand voice consistency checker. Each state produces intermediate reasoning traces and outputs that are passed to the next state. The application uses an Amazon S3 bucket for process storage and to store outputs. During testing, the company discovers that outputs between Step Functions states frequently exceed the 256 KB quota and cause workflow failures. A GenAI Developer needs to revise the application architecture to efficiently handle the Step Functions 256 KB quota and maintain workflow observability. The revised architecture must preserve the existing multi-agent reasoning and acting (ReAct) pattern. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Store intermediate outputs in Amazon DynamoDB. Pass only references between states. Create a Map state that retrieves the complete data from DynamoDB when required for each agent's processing step.
options.B: Configure an Amazon Bedrock integration to use the S3 bucket URI in the input parameter for large outputs. Use the ResultPath field and the ResultSelector field to route S3 references between the agent steps while maintaining the sequential validation workflow.
options.C: Use AWS Lambda functions to compress outputs to less than 256 KB before each agent state. Configure each agent task to decompress the outputs before processing and to compress results before passing them to the next state.
options.D: Configure a separate Step Functions state machine to handle each agent's processing. Use Amazon EventBridge to coordinate the execution flow between state machines. Use S3 references for the outputs as event data.

explain: 「Step Functions 256KB 超限 + Bedrock 多代理 + 維持 ReAct + 最少負擔」→ 用 Bedrock 整合的 Input.S3Uri/Output.S3Uri,把大型模型輸入/輸出讀寫到 S3,狀態間只保留 S3 參照(原生機制避開 256KB,無需自建儲存)。〔註:A(DynamoDB 存中間輸出+只傳引用+Map state 取回)是通用解法,但需自建讀寫邏輯負擔較高;壓縮/解壓(C)可能仍超限;拆多狀態機+EventBridge(D)大改架構。〕
stem_zh: 某電子商務公司正在使用 Amazon Bedrock 建構一個生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式。該應用程式使用 AWS Step Functions 來協調一個多 agent 工作流程，以產生詳細的產品說明。該工作流程包含三個依序執行的狀態：說明產生器、技術規格驗證器，以及品牌語氣一致性檢查器。每個狀態都會產生中間推理軌跡與輸出，並傳遞給下一個狀態。該應用程式使用一個 Amazon S3 儲存貯體作為流程儲存與輸出儲存。在測試期間，公司發現 Step Functions 各狀態之間的輸出經常超過 256 KB 配額，導致工作流程失敗。一位 GenAI 開發人員需要修改應用程式架構，以有效處理 Step Functions 的 256 KB 配額並維持工作流程的可觀測性。修改後的架構必須保留現有的多 agent 推理與行動 (ReAct) 模式。哪一個解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 將中間輸出儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中。在狀態之間只傳遞參照。建立一個 Map 狀態，在每個 agent 的處理步驟需要時，從 DynamoDB 擷取完整的資料。
options_zh.B: 設定一個 Amazon Bedrock 整合，在大型輸出的 input 參數中使用 S3 儲存貯體 URI。使用 ResultPath 欄位與 ResultSelector 欄位在 agent 步驟之間路由 S3 參照，同時維持依序驗證的工作流程。
options_zh.C: 使用 AWS Lambda 函式在每個 agent 狀態之前將輸出壓縮到小於 256 KB。設定每個 agent 任務在處理之前解壓縮輸出，並在傳遞給下一個狀態之前壓縮結果。
options_zh.D: 設定一個獨立的 Step Functions 狀態機來處理每個 agent 的處理。使用 Amazon EventBridge 協調各狀態機之間的執行流程。使用 S3 參照作為事件資料中的輸出。

stem: A company provides a service that helps users from around the world discover new restaurants. The service has 50 million monthly active users. The company wants to implement a semantic search solution across a database that contains 20 million restaurants and 200 million reviews. The company currently stores the data in a PostgresQL database. The solution must support complex natural language queries and return results for at least 95% of queries within 500 ms. The solution must maintain data freshness for restaurant details that update hourly. The solution must also scale cost-effectively during peak usage periods. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?

options.A: Migrate the restaurant data to Amazon OpenSearch Service. Implement keyword-based search rules that use custom analyzers and relevance tuning to find restaurants based on attributes such as cuisine type, feature, and location. Create Amazon API Gateway HTTP API endpoints to transform user queries into structured search parameters.
options.B: Migrate the restaurant data to Amazon OpenSearch Service. Use a foundation model (FM) in Amazon Bedrock to generate vector embeddings from restaurant descriptions, reviews, and menu items. When users submit natural language queries, convert the queries to embeddings by using the same FM. Perform k-nearest neighbors (k-NN) searches to find semantically similar results.
options.C: Keep the restaurant data in PostgresQL and implement a pgvector extension. Use a foundation model (FM) in Amazon Bedrock to generate vector embeddings from restaurant data. Store the vector embeddings directly in PostgreSQL. Create an AWS Lambda function to convert natural language queries to vector representations by using the same FM. Configure the Lambda function to perform similarity searches within the database.
options.D: Migrate restaurant data to an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base by using a custom ingestion pipeline. Configure the knowledge base to automatically generate embeddings from restaurant information. Use the Amazon Bedrock Retrieve API with built-in vector search capabilities to query the knowledge base directly by using natural language input.

explain: 語意搜尋 + 超大規模(2000萬/2億)+ <500ms + 最少開發 → OpenSearch + Bedrock embeddings + k-NN。大規模選 OpenSearch;pgvector(C)較適合中小規模。
stem_zh: 某公司提供一項服務，協助全球各地的使用者探索新餐廳。該服務有 5,000 萬個每月活躍使用者。公司希望在一個包含 2,000 萬家餐廳與 2 億則評論的資料庫中實作語意搜尋解決方案。公司目前將資料儲存在一個 PostgreSQL 資料庫中。此解決方案必須支援複雜的自然語言查詢，並在 500 ms 內為至少 95% 的查詢回傳結果。此解決方案必須為每小時更新的餐廳詳細資料維持資料新鮮度。此解決方案還必須在尖峰使用期間具有成本效益地擴展。哪一個解決方案能以最少的開發工作量滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 將餐廳資料遷移到 Amazon OpenSearch Service。實作以關鍵字為基礎的搜尋規則，使用自訂分析器與相關性調校，根據料理類型、特色與地點等屬性來尋找餐廳。建立 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API endpoint，將使用者查詢轉換為結構化的搜尋參數。
options_zh.B: 將餐廳資料遷移到 Amazon OpenSearch Service。使用 Amazon Bedrock 中的 foundation model (FM)，從餐廳說明、評論與菜單項目產生向量 embeddings。當使用者送出自然語言查詢時，使用同一個 FM 將查詢轉換為 embeddings。執行 k-nearest neighbors (k-NN) 搜尋以找出語意相似的結果。
options_zh.C: 將餐廳資料保留在 PostgreSQL 中並實作 pgvector 擴充套件。使用 Amazon Bedrock 中的 foundation model (FM)，從餐廳資料產生向量 embeddings。將向量 embeddings 直接儲存在 PostgreSQL 中。建立一個 AWS Lambda 函式，使用同一個 FM 將自然語言查詢轉換為向量表示。設定該 Lambda 函式在資料庫內執行相似度搜尋。
options_zh.D: 使用自訂的擷取管線將餐廳資料遷移到一個 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base。設定該 knowledge base 自動從餐廳資訊產生 embeddings。使用具有內建向量搜尋功能的 Amazon Bedrock Retrieve API，直接以自然語言輸入來查詢該 knowledge base。

stem: A medical company uses Amazon Bedrock to power a clinical documentation summarization system. The system produces inconsistent summaries when handling complex clinical documents. The system performed well on simple clinical documents. The company needs a solution that diagnoses inconsistencies, compares prompt performance against established metrics, and maintains historical records of prompt versions. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create multiple prompt variants by using Prompt management in Amazon Bedrock. Manually test the prompts with simple clinical documents. Deploy the highest performing version by using the Amazon Bedrock console.
options.B: Implement version control for prompts in a code repository with a test suite that contains complex clinical documents and quantifiable evaluation metrics. Use an automated testing framework to compare prompt versions and document performance patterns.
options.C: Deploy each new prompt version to separate Amazon Bedrock API endpoints. Split production traffic between the endpoints. Configure Amazon CloudWatch to capture response metrics and user feedback for automatic version selection.
options.D: Create a custom prompt evaluation flow in Amazon Bedrock Flows that applies the same clinical document inputs to different prompt variants. Use Amazon Comprehend Medical to analyze and score the factual accuracy of each version.

explain: 診斷不一致 + 比較 prompt 指標 + 版本歷史 → 程式庫版本控制 + 複雜文件測試套件 + 自動化測試框架比較版本。手動測試(A)無法量化;Comprehend Medical(D)不評 prompt 一致性。
stem_zh: 某醫療公司使用 Amazon Bedrock 來支援一個臨床文件摘要系統。該系統在處理複雜的臨床文件時會產生不一致的摘要。該系統在處理簡單的臨床文件時表現良好。公司需要一個能診斷不一致問題、根據既定 metrics 比較 prompt 效能，並維護 prompt 版本歷史記錄的解決方案。哪一個解決方案可以滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon Bedrock 中的 Prompt management 建立多個 prompt 變體。手動使用簡單的臨床文件測試這些 prompt。使用 Amazon Bedrock 主控台部署表現最佳的版本。
options_zh.B: 在程式碼儲存庫中為 prompt 實作版本控制，並建立一個包含複雜臨床文件與可量化評估 metrics 的測試套件。使用自動化測試框架來比較 prompt 版本並記錄效能模式。
options_zh.C: 將每個新的 prompt 版本部署到各自獨立的 Amazon Bedrock API endpoint。在這些 endpoint 之間分流生產流量。設定 Amazon CloudWatch 擷取回應 metrics 與使用者回饋，以自動選擇版本。
options_zh.D: 在 Amazon Bedrock Flows 中建立一個自訂的 prompt 評估流程，將相同的臨床文件輸入套用到不同的 prompt 變體。使用 Amazon Comprehend Medical 來分析並為每個版本的事實準確性評分。

stem: A company uses Amazon Bedrock to generate technical content for customers. The company has recently experienced a surge in hallucination outputs when the company's model generates summaries of long technical documents. The model outputs include inaccurate or fabricated details. The company's current solution uses a large foundation model (FM) with a basic one-shot prompt that includes the full document in a single input. The company needs a solution that will reduce hallucinations and meet factual accuracy goals. The solution must process more than 1,000 documents each hour and deliver summaries within 3 seconds for each document. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Implement zero-shot chain-of-thought (CoT) instructions that require step-by-step reasoning with explicit fact verification before the model generates each summary.
options.B: Use Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) with an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base. Apply semantic chunking and tuned embeddings to ground summaries in source content.
options.C: Configure Amazon Bedrock guardrails to block any generated output that matches patterns that are associated with hallucinated content.
options.D: Increase the temperature parameter in Amazon Bedrock.
options.E: Prompt the Amazon Bedrock model to summarize each full document in one pass.

explain: 降幻覺 → CoT 逐步推理+事實驗證(A)+ RAG 語意分塊接地(B)。提高 temperature(D)增加幻覺;一次整篇(E)即現況問題;guardrails pattern 阻擋(C)不可靠。
stem_zh: 某公司使用 Amazon Bedrock 為客戶產生技術內容。當公司的模型為長篇技術文件產生摘要時，公司最近遇到了 hallucination 輸出激增的情況。模型輸出包含不準確或捏造的細節。公司目前的解決方案使用一個大型 foundation model (FM)，搭配一個將整份文件放在單一輸入中的基本 one-shot prompt。公司需要一個能減少 hallucination 並達成事實準確性目標的解決方案。此解決方案必須每小時處理超過 1,000 份文件，並在 3 秒內為每份文件提供摘要。哪一組解決方案的組合可以滿足這些需求？（選擇兩項。）

options_zh.A: 實作 zero-shot 思維鏈 (chain-of-thought, CoT) 指示，要求模型在產生每份摘要之前進行逐步推理並明確驗證事實。
options_zh.B: 使用檢索增強生成 (Retrieval Augmented Generation, RAG) 搭配一個 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base。套用語意分塊 (semantic chunking) 與調校過的 embeddings，使摘要立基於來源內容。
options_zh.C: 設定 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 來阻擋任何符合與 hallucination 內容相關模式的產生輸出。
options_zh.D: 提高 Amazon Bedrock 中的 temperature 參數。
options_zh.E: 提示 Amazon Bedrock 模型一次性為整份文件產生摘要。

stem: A company has a recommendation system. The system's applications run on Amazon EC2 instances. The applications make API calls to Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs) to analyze customer behavior and generate personalized product recommendations. The system is experiencing intermittent issues. Some recommendations do not match customer preferences. The company needs an observability solution to monitor operational metrics and detect patterns of operational performance degradation compared to established baselines. The solution must also generate alerts with correlation data within 10 minutes when FM behavior deviates from expected patterns. Which solution will meet these requirements?
