options.A: Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights for the application infrastructure. Set up CloudWatch alarms for latency thresholds. Add custom metrics for token counts by using the CloudWatch embedded metric format. Create CloudWatch dashboards to visualize the data.
options.B: Implement AWS X-Ray to trace requests through the application components. Enable CloudWatch Logs Insights for error pattern detection. Set up AWS CloudTrail to monitor all API calls to Amazon Bedrock. Create custom dashboards in Amazon QuickSight.
options.C: Enable Amazon CloudWatch Application Insights for the application resources. Create custom metrics for recommendation quality, token usage, and response latency by using the CloudWatch embedded metric format with dimensions for request types and user segments. Configure CloudWatch anomaly detection on the model metrics. Establish log pattern analysis by using CloudWatch Logs Insights.
options.D: Use Amazon OpenSearch Service with the Observability plugin. Ingest model metrics and logs by using Amazon Kinesis. Create custom Piped Processing Language (PPL) queries to analyze model behavior patterns. Establish operational dashboards to visualize anomalies in real time.

explain: 偵測偏離基準的降級 + 關聯告警 → CloudWatch Application Insights + 自訂指標(含維度)+ anomaly detection(自動基準)+ Logs Insights。anomaly detection 是「偏離基準」的關鍵。
stem_zh: 某公司有一個推薦系統。該系統的應用程式執行於 Amazon EC2 執行個體上。這些應用程式會對 Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs) 進行 API 呼叫，以分析客戶行為並產生個人化的產品推薦。該系統正遇到間歇性問題。有些推薦與客戶偏好不符。公司需要一個可觀測性解決方案，用來監控營運 metrics，並偵測相較於既定基準的營運效能降級模式。此解決方案還必須在 FM 行為偏離預期模式時，於 10 分鐘內產生帶有關聯資料的警示。哪一個解決方案可以滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 為應用程式基礎設施設定 Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights。為延遲門檻設定 CloudWatch 警報。使用 CloudWatch embedded metric format 為 token 計數加入自訂 metrics。建立 CloudWatch dashboards 來視覺化資料。
options_zh.B: 實作 AWS X-Ray 來追蹤通過應用程式各元件的請求。啟用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 來進行錯誤模式偵測。設定 AWS CloudTrail 來監控所有對 Amazon Bedrock 的 API 呼叫。在 Amazon QuickSight 中建立自訂 dashboards。
options_zh.C: 為應用程式資源啟用 Amazon CloudWatch Application Insights。使用 CloudWatch embedded metric format 並搭配請求類型與使用者區隔的維度，為推薦品質、token 使用量與回應延遲建立自訂 metrics。為模型 metrics 設定 CloudWatch anomaly detection。使用 CloudWatch Logs Insights 建立日誌模式分析。
options_zh.D: 使用 Amazon OpenSearch Service 搭配 Observability 外掛。使用 Amazon Kinesis 擷取模型 metrics 與日誌。建立自訂的 Piped Processing Language (PPL) 查詢來分析模型行為模式。建立營運 dashboards 以即時視覺化異常。

stem: An enterprise application uses an Amazon Bedrock foundation model (FM) to process and analyze 50 to 200 pages of technical documents. Users are experiencing inconsistent responses and receiving truncated outputs when processing documents that exceed the FM's context window limits. Which solution will resolve this problem?

options.A: Configure fixed-size chunking at 4,000 tokens for each chunk with 20% overlap. Use application-level logic to link multiple chunks sequentially until the FM's maximum context window of 200,000 tokens is reached before making inference calls.
options.B: Use hierarchical chunking with parent chunks of 8,000 tokens and child chunks of 2,000 tokens. Use Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases built-in retrieval to automatically select relevant parent chunks based on query context. Configure overlap tokens to maintain semantic continuity.
options.C: Use semantic chunking with a breakpoint percentile threshold of 95% and a buffer size of 3 sentences. Use the Amazon Bedrock RetrieveAndGenerate API call to dynamically select the most relevant chunks based on embedding similarity scores.
options.D: Create a pre-processing AWS Lambda function that analyzes document token count by using the FM's tokenizer. Configure the lambda function to split documents into equal segments that fit within 80% of the context window. Configure the Lambda function to process each segment independently before aggregating the results.

explain: 「超出 context window + 截斷/不一致」→ semantic chunking(依語意邊界切塊,保技術概念完整)+ RetrieveAndGenerate API(依嵌入相似度動態只取最相關塊,不塞爆 context window→避免截斷、提升一致性)。〔註:B(hierarchical chunking 父8000/子2000 + Knowledge Bases 內建檢索取相關父塊 + overlap)亦為部分題庫答案;兩者皆用 RAG 取相關塊避免塞滿,屬有爭議題。本題依使用者定案選 C。〕把多塊塞滿到上限(A)仍截斷;等分各段獨立處理(D)割裂脈絡。
stem_zh: 某企業應用程式使用一個 Amazon Bedrock foundation model (FM) 來處理並分析 50 到 200 頁的技術文件。當處理超過 FM 上下文視窗 (context window) 上限的文件時，使用者會遇到不一致的回應並收到被截斷的輸出。哪一個解決方案可以解決這個問題？

options_zh.A: 設定固定大小分塊 (fixed-size chunking)，每個區塊 4,000 個 token 並有 20% 重疊。使用應用程式層級的邏輯，在進行推論呼叫之前依序串接多個區塊，直到達到 FM 的 200,000 個 token 最大上下文視窗為止。
options_zh.B: 使用階層式分塊 (hierarchical chunking)，父區塊 8,000 個 token、子區塊 2,000 個 token。使用 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases 的內建檢索功能，根據查詢上下文自動選擇相關的父區塊。設定重疊 token 以維持語意連貫性。
options_zh.C: 使用語意分塊 (semantic chunking)，斷點百分位門檻為 95%，緩衝區大小為 3 個句子。使用 Amazon Bedrock RetrieveAndGenerate API 呼叫，根據 embedding 相似度分數動態選擇最相關的區塊。
options_zh.D: 建立一個前處理 AWS Lambda 函式，使用 FM 的 tokenizer 分析文件的 token 計數。設定該 Lambda 函式將文件分割成可容納於上下文視窗 80% 以內的等量區段。設定該 Lambda 函式獨立處理每個區段，然後再彙總結果。

stem: A company is developing a generative AI (GenAI) application that analyzes customer service calls in real-time and generates suggested responses for human customer service agents. The application must process 500,000 concurrent calls during peak hours with less than 200 ms end-to-end latency for each suggestion. The company uses existing architecture to transcribe customer call audio streams. The application must not exceed a pre-defined monthly compute budget and must maintain auto scaling capabilities. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy a large, complex reasoning model on Amazon Bedrock. Purchase provisioned throughput and optimize for batch processing.
options.B: Deploy a low-latency, real-time optimized model on Amazon Bedrock. Purchase provisioned throughput and set up automatic scaling policies.
options.C: Deploy a large language model (LLM) on an Amazon SageMaker AI real-time endpoint that uses dedicated GPU instances.
options.D: Deploy a mid-sized language model on an Amazon SageMaker AI serverless endpoint that is optimized for batch processing.

explain: 50萬並發 + <200ms + 預算 + 自動擴展 → 低延遲即時模型 + provisioned throughput + 自動擴展政策。大型推理/批次(A、D)延遲高;GPU 專屬端點(C)成本高。
stem_zh: 某公司正在開發一個生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式，即時分析客服通話並為人工客服專員產生建議回應。該應用程式必須在尖峰時段處理 500,000 個並行通話，且每個建議的端對端延遲必須小於 200 ms。公司使用現有架構來轉錄客戶通話的音訊串流。該應用程式不得超過預先定義的每月運算預算，並且必須維持自動擴展能力。哪一個解決方案可以滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 在 Amazon Bedrock 上部署一個大型、複雜的推理模型。購買 provisioned throughput 並針對批次處理進行最佳化。
options_zh.B: 在 Amazon Bedrock 上部署一個低延遲、針對即時最佳化的模型。購買 provisioned throughput 並設定自動擴展政策。
options_zh.C: 在使用專屬 GPU 執行個體的 Amazon SageMaker AI 即時 endpoint 上部署一個大型語言模型 (LLM)。
options_zh.D: 在針對批次處理最佳化的 Amazon SageMaker AI 無伺服器 endpoint 上部署一個中型語言模型。

stem: An ecommerce company is building an internal platform to develop generative AI applications by using Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs). Developers need to select models based on evaluations that are aligned to ecommerce use cases. The platform must display accuracy metrics for text generation and summarization in dashboards. The company has custom ecommerce datasets to use as standardized evaluation inputs. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

options.A: Import the datasets to an Amazon S3 bucket. Provide appropriate IAM permissions and cross-origin resource sharing (CORS) permissions to give the evaluation jobs access to the datasets.
options.B: Import the datasets to an Amazon S3 bucket. Provide appropriate IAM permissions and a VPC endpoint configuration to give the evaluation jobs access to the datasets.
options.C: Configure an AWS Lambda function to create model evaluation jobs on a schedule in the Amazon Bedrock console. Provide the URI of the S3 bucket that contains the datasets as an input. Configure the evaluation jobs to measure the real world knowledge (RWK) score for text generation and BERT Score for summarization. Configure a second Lambda function to check the status of the jobs and publish custom logs to Amazon CloudWatch. Create a custom Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights dashboard.
options.D: Use Amazon SageMaker Clarify on a schedule to create model evaluation jobs. Use open source frameworks to create and run standardized evaluations. Publish results to Amazon CloudWatch namespaces. Use the word error rate score for text generation and toxicity for summarization as metrics for accuracy. Configure an AWS Lambda function to check the status of the jobs and publish custom logs to CloudWatch. Create a custom Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights dashboard.
options.E: Run an Amazon SageMaker AI notebook job on a schedule by using the fmevals or ragas framework to run evaluations that use the datasets in the S3 bucket. Write Python code in the notebook that makes direct InvokeModel API calls to the FMs and processes their responses for evaluation. Publish job status and results to Amazon CloudWatch Logs to measure the real world knowledge (RWK) score for text generation and toxicity for summarization as metrics for accuracy. Create a custom CloudWatch Logs Insights dashboard.

explain: 資料集到 S3 + IAM/CORS 給評估作業存取(A);Bedrock model evaluation job(內建)+ RWK(文字)/BERTScore(摘要)正確準確度指標 + CloudWatch 儀表板(C)。準確度指標非 word error rate/toxicity(D、E 錯指標)。
stem_zh: 某電子商務公司正在建構一個內部平台，使用 Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs) 來開發生成式 AI 應用程式。開發人員需要根據與電子商務使用情境相符的評估來選擇模型。該平台必須在 dashboards 中顯示文字生成與摘要的準確性 metrics。公司有自訂的電子商務資料集可作為標準化的評估輸入。哪一組步驟的組合能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？（選擇兩項。）

options_zh.A: 將資料集匯入到一個 Amazon S3 儲存貯體。提供適當的 IAM 權限與跨來源資源共用 (CORS) 權限，讓評估作業能存取這些資料集。
options_zh.B: 將資料集匯入到一個 Amazon S3 儲存貯體。提供適當的 IAM 權限與 VPC endpoint 設定，讓評估作業能存取這些資料集。
options_zh.C: 設定一個 AWS Lambda 函式，依排程在 Amazon Bedrock 主控台中建立模型評估作業。提供包含資料集的 S3 儲存貯體 URI 作為輸入。設定評估作業以衡量文字生成的 real world knowledge (RWK) 分數與摘要的 BERT Score。設定第二個 Lambda 函式來檢查作業狀態並將自訂日誌發布到 Amazon CloudWatch。建立一個自訂的 Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights dashboard。
options_zh.D: 依排程使用 Amazon SageMaker Clarify 來建立模型評估作業。使用開源框架來建立並執行標準化評估。將結果發布到 Amazon CloudWatch namespaces。使用 word error rate 分數作為文字生成的準確性 metrics，並使用 toxicity 作為摘要的準確性 metrics。設定一個 AWS Lambda 函式來檢查作業狀態並將自訂日誌發布到 CloudWatch。建立一個自訂的 Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights dashboard。
options_zh.E: 依排程執行一個 Amazon SageMaker AI notebook 作業，使用 fmevals 或 ragas 框架來執行使用 S3 儲存貯體中資料集的評估。在 notebook 中撰寫 Python 程式碼，直接對 FMs 進行 InvokeModel API 呼叫並處理其回應以進行評估。將作業狀態與結果發布到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs，以衡量文字生成的 real world knowledge (RWK) 分數與摘要的 toxicity 作為準確性 metrics。建立一個自訂的 CloudWatch Logs Insights dashboard。

stem: An elevator service company has developed an AI assistant application by using Amazon Bedrock. The application generates elevator maintenance recommendations to support the company's elevator technicians. The company uses Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to collect the elevator sensor data. New regulatory rules require that a human technician must review all AI-generated recommendations. The company needs to establish human oversight workflows to review and approve AI recommendations. The company must store all human technician review decisions for audit purposes. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a custom approval workflow by using AWS Lambda functions and Amazon SQS queues for human review of AI recommendations. Store all review decisions in Amazon DynamoDB for audit purposes.
options.B: Create an AWS Step Functions workflow that has a human approval step that uses the waitForTaskToken API to pause execution. After a human technician completes a review, use an AWS Lambda function to call the SendTaskSuccess API that has the approval decision. Store all review decisions in Amazon DynamoDB.
options.C: Create an AWS Glue workflow that has a human approval step. After the human technician review, integrate the application with an AWS Lambda function that calls the SendTaskSuccess API. Store all human technician review decisions in Amazon DynamoDB.
options.D: Configure Amazon EventBridge rules with custom event patterns to route AI recommendations to human technicians for review. Create AWS Glue jobs to process human technician approval queues. Use Amazon ElastiCache to cache all human technician review decisions.

explain: 人工審批 + 稽核 → Step Functions waitForTaskToken 暫停等人工 + SendTaskSuccess 回傳決策 + DynamoDB 存決策。Glue(C、D)非審批編排;ElastiCache(D)易失不適合稽核。
stem_zh: 某電梯維護公司使用 Amazon Bedrock 開發了一個 AI 助理應用程式。該應用程式產生電梯維護建議，以支援公司的電梯技師。公司使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 來收集電梯感測器資料。新的法規要求人工技師必須審查所有 AI 產生的建議。公司需要建立人工監督工作流程，以審查並核准 AI 建議。公司必須儲存所有人工技師的審查決定以供稽核。哪一個解決方案可以滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 AWS Lambda 函式與 Amazon SQS 佇列建立自訂的核准工作流程，供人工審查 AI 建議。將所有審查決定儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中以供稽核。
options_zh.B: 建立一個 AWS Step Functions 工作流程，其中包含一個使用 waitForTaskToken API 暫停執行的人工核准步驟。在人工技師完成審查後，使用一個 AWS Lambda 函式呼叫帶有核准決定的 SendTaskSuccess API。將所有審查決定儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中。
options_zh.C: 建立一個包含人工核准步驟的 AWS Glue 工作流程。在人工技師審查後，將應用程式與一個呼叫 SendTaskSuccess API 的 AWS Lambda 函式整合。將所有人工技師的審查決定儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中。
options_zh.D: 設定具有自訂事件模式的 Amazon EventBridge 規則，將 AI 建議路由給人工技師審查。建立 AWS Glue 作業來處理人工技師的核准佇列。使用 Amazon ElastiCache 來快取所有人工技師的審查決定。

stem: A bank is building a generative AI (GenAI) application that uses Amazon Bedrock to assess loan applications by using scanned financial documents. The application must extract structured data from the documents. The application must redact personally identifiable information (PII) before inference. The application must use foundation models (FMs) to generate approvals. The application must route low-confidence document extraction results to human reviewers who are within the same AWS Region as the loan applicant. The company must ensure that the application complies with strict Regional data residency and auditability requirements. The application must be able to scale to handle 25,000 applications each day and provide 99.9% availability. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.A: Deploy Amazon Textract and Amazon Augmented AI (Amazon A2I) within the same Region to extract relevant data from the scanned documents. Route low-confidence pages to human reviewers.
options.B: Use AWS Lambda functions to detect and redact PII from submitted documents before inference. Apply Amazon Bedrock guardrails to prevent inappropriate or unauthorized content in model outputs. Configure Region-specific IAM roles to enforce data residency requirements and to control access to the extracted data.
options.C: Use Amazon Kendra and Amazon OpenSearch Service to extract field level values semantically from the uploaded documents before inference.
options.D: Store uploaded documents in Amazon S3 and apply object metadata. Configure IAM policies to store original documents within the same Region as each applicant. Enable object tagging for future audits.
options.E: Use AWS Glue Data Quality to validate the structured document data. Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate a review workflow that includes a prompt engineering step that transforms validated data into optimized prompts before invoking Amazon Bedrock to assess loan applications.
options.F: Use Amazon SageMaker Clarify to generate fairness and bias reports based on model scoring decisions that Amazon Bedrock makes.

explain: 掃描文件抽取+低信心人工審(同區)→ Textract + A2I 同區(A);去 PII + Guardrails + 區域 IAM 強制駐留(B);S3 存原件 + 區域 IAM + 物件標記稽核(D)。Kendra 抽欄位(C)非用途;Clarify(F)非必要。
stem_zh: 某銀行正在建構一個生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式，使用 Amazon Bedrock 透過掃描的財務文件來評估貸款申請。該應用程式必須從文件中擷取結構化資料。該應用程式必須在推論之前遮蔽個人可識別資訊 (PII)。該應用程式必須使用 foundation models (FMs) 來產生核准。該應用程式必須將低信心度的文件擷取結果路由給與貸款申請人位於同一 AWS Region 的人工審查員。公司必須確保該應用程式遵守嚴格的 Region 資料落地與可稽核性要求。該應用程式必須能夠擴展以每天處理 25,000 件申請，並提供 99.9% 的可用性。哪一組解決方案的組合可以滿足這些需求？（選擇三項。）

options_zh.A: 在同一個 Region 內部署 Amazon Textract 與 Amazon Augmented AI (Amazon A2I)，以從掃描的文件中擷取相關資料。將低信心度的頁面路由給人工審查員。
options_zh.B: 使用 AWS Lambda 函式在推論之前偵測並遮蔽提交文件中的 PII。套用 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 以防止模型輸出中出現不當或未經授權的內容。設定 Region 專屬的 IAM 角色以強制執行資料落地要求並控制對已擷取資料的存取。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon Kendra 與 Amazon OpenSearch Service，在推論之前從上傳的文件中以語意方式擷取欄位層級的值。
options_zh.D: 將上傳的文件儲存在 Amazon S3 中並套用物件中繼資料。設定 IAM 政策，將原始文件儲存在與每位申請人相同的 Region 內。啟用物件標記 (object tagging) 以供未來稽核。
options_zh.E: 使用 AWS Glue Data Quality 來驗證結構化的文件資料。使用 AWS Step Functions 來協調一個審查工作流程，其中包含一個 prompt engineering 步驟，將已驗證的資料轉換為最佳化的 prompt，然後再呼叫 Amazon Bedrock 來評估貸款申請。
options_zh.F: 使用 Amazon SageMaker Clarify，根據 Amazon Bedrock 所做的模型評分決定產生公平性與偏差報告。

stem: A software company is using Amazon Q Business to build an AI assistant that allows employees to access company information and personal information by using natural language prompts. The company stores this information in an Amazon S3 bucket. Each department in the company has a dedicated prefix in the S3 bucket. Each object name includes the S3 prefix of the department that it belongs to. Each department can belong to only a single group in AWS IAM Identity Center. Each employee belongs to a single department. The company configures Amazon Q Business to access data stored in an S3 bucket as a data source. The company needs to ensure that the AI assistant respects access controls based on the user's IAM Identity Center group membership. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create a JSON file named acl.json in each department folder. In each file, create access control entries that specify the IAM Identity Center group that should have access to that department's data. Indicate the location of the JSON file in the Access Control section of the data source settings.
options.B: Create a single JSON file named acl.json at the top level of the S3 bucket. Add access control entries that map each department's S3 prefix to its corresponding IAM Identity Center group. Indicate the location of the JSON file in the Access Control section of the data source settings.
options.C: For each IAM Identity Center group, create a separate permissions set that denies access to all prefixes in the S3 bucket. Add a StringNotEquals condition key to the permissions set for each group that specifies the department each group is associated with. Attach the permissions sets to the Identity Center groups.
options.D: Create a metadata file named metadata.json at the top level of the S3 bucket. Add an AccessControlList object to the file that specifies the S3 path of each department's prefix. Specify the IAM Identity Center group that should have access to each department's prefix. Reference the file location in the data source metadata settings.

explain: 「Q Business 依群組做存取控制 + 最少負擔」→ 桶頂層放「單一 ACL 設定檔」,每個 entry 把一個 S3 prefix 對應到 IAM Identity Center 群組,在資料源 Access Control 指定該檔路徑(集中一處維護,最省;結構天然適合 prefix→group 映射)。〔註:A(每個部門資料夾各放 acl.json)亦為部分題庫答案;兩者皆用 ACL 檔做文件層級控制,屬有爭議題。本題依使用者定案選 B。〕permissions set(C)是 AWS 資源權限非 Q Business 文件層級檢索控制;metadata.json 的 ACL(D)非正確強制機制。
stem_zh: 某軟體公司正在使用 Amazon Q Business 建構一個 AI 助理，讓員工能透過自然語言 prompt 存取公司資訊與個人資訊。公司將這些資訊儲存在一個 Amazon S3 儲存貯體中。公司的每個部門在該 S3 儲存貯體中都有一個專屬的字首 (prefix)。每個物件名稱都包含其所屬部門的 S3 字首。每個部門在 AWS IAM Identity Center 中只能隸屬於單一群組。每位員工只隸屬於單一部門。公司將 Amazon Q Business 設定為以 S3 儲存貯體中儲存的資料作為資料來源。公司需要確保該 AI 助理會根據使用者的 IAM Identity Center 群組成員資格來遵守存取控制。哪一個解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這項需求？

options_zh.A: 在每個部門資料夾中建立一個名為 acl.json 的 JSON 檔案。在每個檔案中建立存取控制項目，指定應該有權存取該部門資料的 IAM Identity Center 群組。在資料來源設定的 Access Control 區段中指明該 JSON 檔案的位置。
options_zh.B: 在 S3 儲存貯體的最上層建立單一一個名為 acl.json 的 JSON 檔案。加入存取控制項目，將每個部門的 S3 字首對應到其相對應的 IAM Identity Center 群組。在資料來源設定的 Access Control 區段中指明該 JSON 檔案的位置。
options_zh.C: 為每個 IAM Identity Center 群組建立一個獨立的權限集 (permissions set)，拒絕存取 S3 儲存貯體中的所有字首。為每個群組的權限集加入一個 StringNotEquals 條件鍵，指定該群組所關聯的部門。將這些權限集附加到 Identity Center 群組。
options_zh.D: 在 S3 儲存貯體的最上層建立一個名為 metadata.json 的中繼資料檔案。在該檔案中加入一個 AccessControlList 物件，指定每個部門字首的 S3 路徑。指定應該有權存取每個部門字首的 IAM Identity Center 群組。在資料來源的中繼資料設定中參照該檔案位置。

stem: A healthcare company is using Amazon Bedrock to build a system to help practitioners make clinical decisions. The system must provide treatment recommendations to physicians based only on approved medical documentation and must cite specific sources. The system must not hallucinate or produce factually incorrect information. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Integrate Amazon Bedrock with Amazon Kendra to retrieve approved documents. Implement custom post-processing to compare generated responses against source documents and to include citations.
options.B: Deploy an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base and connect it to approved clinical source documents. Use the Amazon Bedrock RetrieveAndGenerate API to return citations from the knowledge base.
options.C: Use Amazon Bedrock and Amazon Comprehend Medical to extract medical entities. Implement verification logic against a medical terminology database.
options.D: Use an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base with Retrieve API calls and InvokeModel API calls to retrieve approved clinical source documents. Implement verification logic to compare against retrieved sources and to cite sources.

explain: 只用核准文件 + 引用來源 + 不幻覺 + 最少負擔 → Bedrock Knowledge Base + RetrieveAndGenerate API(單一 API 含檢索+生成+引用)。Retrieve+InvokeModel 自組(D)或自建後處理(A)負擔較高。
stem_zh: 某醫療保健公司正在使用 Amazon Bedrock 建構一個協助執業醫師做出臨床決策的系統。該系統必須僅根據經核准的醫療文件向醫師提供治療建議，並且必須引用特定來源。該系統不得產生 hallucination 或產出事實錯誤的資訊。哪一個解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 將 Amazon Bedrock 與 Amazon Kendra 整合以擷取經核准的文件。實作自訂的後處理，將產生的回應與來源文件比對並加入引用來源。
options_zh.B: 部署一個 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base 並將其連接到經核准的臨床來源文件。使用 Amazon Bedrock RetrieveAndGenerate API 從 knowledge base 回傳引用來源。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon Bedrock 與 Amazon Comprehend Medical 來擷取醫療實體。實作針對一個醫療術語資料庫進行比對的驗證邏輯。
options_zh.D: 使用一個 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base，搭配 Retrieve API 呼叫與 InvokeModel API 呼叫來擷取經核准的臨床來源文件。實作驗證邏輯，以與擷取到的來源進行比對並引用來源。

stem: A financial services company is developing a real-time generative AI (GenAI) assistant to support human call center agents. The GenAI assistant must transcribe live customer speech, analyze context, and provide incremental suggestions to call center agents while a customer is still speaking. To preserve responsiveness, the GenAI assistant must maintain end-to-end latency under 1 second from speech to initial response display. The architecture must use only managed AWS services and must support bidirectional streaming to ensure that call center agents receive updates in real time. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use the Amazon Transcribe streaming API to transcribe calls. Pass the text to Amazon Comprehend to perform sentiment analysis. Feed the results to Anthropic Claude on Amazon Bedrock by using the InvokeModel API. Store results in Amazon DynamoDB. Use a WebSocket API to display the results.
options.B: Use Amazon Transcribe streaming with partial results enabled to deliver fragments of transcribed text before customers finish speaking. Forward text fragments to Amazon Bedrock by using the InvokeModelWithResponseStream API. Stream responses to call center agents through an Amazon API Gateway WebSocket API.
options.C: Use Amazon Transcribe batch processing to convert calls to text. Pass complete transcripts to Anthropic Claude on Amazon Bedrock by using the ConverseStream API. Return responses through an Amazon Lex chatbot interface that call center agents can access from their work computers.
options.D: Use the Amazon Transcribe streaming API with an AWS Lambda function to transcribe each audio segment. Configure the Lambda function to call the Amazon Titan Embeddings model on Amazon Bedrock by using the InvokeModel API. Configure the Lambda function to publish results to an Amazon SNS topic. Subscribe the call center agents to the SNS topic.

explain: 即時逐步建議 + <1s + 雙向串流 → Transcribe streaming(partial results,說話中即出片段)+ InvokeModelWithResponseStream + WebSocket。batch(C)非即時;Titan Embeddings(D)是嵌入非建議生成。
stem_zh: 某金融服務公司正在開發一個即時生成式 AI (GenAI) 助理，以支援人工客服中心專員。該 GenAI 助理必須即時轉錄客戶的語音、分析上下文，並在客戶仍在說話時為客服中心專員提供漸進式的建議。為了維持回應速度，該 GenAI 助理必須將從語音到初始回應顯示的端對端延遲維持在 1 秒以下。該架構必須僅使用受管理的 AWS 服務，並且必須支援雙向串流，以確保客服中心專員能即時收到更新。哪一個解決方案可以滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon Transcribe streaming API 來轉錄通話。將文字傳遞給 Amazon Comprehend 以執行情感分析。使用 InvokeModel API 將結果送入 Amazon Bedrock 上的 Anthropic Claude。將結果儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中。使用一個 WebSocket API 來顯示結果。
options_zh.B: 使用啟用部分結果 (partial results) 的 Amazon Transcribe streaming，在客戶說完之前就傳遞已轉錄文字的片段。使用 InvokeModelWithResponseStream API 將文字片段轉發給 Amazon Bedrock。透過一個 Amazon API Gateway WebSocket API 將回應串流給客服中心專員。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon Transcribe 批次處理將通話轉換為文字。使用 ConverseStream API 將完整的逐字稿傳遞給 Amazon Bedrock 上的 Anthropic Claude。透過一個客服中心專員可從其工作電腦存取的 Amazon Lex 聊天機器人介面回傳回應。
options_zh.D: 使用 Amazon Transcribe streaming API 搭配一個 AWS Lambda 函式來轉錄每個音訊片段。設定該 Lambda 函式使用 InvokeModel API 呼叫 Amazon Bedrock 上的 Amazon Titan Embeddings 模型。設定該 Lambda 函式將結果發布到一個 Amazon SNS 主題。讓客服中心專員訂閱該 SNS 主題。

stem: A media company is launching a platform that allows thousands of users every hour to upload images and text content. The platform uses Amazon Bedrock to process the uploaded content to generate creative compositions. The company needs a solution to ensure that the platform does not process or produce inappropriate content. The platform must not expose personally identifiable information (PII) in the compositions. The solution must integrate with the company's existing Amazon S3 storage workflow. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST infrastructure management overhead?

options.A: Enable the Enhanced Monitoring tool. Use an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to filter traffic to the platform. Use Amazon Comprehend PII detection to pre-process the data. Create a CloudWatch alarm to monitor for Amazon Comprehend PII detection events. Create an AWS Step Functions workflow that includes an Amazon Rekognition image moderation step.
options.B: Use an Amazon API Gateway HTTP API with request validation templates to screen content before storing the uploaded content in Amazon S3. Use Amazon SageMaker AI to build custom content moderation models that process content before sending the processed content to Amazon Bedrock.
options.C: Create an Amazon Cognito user pool that uses pre-authentication AWS Lambda functions to run content moderation checks. Use Amazon Textract to filter text content and Amazon Rekognition to filter image content before allowing users to upload content to the platform.
options.D: Create an AWS Step Functions workflow that uses built-in Amazon Bedrock guardrails to filter content. Use Amazon Comprehend PII detection to pre-process the content. Use Amazon Rekognition image moderation.

explain: 不當內容(文+圖)+ PII + 整合 S3 + 最少負擔 → Step Functions + Bedrock guardrails(文字)+ Comprehend PII + Rekognition 圖片審查。自建 SageMaker 審查模型(B)負擔高;Textract 是 OCR 非審查(C)。
stem_zh: 某媒體公司正在推出一個平台，讓每小時數以千計的使用者上傳圖片與文字內容。該平台使用 Amazon Bedrock 處理上傳的內容以產生創意作品。公司需要一個解決方案來確保該平台不會處理或產出不當內容。該平台不得在創意作品中暴露個人可識別資訊 (PII)。此解決方案必須與公司現有的 Amazon S3 儲存工作流程整合。哪一個解決方案能以最少的基礎設施管理負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 啟用 Enhanced Monitoring 工具。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 警報來篩選流向平台的流量。使用 Amazon Comprehend PII 偵測來前處理資料。建立一個 CloudWatch 警報來監控 Amazon Comprehend PII 偵測事件。建立一個包含 Amazon Rekognition 圖片內容審核步驟的 AWS Step Functions 工作流程。
options_zh.B: 使用具有請求驗證範本的 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API，在將上傳的內容儲存到 Amazon S3 之前篩選內容。使用 Amazon SageMaker AI 建構自訂的內容審核模型，在將處理後的內容送往 Amazon Bedrock 之前先處理內容。
options_zh.C: 建立一個 Amazon Cognito 使用者集區，使用預先驗證 (pre-authentication) 的 AWS Lambda 函式來執行內容審核檢查。使用 Amazon Textract 篩選文字內容，並使用 Amazon Rekognition 篩選圖片內容，然後才允許使用者將內容上傳到平台。
options_zh.D: 建立一個 AWS Step Functions 工作流程，使用內建的 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 來篩選內容。使用 Amazon Comprehend PII 偵測來前處理內容。使用 Amazon Rekognition 圖片內容審核。

stem: A company has set up Amazon Q Developer Pro licenses for all developers at the company. The company maintains a list of approved resources that developers must use when developing applications. The approved resources include internal libraries, proprietary algorithmic techniques, and sample code with approved styling. A new team of developers is using Amazon Q Developer to develop a new Java-based application. The company must ensure that the new developer team uses the company's approved resources. The company does not want to make project-level modifications. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a Git repository that contains all of the approved internal libraries, algorithms, and code samples. Include this Git repository in the application project locally as part of the workspace. Ensure that the developers use the @workspace context to retrieve suggestions from the Git repository.
options.B: In the project root folder, create a folder named .amazonq/rules. Add the approved internal libraries, algorithms, and code samples to the folder.
options.C: Create a folder in the application project named rules. Store the guidelines and code in the folder for Amazon Q Developer to reference product code suggestions.
options.D: Create an Amazon Q Developer customization that includes the approved data sources. Ensure that the developers use the customization to develop the application.

explain: 公司核准資源 + 不做專案層修改 → Amazon Q Developer customization(集中納入核准資料源,跨開發者套用)。A、B、C 都是專案層(workspace/資料夾)修改,違反需求。
stem_zh: 某公司已為公司內所有開發人員設定 Amazon Q Developer Pro 授權。該公司維護了一份已核准資源清單，開發人員在開發應用程式時必須使用這些資源。已核准資源包括內部函式庫、專有的演算法技術，以及具有已核准樣式的範例程式碼。一個新的開發團隊正在使用 Amazon Q Developer 開發一個全新的 Java 應用程式。該公司必須確保這個新的開發團隊使用公司的已核准資源。該公司不希望進行專案層級的修改。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 建立一個包含所有已核准內部函式庫、演算法與程式碼範例的 Git repository。將此 Git repository 在本地納入應用程式專案中作為 workspace 的一部分。確保開發人員使用 @workspace context 從該 Git repository 取得建議。
options_zh.B: 在專案根資料夾中，建立一個名為 .amazonq/rules 的資料夾。將已核准的內部函式庫、演算法與程式碼範例加入此資料夾。
options_zh.C: 在應用程式專案中建立一個名為 rules 的資料夾。將指引與程式碼存放在該資料夾中，供 Amazon Q Developer 參考以產生程式碼建議。
options_zh.D: 建立一個包含已核准資料來源的 Amazon Q Developer customization。確保開發人員使用該 customization 來開發應用程式。

stem: An ecommerce company is using Amazon Bedrock to build a customer service AI assistant. The AI assistant needs to process over 50,000 customer inquiries every day. The AI assistant occasionally experiences traffic spikes of up to 150,000 inquiries every day during promotional events. Analysis shows that 40% of inquiries follow similar patterns that share the same context. A GenAI developer must design a solution that will ensure low latency and consistent performance for the AI assistant during traffic spikes. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Configure latency-optimized inference by setting the latency parameter to optimized in the performance configuration of the request to Amazon Bedrock. Use prompt caching to handle the repetitive inquiries.
options.B: Purchase provisioned throughput and model units (MUs) that are sized to handle peak traffic loads. Use Amazon ElastiCache (Redis OSS) to cache repetitive inquiries.
options.C: Use Amazon Bedrock Agents and custom knowledge bases to pre-process customer inquiries. Configure cross-Region inference to distribute traffic.
options.D: Use AWS Lambda functions to pre-process requests by using a custom prompt routing mechanism. Use Amazon DynamoDB as a caching layer to handle frequently asked questions.

explain: 低延遲 + 流量激增 + 40%重複 + 最省成本 → latency-optimized inference + prompt caching(重複 context)。為尖峰買固定 provisioned(B)離峰浪費,不夠省。
stem_zh: 某電子商務公司正使用 Amazon Bedrock 建置客戶服務 AI 助理。該 AI 助理每天需要處理超過 50,000 筆客戶詢問。在促銷活動期間，該 AI 助理偶爾會經歷高達每天 150,000 筆詢問的流量尖峰。分析顯示，40% 的詢問遵循相似的模式，且共用相同的 context。一位 GenAI 開發人員必須設計一個解決方案，以確保該 AI 助理在流量尖峰期間維持低延遲與一致的效能。哪個解決方案能以最具成本效益的方式滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 在向 Amazon Bedrock 發出的請求的 performance configuration 中，將 latency 參數設定為 optimized，以設定 latency-optimized inference。使用 prompt caching 來處理重複性的詢問。
options_zh.B: 購買足以處理尖峰流量負載的 provisioned throughput 與 model units (MUs)。使用 Amazon ElastiCache (Redis OSS) 快取重複性的詢問。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Agents 與自訂 knowledge bases 來預先處理客戶詢問。設定 cross-Region inference 以分散流量。
options_zh.D: 使用 AWS Lambda functions，透過自訂的 prompt routing 機制預先處理請求。使用 Amazon DynamoDB 作為快取層來處理常見問題。

stem: A legal research company has a Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) application that uses Amazon Bedrock and Amazon OpenSearch Service. The application stores 768-dimensional vector embeddings for 15 million legal documents, including statutes, court rulings, and case summaries. The company's current chunking strategy segments text into fixed-length blocks of 500 tokens. The current chunking strategy often splits contextually linked information such as legal arguments, court opinions, or statute references across separate chunks. Researchers report that generated outputs frequently omit key context or cite outdated legal information. Recent application logs show a 40% increase in response times. The p95 latency metric exceeds 2 seconds. The company expects storage needs for the application to grow from 90 GB to 360 GB within a year. The company needs a solution to improve retrieval relevance and system performance at scale. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Increase the embedding vector dimensionality from 768 to 4,096 without changing the existing chunking or pre-processing strategy.
options.B: Replace dynamic retrieval with static, pre-written summaries that are stored in Amazon S3. Use Amazon CloudFront to serve the summaries to reduce compute demand and improve predictability.
options.C: Update the chunking strategy to use semantic boundaries such as complete legal arguments, clauses, or sections rather than fixed token limits. Regenerate vector embeddings to align with the new chunk structure.
options.D: Migrate from OpenSearch Service to Amazon DynamoDB. Implement keyword-based indexes to enable faster lookups for legal concepts.

explain: 固定分塊切斷語意 → 改語意邊界分塊(完整論點/條款/章節)+ 重新生成嵌入。加大維度(A)不解決分塊問題且更慢;靜態摘要(B)失動態檢索;DynamoDB keyword(D)失語意。
stem_zh: 某法律研究公司有一個使用 Amazon Bedrock 與 Amazon OpenSearch Service 的檢索增強生成 (Retrieval Augmented Generation, RAG) 應用程式。該應用程式為 1,500 萬份法律文件（包括法規、法院判決與案例摘要）儲存 768 維的 vector embeddings。該公司目前的 chunking 策略將文字切割為固定長度的 500 個 token 區塊。目前的 chunking 策略經常將具有上下文關聯的資訊（例如法律論點、法院意見或法規引用）切割到不同的 chunk 中。研究人員回報，生成的輸出經常遺漏關鍵 context 或引用過時的法律資訊。最近的應用程式日誌顯示回應時間增加了 40%。p95 latency 指標超過 2 秒。該公司預期此應用程式的儲存需求將在一年內從 90 GB 成長至 360 GB。該公司需要一個解決方案，以在大規模情況下改善檢索相關性與系統效能。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 在不改變現有 chunking 或前處理策略的情況下，將 embedding vector 的維度從 768 增加到 4,096。
options_zh.B: 以儲存在 Amazon S3 中的靜態、預先撰寫的摘要取代動態檢索。使用 Amazon CloudFront 提供這些摘要，以降低運算需求並改善可預測性。
options_zh.C: 更新 chunking 策略，使用語意邊界（例如完整的法律論點、條款或章節）而非固定的 token 限制。重新產生 vector embeddings 以配合新的 chunk 結構。
options_zh.D: 從 OpenSearch Service 遷移至 Amazon DynamoDB。實作以關鍵字為基礎的索引，以加快法律概念的查詢速度。

stem: A company is developing a generative AI (GenAI)-powered customer support application that uses Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs). The application must maintain conversational context across multiple interactions with the same user. The application must run clarification workflows to handle ambiguous user queries. The company must store encrypted records of each user conversation to use for personalization. The application must be able to handle thousands of concurrent users while responding to each user quickly. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use an AWS Step Functions Express workflow to orchestrate conversation flow. Invoke AWS Lambda functions to run clarification logic. Store conversation history in Amazon RDS and use session IDs as the primary key.
options.B: Use an AWS Step Functions Standard workflow to orchestrate clarification workflows. Include Wait for a Callback patterns to manage the workflows. Store conversation history in Amazon DynamoDPurchase on-demand capacity and configure server-side encryption.
options.C: Deploy the application by using an Amazon API Gateway REST API to route user requests to an AWS Lambda function to update and retrieve conversation context. Store conversation history in Amazon S3 and configure server-side encryption. Save each interaction as a separate JSON file.
options.D: Use AWS Lambda functions to call Amazon Bedrock inference APIs. Use Amazon SQS queues to orchestrate clarification steps. Store conversation history in an Amazon ElastiCache (Redis OSS) cluster. Configure encryption at rest.

explain: 澄清流程(需暫停等使用者回覆)+ 加密 + 高並發 → Step Functions Standard + Wait for Callback(等回覆)+ DynamoDB on-demand + SSE。Express(A)不支援長暫停等待回呼;ElastiCache(D)易失不適合持久記錄。
stem_zh: 某公司正在開發一個由生成式 AI (GenAI) 驅動的客戶支援應用程式，該程式使用 Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs)。該應用程式必須在與同一位使用者的多次互動中維持對話 context。該應用程式必須執行釐清工作流程以處理模糊的使用者查詢。該公司必須儲存每位使用者對話的加密記錄，以用於個人化。該應用程式必須能夠處理數千名並行使用者，同時快速回應每位使用者。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 AWS Step Functions Express workflow 來協調對話流程。呼叫 AWS Lambda functions 執行釐清邏輯。將對話歷史儲存在 Amazon RDS 中，並使用 session ID 作為主鍵。
options_zh.B: 使用 AWS Step Functions Standard workflow 來協調釐清工作流程。納入 Wait for a Callback 模式來管理這些工作流程。將對話歷史儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中。購買 on-demand capacity 並設定 server-side encryption。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon API Gateway REST API 部署該應用程式，以將使用者請求路由至一個用於更新與檢索對話 context 的 AWS Lambda function。將對話歷史儲存在 Amazon S3 中並設定 server-side encryption。將每次互動儲存為各自獨立的 JSON 檔案。
options_zh.D: 使用 AWS Lambda functions 呼叫 Amazon Bedrock inference API。使用 Amazon SQS queues 來協調釐清步驟。將對話歷史儲存在 Amazon ElastiCache (Redis OSS) 叢集中。設定 encryption at rest。

stem: A financial services company needs to pre-process unstructured data such as customer transcripts, financial reports, and documentation. The company stores the unstructured data in Amazon S3 to support an Amazon Bedrock application. The company must validate data quality, create auditable metadata, monitor data metrics, and customize text chunking to optimize foundation model (FM) performance. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?

options.A: Use Amazon SageMaker Data Wrangler to create a data flow. Configure Amazon CloudWatch metrics and alarms to monitor data quality. Use a custom AWS Lambda function to pre-process the data. Load processed data into Amazon Bedrock.
options.B: Set up an AWS Glue crawler to catalog data sources. Create AWS Glue ETL jobs to run custom transformation scripts. Use AWS Glue Data Quality to validate and monitor data quality. Load processed data into Amazon Bedrock.
options.C: Use Amazon Comprehend to extract entities. Create an AWS Lambda function to chunk text. Run Amazon Athena to query and validate data quality. Load processed data into Amazon Bedrock.
options.D: Create an AWS Step Functions workflow to orchestrate data pre-processing tasks. Run custom code on Amazon EC2 instances to process the data. Use Amazon SageMaker Model Monitor to monitor data quality. Load processed data into Amazon Bedrock.

explain: 資料品質驗證 + 可稽核 metadata + 監控 + 自訂分塊 + 最少開發 → Glue crawler(編目)+ ETL(轉換/分塊)+ Glue Data Quality(驗證/監控)。SageMaker Model Monitor(D)是模型監控非資料品質。
stem_zh: 某金融服務公司需要前處理非結構化資料，例如客戶逐字稿、財務報告與文件。該公司將非結構化資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中，以支援一個 Amazon Bedrock 應用程式。該公司必須驗證資料品質、建立可稽核的 metadata、監控資料 metrics，並自訂文字 chunking 以最佳化 foundation model (FM) 的效能。哪個解決方案能以最少的開發工作量滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon SageMaker Data Wrangler 建立 data flow。設定 Amazon CloudWatch metrics 與 alarms 以監控資料品質。使用自訂的 AWS Lambda function 前處理資料。將處理後的資料載入 Amazon Bedrock。
options_zh.B: 設定 AWS Glue crawler 以編目資料來源。建立 AWS Glue ETL jobs 以執行自訂的轉換腳本。使用 AWS Glue Data Quality 來驗證與監控資料品質。將處理後的資料載入 Amazon Bedrock。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon Comprehend 擷取實體。建立一個 AWS Lambda function 來切割文字。執行 Amazon Athena 以查詢並驗證資料品質。將處理後的資料載入 Amazon Bedrock。
options_zh.D: 建立一個 AWS Step Functions workflow 以協調資料前處理任務。在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行自訂程式碼以處理資料。使用 Amazon SageMaker Model Monitor 監控資料品質。將處理後的資料載入 Amazon Bedrock。

stem: A company uses Amazon Bedrock to build a Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) system. The RAG system uses an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base that is based on an Amazon S3 bucket as the data source for emergency news video content. The system retrieves transcripts, archived reports, and related documents from the S3 bucket. The RAG system uses state-of-the-art embedding models and a high-performing retrieval setup. However, users report slow responses and irrelevant results, which cause decreased user satisfaction. The company notices that vector searches are evaluating too many documents across too many content types and over long periods of time. The company determines that the underlying models will not benefit from additional fine tuning. The company must improve retrieval accuracy by applying smarter constraints. The company wants a solution that requires minimal changes to the existing architecture. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Enhance embeddings by using a domain-adapted model that is specifically trained on emergency news content for improved vector similarity.
options.B: Migrate to Amazon OpenSearch Service. Use vector fields and metadata filters to define the scope of results retrieval.
options.C: Enable metadata-aware filtering within the Amazon Bedrock knowledge base by indexing S3 object metadata.
options.D: Migrate to an Amazon Q Business index to perform structured metadata filtering and document categorization during retrieval.

explain: 評估太多文件/類型/時間 + 最少改動 → 在現有 Bedrock Knowledge Base 啟用 metadata-aware filtering(索引 S3 object metadata 縮小範圍)。遷移 OpenSearch(B)/Q Business(D)改動大;domain 模型(A)題目已排除 fine-tune。
stem_zh: 某公司使用 Amazon Bedrock 建置一個檢索增強生成 (Retrieval Augmented Generation, RAG) 系統。該 RAG 系統使用一個以 Amazon S3 儲存貯體為基礎的 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base 作為緊急新聞影片內容的資料來源。該系統從該 S3 儲存貯體檢索逐字稿、封存報告與相關文件。該 RAG 系統使用最先進的 embedding 模型與高效能的檢索設定。然而，使用者回報回應緩慢且結果不相關，導致使用者滿意度下降。該公司注意到 vector searches 正在跨越過多的內容類型、橫跨很長的時間區間，並評估過多的文件。該公司判定底層模型無法從額外的 fine tuning 中獲益。該公司必須透過套用更聰明的限制條件來改善檢索準確度。該公司希望解決方案對現有架構的變動最小。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用專門針對緊急新聞內容訓練的領域適應模型來強化 embeddings，以改善 vector 相似度。
options_zh.B: 遷移至 Amazon OpenSearch Service。使用 vector fields 與 metadata filters 來定義結果檢索的範圍。
options_zh.C: 透過為 S3 物件 metadata 建立索引，在 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base 中啟用 metadata 感知的篩選。
options_zh.D: 遷移至 Amazon Q Business 索引，以在檢索期間執行結構化的 metadata 篩選與文件分類。

stem: A financial services company is creating a Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) application that uses Amazon Bedrock to generate summaries of market activities. The application relies on a vector database that stores a small proprietary dataset that has a low index count. The application must perform similarity searches. The Amazon Bedrock model's responses must maximize accuracy and maintain high performance. The company needs to configure the vector database and integrate it with the application. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Launch an Amazon MemoryDB cluster and configure the index by using the Flat algorithm. Configure a horizontal scaling policy based on performance metrics.
options.B: Launch an Amazon MemoryDB cluster and configure the index by using the Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW) algorithm. Configure a vertical policy based on performance metrics.
options.C: Launch an Amazon Aurora PostgresSQL cluster and configure the index by using the Inverted File with Flat Compression (IVFFlat) algorithm. Configure the instance class to scale to a larger size when the load increases.
options.D: Launch an Amazon DocumentDB cluster that has an Inverted File with Flat Compression (IVFFlat) index and a high probe value. Configure connections to the cluster as a replica set Distribute reads to replica instances.

explain: 小型資料集 + 低索引數 + 最大準確 → Flat 演算法(精確最近鄰,小資料最準)。HNSW/IVFFlat(B、C、D)是近似 ANN,適合大規模但犧牲精確度。
stem_zh: 某金融服務公司正在建立一個檢索增強生成 (Retrieval Augmented Generation, RAG) 應用程式，該程式使用 Amazon Bedrock 來產生市場活動摘要。該應用程式依賴一個 vector database，其中儲存了一個索引數量偏低的小型專有資料集。該應用程式必須執行相似度搜尋。Amazon Bedrock 模型的回應必須將準確度最大化並維持高效能。該公司需要設定該 vector database 並將其與應用程式整合。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 啟動一個 Amazon MemoryDB 叢集，並使用 Flat 演算法設定索引。根據效能 metrics 設定水平擴展政策。
options_zh.B: 啟動一個 Amazon MemoryDB 叢集，並使用 Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW) 演算法設定索引。根據效能 metrics 設定垂直擴展政策。
options_zh.C: 啟動一個 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 叢集，並使用 Inverted File with Flat Compression (IVFFlat) 演算法設定索引。設定執行個體類別以在負載增加時擴展至更大的規模。
options_zh.D: 啟動一個具有 Inverted File with Flat Compression (IVFFlat) 索引與高 probe 值的 Amazon DocumentDB 叢集。將與叢集的連線設定為 replica set，並將讀取分散到 replica 執行個體。

stem: A GenAI developer is building a Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)-based customer support application that uses Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs). The application needs to process 50 GB of historical customer conversations that are stored in an Amazon S3 bucket as JSON files. The application must use the processed data as its retrieval corpus. The application's data processing workflow must extract relevant data from customer support documents, remove customer personally identifiable information (PII), and generate embeddings for vector storage. The processing workflow must be cost-effective and must finish within 4 hours. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use AWS Lambda and Amazon Comprehend to process files in parallel, remove PII, and call Amazon Bedrock APIs to generate vectors. Configure Lambda concurrency limits and memory settings to optimize throughput.
options.B: Create an AWS Glue ETL job to run PII detection scripts on the data. Use Amazon SageMaker Processing to run the HuggingFaceProcessor to generate embeddings by using a pre-trained model. Store the embeddings in Amazon OpenSearch Service.
options.C: Deploy an Amazon EMR cluster that runs Apache Spark with user-defined functions (UDFs) that call Amazon Comprehend to detect PII. Use Amazon Bedrock APIs to generate vectors. Store outputs in Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL with the pgvector extension.
options.D: Implement a data processing pipeline that uses AWS Step Functions to orchestrate a workload that uses Amazon Comprehend to detect PII and Amazon Bedrock to generate embeddings. Directly integrate the workflow with Amazon OpenSearch Serverless to store vectors and provide similarity search capabilities.

explain: 去 PII + 嵌入 + <4h + 最少負擔 → Step Functions 編排 + Comprehend(PII)+ Bedrock(嵌入)+ OpenSearch Serverless(向量+相似度,免管)。EMR(C)/SageMaker 自跑 HuggingFace(B)負擔高。
stem_zh: 一位 GenAI 開發人員正在建置一個以檢索增強生成 (Retrieval Augmented Generation, RAG) 為基礎的客戶支援應用程式，該程式使用 Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs)。該應用程式需要處理儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存貯體中、以 JSON 檔案形式存在的 50 GB 歷史客戶對話。該應用程式必須將處理後的資料作為其檢索語料庫。該應用程式的資料處理工作流程必須從客戶支援文件中擷取相關資料、移除客戶的個人識別資訊 (PII)，並產生用於 vector 儲存的 embeddings。此處理工作流程必須具成本效益，且必須在 4 小時內完成。哪個解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 AWS Lambda 與 Amazon Comprehend 平行處理檔案、移除 PII，並呼叫 Amazon Bedrock API 來產生 vectors。設定 Lambda concurrency 限制與記憶體設定以最佳化吞吐量。
options_zh.B: 建立一個 AWS Glue ETL job 在資料上執行 PII 偵測腳本。使用 Amazon SageMaker Processing 執行 HuggingFaceProcessor，透過預先訓練的模型產生 embeddings。將 embeddings 儲存在 Amazon OpenSearch Service 中。
options_zh.C: 部署一個執行 Apache Spark 的 Amazon EMR 叢集，並使用呼叫 Amazon Comprehend 來偵測 PII 的使用者自訂函式 (UDFs)。使用 Amazon Bedrock API 產生 vectors。將輸出儲存在具有 pgvector 擴充功能的 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 中。
options_zh.D: 實作一個資料處理管線，使用 AWS Step Functions 來協調一個使用 Amazon Comprehend 偵測 PII 與使用 Amazon Bedrock 產生 embeddings 的工作負載。將此工作流程直接與 Amazon OpenSearch Serverless 整合，以儲存 vectors 並提供相似度搜尋功能。

stem: A financial services company is developing a generative AI (GenAI) application that serves both premium customers and standard customers. The application uses AWS Lambda functions behind an Amazon API Gateway REST API to process requests. The company needs to dynamically switch between AI models based on which customer tier each user belongs to. The company also wants to perform A/B testing for new features without redeploying code. The company needs to validate model parameters like temperature and maximum token limits before applying changes. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create an AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store parameters for each configuration. Use Lambda functions to poll for parameter updates. Use Amazon EventBridge events to trigger redeployments when configurations change.
options.B: Store model configurations in Amazon DynamoDB tables. Optimize access patterns to retrieve configurations according to customer tier. Configure Lambda functions to query DynamoDB at the beginning of each request to determine which model to use.
options.C: Use AWS AppConfig to manage model configurations. Use feature flags to perform A/B testing. Define JSON schema validation rules for model parameters. Configure Lambda functions to retrieve configurations by using the AWS AppConfig Agent.
options.D: Create an Amazon ElastiCache (Redis OSS) cluster to store model configurations. Set short TTL values. Run custom validation logic in Lambda functions. Use Amazon CloudWatch metrics to monitor configuration usage.

explain: 動態切模型 + A/B 測試不重部署 + 驗證參數 + 最少負擔 → AWS AppConfig(動態配置)+ feature flags(A/B)+ JSON schema 驗證 + AppConfig Agent。Parameter Store(A)需重部署;DynamoDB/ElastiCache(B、D)缺驗證/feature flag。
stem_zh: 某金融服務公司正在開發一個同時服務高級客戶與一般客戶的生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式。該應用程式使用位於 Amazon API Gateway REST API 後方的 AWS Lambda functions 來處理請求。該公司需要根據每位使用者所屬的客戶層級，動態切換 AI 模型。該公司也希望在不重新部署程式碼的情況下執行 A/B 測試以測試新功能。該公司需要在套用變更前驗證模型參數，例如 temperature 與最大 token 限制。哪個解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 為每個組態建立 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 參數。使用 Lambda functions 輪詢參數更新。使用 Amazon EventBridge 事件在組態變更時觸發重新部署。
options_zh.B: 將模型組態儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 資料表中。最佳化存取模式以根據客戶層級檢索組態。設定 Lambda functions 在每次請求開始時查詢 DynamoDB 以決定使用哪個模型。
options_zh.C: 使用 AWS AppConfig 管理模型組態。使用 feature flags 執行 A/B 測試。為模型參數定義 JSON schema 驗證規則。設定 Lambda functions 使用 AWS AppConfig Agent 來檢索組態。
options_zh.D: 建立一個 Amazon ElastiCache (Redis OSS) 叢集來儲存模型組態。設定較短的 TTL 值。在 Lambda functions 中執行自訂驗證邏輯。使用 Amazon CloudWatch metrics 監控組態使用情況。

stem: A company is using Amazon Bedrock and Anthropic Claude 3 Haiku to develop an AI assistant. The AI assistant normally processes 10,000 requests each hour but experiences surges of up 30,000 requests each hour during peak usage periods. The AI assistant must respond within 2 seconds while operating across multiple AWS Regions. The company observes that during peak usage periods, the AI assistant experiences throughput bottlenecks that cause increased latency and occasional request timeouts. The company must resolve the performance issues. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.A: Purchase provisioned throughput and sufficient model units (MUs) in a single Region. Configure the application to retry failed requests with exponential backoff.
options.B: Implement token batching to reduce API overhead. Use cross-Region inference profiles to automatically distribute traffic across available Regions.
options.C: Set up auto scaling AWS Lambda functions in each Region. Implement client-side round-robin request distribution. Purchase one model unit (MU) of provisioned throughput as a backup.
options.D: Implement batch inference for all requests by using Amazon S3 buckets across multiple Regions. Use Amazon SQS to set up an asynchronous retrieval process.

explain: 激增 + <2s + 多區域 + 吞吐瓶頸 → token batching(降 API 開銷)+ cross-Region inference profiles(自動跨區分散流量)。單區 provisioned(A)不解決跨區;batch inference(D)非即時。
stem_zh: 某公司正使用 Amazon Bedrock 與 Anthropic Claude 3 Haiku 開發一個 AI 助理。該 AI 助理一般每小時處理 10,000 筆請求，但在尖峰使用期間會經歷高達每小時 30,000 筆請求的激增。該 AI 助理必須在跨多個 AWS Region 運作的同時於 2 秒內回應。該公司觀察到，在尖峰使用期間，該 AI 助理會出現吞吐量瓶頸，導致延遲增加與偶發的請求逾時。該公司必須解決這些效能問題。哪個解決方案能滿足此需求？

options_zh.A: 在單一 Region 購買 provisioned throughput 與足夠的 model units (MUs)。設定應用程式以使用 exponential backoff 重試失敗的請求。
options_zh.B: 實作 token batching 以減少 API 額外負擔。使用 cross-Region inference profiles 在可用的 Region 之間自動分散流量。
options_zh.C: 在每個 Region 設定 auto scaling 的 AWS Lambda functions。實作用戶端 round-robin 請求分配。購買一個 model unit (MU) 的 provisioned throughput 作為備援。
options_zh.D: 使用跨多個 Region 的 Amazon S3 儲存貯體，對所有請求實作 batch inference。使用 Amazon SQS 設定非同步的檢索流程。

stem: A company uses Amazon Bedrock to develop an AI assistant to provide customer support. Analysis shows that 40% of customer queries use varied phrasing or wording to ask the same questions. The company wants a solution to reduce redundant model calls. The solution must ensure that semantically equivalent questions receive consistent answers. The solution must ensure low latency. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy an Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) cluster as an in-memory cache. Specify the query text as the partition key and the model response text as the sort key. Query the cache by using a filter expression with the LIKE operator.
options.B: Use Amazon Bedrock to generate embeddings from customer queries. Use Amazon MemoryDB for Valkey to store hash sets of vector embeddings and model responses. Use a RANGE query to find similar queries and their responses.
options.C: Deploy Amazon OpenSearch Service that has k-nearest neighbor (k-NN) capabilities to store query-response text pairs. Use an approximate k-NN technique to find similar queries and their responses.
options.D: Create a caching solution by using Amazon DynamoDB to create a global secondary index on the normalized query text. Apply stemming to incoming queries. Query the index of cached customer queries.

explain: 不同措辭同義(語意等價快取)→ OpenSearch k-NN 存 query-response 對,用近似 k-NN 找語意相似。LIKE(A)/stemming(D)是字面比對,抓不到語意等價。
stem_zh: 某公司使用 Amazon Bedrock 開發一個提供客戶支援的 AI 助理。分析顯示，40% 的客戶查詢使用不同的措辭或字眼來詢問相同的問題。該公司希望有一個解決方案來減少多餘的模型呼叫。該解決方案必須確保語意相同的問題得到一致的答案。該解決方案必須確保低延遲。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 部署一個 Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 叢集作為記憶體內快取。將查詢文字指定為 partition key，並將模型回應文字指定為 sort key。使用搭配 LIKE 運算子的 filter expression 來查詢快取。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon Bedrock 從客戶查詢產生 embeddings。使用 Amazon MemoryDB for Valkey 儲存 vector embeddings 與模型回應的 hash set。使用 RANGE 查詢來尋找相似的查詢及其回應。
options_zh.C: 部署具有 k-nearest neighbor (k-NN) 功能的 Amazon OpenSearch Service 來儲存查詢與回應的文字配對。使用 approximate k-NN 技術來尋找相似的查詢及其回應。
options_zh.D: 使用 Amazon DynamoDB 建立快取解決方案，在正規化後的查詢文字上建立 global secondary index。對傳入的查詢套用 stemming。查詢已快取的客戶查詢索引。

stem: A company uses AWS Lambda functions to build an AI agent solution. A GenAI developer must set up a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that accesses user information. The GenAI developer must also configure the AI agent to use the new MCP server. The GenAI developer must ensure that only authorized users can access the MCP server. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use a Lambda function to host the MCP server. Grant the AI agent Lambda functions permission to invoke the Lambda function that hosts the MCP server. Configure the AI agent's MCP client to invoke the MCP server asynchronously.
options.B: Use a Lambda function to host the MCP server. Grant the AI agent Lambda functions permission to invoke the Lambda function that hosts the MCP server. Configure the AI agent to use the STDIO transport with the MCP server.
options.C: Use a Lambda function to host the MCP server. Create an Amazon API Gateway HTTP API that proxies requests to the Lambda function. Configure the AI agent solution to use the Streamable HTTP transport to make requests through the HTTP API. Use Amazon Cognito to enforce OAuth 2.1.
options.D: Use a Lambda layer to host the MCP server. Add the Lambda layer to the AI agent Lambda functions. Configure the agentic AI solution to use the STDIO transport to send requests to the MCP server. In the AI agent's MCP configuration, specify the Lambda layer ARN as the command. Specify the user credentials as environment variables.

explain: MCP server on Lambda + 只授權使用者 → API Gateway HTTP API proxy + Streamable HTTP transport + Cognito OAuth 2.1(嚴格使用者授權)。STDIO transport(B、D)用於本地;非遠端授權。
stem_zh: 某公司使用 AWS Lambda functions 建置一個 AI agent 解決方案。一位 GenAI 開發人員必須設定一個可存取使用者資訊的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) server。該 GenAI 開發人員也必須設定該 AI agent 使用這個新的 MCP server。該 GenAI 開發人員必須確保只有經授權的使用者能存取該 MCP server。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用一個 Lambda function 來託管該 MCP server。授予 AI agent 的 Lambda functions 呼叫託管 MCP server 之 Lambda function 的權限。設定 AI agent 的 MCP client 以非同步方式呼叫該 MCP server。
options_zh.B: 使用一個 Lambda function 來託管該 MCP server。授予 AI agent 的 Lambda functions 呼叫託管 MCP server 之 Lambda function 的權限。設定 AI agent 使用 STDIO transport 與該 MCP server 通訊。
options_zh.C: 使用一個 Lambda function 來託管該 MCP server。建立一個將請求代理至該 Lambda function 的 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API。設定該 AI agent 解決方案使用 Streamable HTTP transport，透過該 HTTP API 發出請求。使用 Amazon Cognito 來強制執行 OAuth 2.1。
options_zh.D: 使用一個 Lambda layer 來託管該 MCP server。將該 Lambda layer 加入 AI agent 的 Lambda functions。設定該 agentic AI 解決方案使用 STDIO transport 向該 MCP server 傳送請求。在 AI agent 的 MCP 組態中，將該 Lambda layer ARN 指定為 command。將使用者憑證指定為環境變數。

stem: A company wants to create an annual rewards program for its customers. The rewards that customers earn vary based on different parameters such as the categories of the items ordered and the customers' purchase history. The company needs a generative AI (GenAI) solution that uses three Amazon Bedrock agents to help customers during online catalog browsing. The agents must use knowledge bases and action groups to handle the search, recommendation, and order modules. The modules must operate sequentially. An AWS Lambda function must calculate estimated rewards for each recommended item. The solution must provide graceful degradation during service disruptions. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.A: Define an Amazon API Gateway REST API behind each agent. Create a second Lambda function to orchestrate the calls to the agents and the rewards Lambda function. Configure the second Lambda function with a retry/fallback mechanism.
options.B: Create an AWS Step Functions state machine with four tasks that run the agents and the rewards Lambda function. Set up retry and catch branches for each of the task steps.
options.C: Configure each agent with a separate retry/fallback mechanism. Create a second Lambda function to orchestrate the calls to the agents and the rewards Lambda function. Define an Amazon API Gateway REST API behind the second Lambda function.
options.D: Create a second Lambda function to orchestrate the calls to the agents and the rewards Lambda function. Create an AWS Step Functions state machine with one task that runs the second Lambda function. Set up retry and catch branches for the task step.

explain: 三 agent 依序 + 獎勵 Lambda + 優雅降級 + 最有效率 → Step Functions 四 task(三 agent + 獎勵 Lambda)+ 每步 retry/catch 分支(優雅降級)。自建 Lambda 編排(A、C、D)需自管重試,效率較低。
stem_zh: 某公司想為其客戶建立一個年度獎勵計畫。客戶賺取的獎勵會根據不同參數而有所不同，例如所訂購商品的類別與客戶的購買歷史。該公司需要一個生成式 AI (GenAI) 解決方案，使用三個 Amazon Bedrock agents 在線上型錄瀏覽過程中協助客戶。這些 agents 必須使用 knowledge bases 與 action groups 來處理搜尋、推薦與訂單模組。這些模組必須循序運作。一個 AWS Lambda function 必須為每個被推薦的商品計算預估獎勵。該解決方案必須在服務中斷期間提供優雅降級 (graceful degradation)。哪個解決方案能以最高的營運效率滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 在每個 agent 後方定義一個 Amazon API Gateway REST API。建立第二個 Lambda function 來協調對這些 agents 與獎勵 Lambda function 的呼叫。為第二個 Lambda function 設定重試/備援機制。
options_zh.B: 建立一個含有四個任務的 AWS Step Functions state machine，用以執行這些 agents 與獎勵 Lambda function。為每個任務步驟設定 retry 與 catch 分支。
options_zh.C: 為每個 agent 設定各自獨立的重試/備援機制。建立第二個 Lambda function 來協調對這些 agents 與獎勵 Lambda function 的呼叫。在第二個 Lambda function 後方定義一個 Amazon API Gateway REST API。
options_zh.D: 建立第二個 Lambda function 來協調對這些 agents 與獎勵 Lambda function 的呼叫。建立一個含有單一任務的 AWS Step Functions state machine 來執行第二個 Lambda function。為該任務步驟設定 retry 與 catch 分支。

stem: A company is creating a workflow to review customer-facing communications before the company sends the communications. The company uses a pre-defined message template to generate the communications and stores the communications in an Amazon S3 bucket. The workflow needs to capture a specific portion from the template and send it to an Amazon Bedrock model. The workflow must store model responses back to the original S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a flow in Amazon Bedrock Flows. Configure S3 action nodes at the beginning and end of the flow to retrieve and store the communications and the model responses. In the middle of the flow, configure an expression to parse each communication. Configure an agent step to send the parsed input to the model for review.
options.B: Create an AWS Step Functions Express workflow state machine. Use an Amazon S3 integration GetObject step to retrieve the original communications. Use an intrinsic function Pass step to parse the communications and to pass the results to an Amazon Bedrock InvokeModel step. Configure an Amazon S3 integration PutObject step to store the model responses back to the S3 bucket.
options.C: Create an Amazon Bedrock agent that has an action group. Configure instructions to define how the agent should parse the communications. Configure the action group to retrieve the communications from the S3 bucket, invoke the Amazon Bedrock model, and store the model responses back to the S3 bucket.
options.D: Create an Amazon Bedrock agent that has a single action group. Configure three AWS Lambda functions in the action group. Configure the functions to retrieve the communications from the S3 bucket, parse the communications and invoke the Amazon Bedrock model, and store the model responses back to the S3 bucket.

explain: 確定性線性流程(S3 取→解析→model→S3 存)→ Step Functions(S3 GetObject + intrinsic Pass 解析 + InvokeModel + PutObject)。agent(C、D)對確定性流程是過度設計。
stem_zh: 某公司正在建立一個工作流程，以在公司寄送面向客戶的通訊內容之前先行審查。該公司使用預先定義的訊息範本來產生通訊內容，並將通訊內容儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存貯體中。此工作流程需要從範本中擷取特定部分，並將其傳送給一個 Amazon Bedrock 模型。此工作流程必須將模型回應儲存回原本的 S3 儲存貯體。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 在 Amazon Bedrock Flows 中建立一個 flow。在 flow 的開頭與結尾設定 S3 action nodes，以檢索並儲存通訊內容與模型回應。在 flow 中間設定一個 expression 來剖析每筆通訊內容。設定一個 agent step，將剖析後的輸入傳送給模型進行審查。
options_zh.B: 建立一個 AWS Step Functions Express workflow state machine。使用 Amazon S3 整合的 GetObject 步驟來檢索原本的通訊內容。使用 intrinsic function 的 Pass 步驟來剖析通訊內容，並將結果傳遞給 Amazon Bedrock InvokeModel 步驟。設定一個 Amazon S3 整合的 PutObject 步驟，將模型回應儲存回該 S3 儲存貯體。
options_zh.C: 建立一個具有 action group 的 Amazon Bedrock agent。設定指示來定義該 agent 應如何剖析通訊內容。設定該 action group 以從 S3 儲存貯體檢索通訊內容、呼叫 Amazon Bedrock 模型，並將模型回應儲存回該 S3 儲存貯體。
options_zh.D: 建立一個具有單一 action group 的 Amazon Bedrock agent。在該 action group 中設定三個 AWS Lambda functions。設定這些 functions 以從 S3 儲存貯體檢索通訊內容、剖析通訊內容並呼叫 Amazon Bedrock 模型，以及將模型回應儲存回該 S3 儲存貯體。

stem: A financial technology company is using Amazon Bedrock to build an assessment system for the company's customer service AI assistant. The AI assistant must provide financial recommendations that are factually accurate, compliant with financial regulations, and conversationally appropriate. The company needs to combine automated quality evaluations at scale with targeted human reviews of critical interactions. What solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure a pipeline in which financial experts manually score all responses for accuracy, compliance, and conversational quality. Use Amazon SageMaker notebooks to analyze results to identify improvement areas.
options.B: Configure Amazon Bedrock evaluations that use Anthropic Claude Sonnet as a judge model to assess response accuracy and appropriateness. Configure custom Amazon Bedrock guardrails to check responses for compliance with financial policies. Add Amazon Augmented AI (Amazon A2I) human reviews for flagged critical interactions.
options.C: Create an Amazon Lex bot to manage the customer service interactions. Configure AWS Lambda functions to check responses against a static compliance database. Configure intents in the bot that call the Lambda functions to check the responses. Add an additional intent to collect end-user reviews.
options.D: Configure Amazon CloudWatch to monitor response patterns from the AI assistant. Configure CloudWatch alerts for potential compliance violations. Establish a team of human evaluators to review flagged interactions.

explain: 大規模自動評估 + 關鍵互動人工審 → Bedrock evaluations judge model(自動評準確/得體)+ Guardrails(合規)+ A2I(關鍵互動人工審)。全人工(A)不可規模化;CloudWatch(D)不評內容品質。
stem_zh: 某金融科技公司正使用 Amazon Bedrock 為公司的客戶服務 AI 助理建置一個評估系統。該 AI 助理必須提供事實準確、符合金融法規且對話得當的財務建議。該公司需要將大規模的自動化品質評估與針對關鍵互動的目標性人工審查相結合。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 設定一個管線，由財務專家手動為所有回應的準確度、合規性與對話品質評分。使用 Amazon SageMaker notebooks 分析結果以找出可改善之處。
options_zh.B: 設定使用 Anthropic Claude Sonnet 作為評審模型的 Amazon Bedrock evaluations，以評估回應的準確度與得當性。設定自訂的 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 以檢查回應是否符合金融政策。為被標記的關鍵互動加入 Amazon Augmented AI (Amazon A2I) 人工審查。
options_zh.C: 建立一個 Amazon Lex bot 來管理客戶服務互動。設定 AWS Lambda functions 以對照靜態合規資料庫檢查回應。在該 bot 中設定呼叫這些 Lambda functions 來檢查回應的 intents。額外加入一個 intent 來收集終端使用者的評論。
options_zh.D: 設定 Amazon CloudWatch 以監控該 AI 助理的回應模式。設定 CloudWatch 警示以偵測潛在的合規違規。建立一支人工評估團隊來審查被標記的互動。

stem: A healthcare company is using Amazon Bedrock to develop a real-time patient care AI assistant to respond to queries for separate departments that handle clinical inquiries, insurance verification, appointment scheduling, and insurance claims. The company wants to use a multi-agent architecture. The company must ensure that the AI assistant is scalable and can onboard new features for patients. The AI assistant must be able to handle thousands of parallel patient interactions. The company must ensure that patients receive appropriate domain-specific responses to queries. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Isolate data for each agent by using separate knowledge bases. Use IAM filtering to control access to each knowledge base. Deploy a supervisor agent to perform natural language intent classification on patient inquiries. Configure the supervisor agent to route queries to specialized collaborator agents to respond to department-specific queries. Configure each specialized collaborator agent to use Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) with the agent's department-specific knowledge base.
options.B: Create a separate supervisor agent for each department. Configure individual collaborator agents to perform natural language intent classification for each specialty domain within each department. Integrate each collaborator agent with department-specific knowledge bases only. Implement manual handoff processes between the supervisor agents.
options.C: Isolate data for each department in separate knowledge bases. Use IAM filtering to control access to each knowledge base. Deploy a single general-purpose agent. Configure multiple action groups within the general-purpose agent to perform specific department functions. Implement rule-based routing logic within the general-purpose agent instructions.
options.D: Implement multiple independent supervisor agents that run in parallel to respond to patient inquiries for each department. Configure multiple collaborator agents for each supervisor agent. Integrate all agents with the same knowledge base. Use external routing logic to merge responses from multiple supervisor agents.

explain: 多代理 + 領域特定 + 可擴展 + 並行 → supervisor agent(意圖分類路由)+ 專門 collaborator agents(各自獨立 KB + RAG)+ IAM 隔離。手動交接(B)不可規模化;單一通用 agent(C)非多代理;共用 KB(D)無隔離。
stem_zh: 某醫療保健公司正使用 Amazon Bedrock 開發一個即時病患照護 AI 助理，以回應由不同部門處理的查詢，這些部門分別處理臨床諮詢、保險查驗、預約排程與保險理賠。該公司想使用多 agent 架構。該公司必須確保該 AI 助理具可擴展性，並能為病患導入新功能。該 AI 助理必須能夠處理數千個平行的病患互動。該公司必須確保病患的查詢能獲得適當的領域專屬回應。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用各自獨立的 knowledge bases 隔離每個 agent 的資料。使用 IAM 篩選來控制對每個 knowledge base 的存取。部署一個 supervisor agent 對病患詢問執行自然語言意圖分類。設定該 supervisor agent 將查詢路由至專門的 collaborator agents，以回應部門專屬的查詢。設定每個專門的 collaborator agent 使用檢索增強生成 (RAG) 搭配該 agent 的部門專屬 knowledge base。
options_zh.B: 為每個部門建立各自獨立的 supervisor agent。設定個別的 collaborator agents 為每個部門內的每個專業領域執行自然語言意圖分類。將每個 collaborator agent 僅與部門專屬的 knowledge bases 整合。在這些 supervisor agents 之間實作人工交接流程。
options_zh.C: 在各自獨立的 knowledge bases 中隔離每個部門的資料。使用 IAM 篩選來控制對每個 knowledge base 的存取。部署單一通用型 agent。在該通用型 agent 中設定多個 action groups 以執行特定的部門功能。在該通用型 agent 的指示中實作以規則為基礎的路由邏輯。
options_zh.D: 實作多個平行執行的獨立 supervisor agents，以回應每個部門的病患詢問。為每個 supervisor agent 設定多個 collaborator agents。將所有 agents 與同一個 knowledge base 整合。使用外部路由邏輯來合併來自多個 supervisor agents 的回應。

stem: A company uses an AI assistant application to summarize the company's website content and provide information to customers. The company plans to use Amazon Bedrock to give the application access to a foundation model (FM). The company needs to deploy the AI assistant application to a development environment and a production environment. The solution must integrate the environments with the FM. The company wants to test the effectiveness of various FMs in each environment. The solution must provide product owners with the ability to easily switch between FMs for testing purposes in each environment. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create one AWS CDK application. Create multiple pipelines in AWS CodePipeline. Configure each pipeline to have its own settings for each FM. Configure the application to invoke the Amazon Bedrock FMs by using the aws_bedrock.ProvisionedModel.fromProvisionedModelArn() method.
options.B: Create a separate AWS CDK application for each environment. Configure the applications to invoke the Amazon Bedrock FMs by using the aws_bedrock.FoundationModel.fromFoundationModelId() method. Create a separate pipeline in AWS CodePipeline for each environment.
options.C: Create one AWS CDK application. Configure the application to invoke the Amazon Bedrock FMs by using the aws_bedrock.FoundationModel.fromFoundationModelId() method. Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline pipeline that has a deployment stage for each environment that uses AWS CodeBuild deploy actions.
options.D: Create one AWS CDK application for the production environment. Configure the application to invoke the Amazon Bedrock FMs by using the aws_bedrock.ProvisionedModel.fromProvisionedModelArn() method. Create a pipeline in AWS CodePipeline. Configure the pipeline to deploy to the production environment by using an AWS CodeBuild deploy action. For the development environment, manually recreate the resources by referring to the production application code.

explain: 多環境 + 輕鬆切換 FM 測試 → 單一 CDK app + 每環境部署階段 + fromFoundationModelId()(模型 ID 易切換)。fromProvisionedModelArn(A、D)是固定 provisioned,切換麻煩;手動重建(D)易錯。
stem_zh: 某公司使用一個 AI 助理應用程式來摘要公司網站內容並向客戶提供資訊。該公司計畫使用 Amazon Bedrock 讓該應用程式能存取一個 foundation model (FM)。該公司需要將此 AI 助理應用程式部署至一個開發環境與一個生產環境。該解決方案必須將這些環境與該 FM 整合。該公司想在每個環境中測試各種 FM 的成效。該解決方案必須讓產品負責人能夠在每個環境中輕鬆切換 FM 以進行測試。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 建立一個 AWS CDK 應用程式。在 AWS CodePipeline 中建立多個管線。設定每個管線針對每個 FM 擁有各自的設定。設定該應用程式使用 aws_bedrock.ProvisionedModel.fromProvisionedModelArn() 方法呼叫 Amazon Bedrock FMs。
options_zh.B: 為每個環境建立各自獨立的 AWS CDK 應用程式。設定這些應用程式使用 aws_bedrock.FoundationModel.fromFoundationModelId() 方法呼叫 Amazon Bedrock FMs。在 AWS CodePipeline 中為每個環境建立各自獨立的管線。
options_zh.C: 建立一個 AWS CDK 應用程式。設定該應用程式使用 aws_bedrock.FoundationModel.fromFoundationModelId() 方法呼叫 Amazon Bedrock FMs。在 AWS CodePipeline 中建立一個管線，其中為每個環境設定一個使用 AWS CodeBuild deploy actions 的部署階段。
options_zh.D: 為生產環境建立一個 AWS CDK 應用程式。設定該應用程式使用 aws_bedrock.ProvisionedModel.fromProvisionedModelArn() 方法呼叫 Amazon Bedrock FMs。在 AWS CodePipeline 中建立一個管線。設定該管線使用 AWS CodeBuild deploy action 部署至生產環境。對於開發環境，則參照生產應用程式的程式碼手動重新建立資源。

stem: A hotel company wants to enhance a legacy Java-based property management system (PMS) by adding AI capabilities. The company wants to use Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases to provide staff with room availability information and hotel-specific details. The solution must maintain separate access controls for each hotel that the company manages. The solution must provide room availability information in near real time and must maintain consistent performance during peak usage periods. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy a single Amazon Bedrock knowledge base that contains combined data for all hotels. Configure AWS Lambda functions to synchronize data from each hotel's PMS database through direct API connections. Implement AWS CloudTrail logging with hotel-specific filters to audit access logs for each hotel's data.
options.B: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for each hotel that is invoked by changes to the PMS database for each hotel. Configure the rule to send updates to a centralized Amazon Bedrock knowledge base in a management AWS account. Configure resource-based policies to enforce hotel-specific access controls for hotel staff.
options.C: Implement one Amazon Bedrock knowledge base for each hotel in a multi-account structure. Use direct data ingestion to provide real-time room availability information. Schedule regular synchronization for less critical information.
options.D: Build a centralized Amazon Bedrock agent that uses multiple knowledge bases. Implement AWS IAM Identity Center with hotel-specific permission sets to control hotel staff data access.

explain: 每飯店獨立存取控制 + 近即時 + 尖峰一致效能 → 多帳號 + 每飯店獨立 KB(強隔離 + 效能隔離)+ 直接即時擷取。單一/集中 KB(A、B、D)隔離與效能隔離較弱。
stem_zh: 某飯店公司想透過加入 AI 功能來強化一個以 Java 為基礎的舊有物業管理系統 (property management system, PMS)。該公司想使用 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases 為員工提供房間空房資訊與飯店專屬細節。該解決方案必須為公司所管理的每間飯店維持各自獨立的存取控制。該解決方案必須以近乎即時的方式提供房間空房資訊，並必須在尖峰使用期間維持一致的效能。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 部署單一個包含所有飯店合併資料的 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base。設定 AWS Lambda functions 透過直接的 API 連線從每間飯店的 PMS 資料庫同步資料。實作具有飯店專屬篩選器的 AWS CloudTrail logging，以稽核每間飯店資料的存取日誌。
options_zh.B: 為每間飯店建立一個 Amazon EventBridge rule，由每間飯店的 PMS 資料庫變更所觸發。設定該 rule 將更新傳送至位於管理 AWS 帳戶中的集中式 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base。設定 resource-based policies 以為飯店員工強制執行飯店專屬的存取控制。
options_zh.C: 在多帳戶結構中為每間飯店實作一個 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base。使用直接資料擷取來提供即時房間空房資訊。為較不關鍵的資訊排程定期同步。
options_zh.D: 建置一個使用多個 knowledge bases 的集中式 Amazon Bedrock agent。實作 AWS IAM Identity Center 並使用飯店專屬的 permission sets 來控制飯店員工的資料存取。

stem: A company is implementing a serverless inference API by using AWS Lambda. The API will dynamically invoke multiple AI models hosted on Amazon Bedrock. The company needs to design a solution that can switch between model providers without modifying or redeploying Lambda code in real time. The design must include safe rollout of configuration changes and validation and rollback capabilities. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Store the active model provider in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Configure a Lambda function to read the parameter at runtime to determine which model to invoke.
options.B: Store the active model provider in AWS AppConfig. Configure a Lambda function to read the configuration at runtime to determine which model to invoke.
options.C: Configure an Amazon API Gateway REST API to route requests to separate Lambda functions. Hardcode each Lambda function to a specific model provider. Switch the integration target manually.
options.D: Store the active model provider in a JSON file hosted on Amazon S3. Use AWS AppConfig to reference the S3 file as a hosted configuration source. Configure a Lambda function to read the file through AppConfig at runtime to determine which model to invoke.

explain: 不重部署切換 + 安全推出 + 驗證 + 回滾 → AWS AppConfig(一站涵蓋:動態配置+漸進推出+驗證+自動回滾)。Parameter Store(A)缺安全推出/驗證/回滾;繞 S3(D)多餘複雜。
stem_zh: 某公司正使用 AWS Lambda 實作一個無伺服器 inference API。該 API 將動態呼叫多個託管於 Amazon Bedrock 上的 AI 模型。該公司需要設計一個解決方案，能夠即時在不同模型供應商之間切換，而無需修改或重新部署 Lambda 程式碼。此設計必須包含組態變更的安全推出，以及驗證與回復 (rollback) 功能。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 將使用中的模型供應商儲存在 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 中。設定一個 Lambda function 在執行階段讀取該參數，以決定要呼叫哪個模型。
options_zh.B: 將使用中的模型供應商儲存在 AWS AppConfig 中。設定一個 Lambda function 在執行階段讀取該組態，以決定要呼叫哪個模型。
options_zh.C: 設定一個 Amazon API Gateway REST API 將請求路由至各自獨立的 Lambda functions。將每個 Lambda function 硬編碼至特定的模型供應商。手動切換整合目標。
options_zh.D: 將使用中的模型供應商儲存在一個託管於 Amazon S3 的 JSON 檔案中。使用 AWS AppConfig 將該 S3 檔案參照為 hosted configuration source。設定一個 Lambda function 在執行階段透過 AppConfig 讀取該檔案，以決定要呼叫哪個模型。

stem: A company is building a generative AI (GenAI) application that uses Amazon Bedrock APIs to process complex customer inquiries. During peak usage periods, the application experiences intermittent API timeouts that cause issues such as broken response chunks and delayed data delivery. The application struggles to ensure that prompts remain within token limits when handling complex customer inquiries of varying lengths. Users have reported truncated inputs and incomplete responses. The company has also observed foundation model (FM) invocation failures. The company needs a retry strategy that automatically handles transient service errors and prevents overwhelming Amazon Bedrock during peak usage periods. The strategy must also adapt to changing service availability and support response streaming and token-aware request handling. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Implement a standard retry strategy that uses a 1-second fixed delay between attempts and a 3-retry maximum for all errors. Handle streaming response timeouts by restarting streams. Cap token usage for each session.
options.B: Implement an adaptive retry strategy that uses exponential backoff with jitter and a circuit breaker pattern that temporarily disables retries when error rates exceed a predefined threshold. Implement a streaming response handler that monitors for chunk delivery timeouts. Configure the handler to buffer successfully received chunks and intelligently resume streaming from the last received chunk when connections are re-established.
options.C: Use the AWS SDK to configure a retry strategy in standard mode. Wrap Amazon Bedrock API calls in try-catch blocks that handle timeout exceptions. Return cached completions for failed streaming requests. Enforce a global token limit for all users. Add jitter-based retry logic and lightweight token trimming for each request. Resume broken streams by requesting only the missing chunks from the point of failure. Maintain a small in-memory buffer of the most recent chunks to minimize redundant data transfer.
options.D: Set Amazon Bedrock client request timeouts to 30 seconds. Implement client-side load shedding. Buffer partial results and stop new requests when the application performance begins to degrade. Set static token usage caps for all requests. Configure exponential backoff retries, dynamic chunk sizing, and context-aware token limits.

explain: 處理暫時錯誤 + 防壓垮 + 自適應 + 串流 + token 感知 → 指數退避+jitter + circuit breaker(自適應)+ 串流從中斷點智慧恢復。固定延遲(A)不防壓垮;全域 token 上限(C)非 token-aware;靜態上限(D)矛盾。
stem_zh: 某公司正在建置一個使用 Amazon Bedrock API 處理複雜客戶詢問的生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式。在尖峰使用期間，該應用程式會經歷間歇性的 API 逾時，導致諸如回應 chunk 中斷與資料傳遞延遲等問題。在處理長度不一的複雜客戶詢問時，該應用程式難以確保 prompts 維持在 token 限制範圍內。使用者已回報輸入被截斷與回應不完整。該公司也觀察到 foundation model (FM) 的呼叫失敗。該公司需要一個重試策略，能自動處理暫時性的服務錯誤，並防止在尖峰使用期間使 Amazon Bedrock 不堪負荷。此策略還必須能適應服務可用性的變化，並支援回應串流與具 token 感知能力的請求處理。哪個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 實作一個標準重試策略，在各次嘗試之間使用固定的 1 秒延遲，並對所有錯誤設定最多重試 3 次。透過重新啟動串流來處理串流回應逾時。為每個 session 設定 token 使用量上限。
options_zh.B: 實作一個自適應重試策略，使用搭配 jitter 的 exponential backoff，以及一個在錯誤率超過預先定義的閾值時暫時停用重試的斷路器 (circuit breaker) 模式。實作一個監控 chunk 傳遞逾時的串流回應處理器。設定該處理器以緩衝已成功接收的 chunk，並在連線重新建立時，從最後接收到的 chunk 智慧地恢復串流。
options_zh.C: 使用 AWS SDK 將重試策略設定為 standard 模式。將 Amazon Bedrock API 呼叫包在處理逾時例外的 try-catch 區塊中。針對失敗的串流請求回傳已快取的完成內容。為所有使用者強制執行全域 token 限制。為每個請求加入以 jitter 為基礎的重試邏輯與輕量的 token 修剪。透過僅從失敗點請求遺漏的 chunk 來恢復中斷的串流。維護一個包含最近期 chunk 的小型記憶體內緩衝區，以將多餘的資料傳輸降到最低。
options_zh.D: 將 Amazon Bedrock client 的請求逾時設定為 30 秒。實作用戶端 load shedding。緩衝部分結果，並在應用程式效能開始下降時停止新的請求。為所有請求設定靜態的 token 使用量上限。設定 exponential backoff 重試、動態 chunk 大小調整與具 context 感知能力的 token 限制。

stem: A bank is developing a generative AI (GenAI)-powered AI assistant that uses Amazon Bedrock to assist the bank's website users with account inquiries and financial guidance. The bank must ensure that the AI assistant does not reveal any personally identifiable information (PII) in customer interactions. The AI assistant must not send PII in prompts to the GenAI model. The AI assistant must not respond to customer requests to provide investment advice. The bank must collect audit logs of all customer interactions, including any images or documents that are transmitted during customer interactions. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?
