options.A: Use Amazon Macie to detect and redact PII in user inputs and in the model responses. Apply prompt engineering techniques to force the model to avoid investment advice topics. Use AWS CloudTrail to capture conversation logs.
options.B: Use an AWS Lambda function and Amazon Comprehend to detect and redact PII. Use Amazon Comprehend topic modeling to prevent the AI assistant from discussing investment advice topics. Set up custom metrics in Amazon CloudWatch to capture customer conversations.
options.C: Configure Amazon Bedrock guardrails to apply a sensitive information policy to detect and filter PII. Set up a topic policy to ensure that the AI assistant avoids investment advice topics. Use the Converse API to log model invocations. Enable delivery and image logging to Amazon S3.
options.D: Use regex controls to match patterns for PII. Apply prompt engineering techniques to avoid returning PII or investment advice topics to customers. Enable model invocation logging, delivery logging, and image logging to Amazon S3.

explain: 不洩漏/不送 PII + 封鎖投資建議 + 稽核含圖片 + 最少負擔 → Guardrails 敏感資訊政策(PII)+ 主題政策(投資建議)+ Converse API + 圖片日誌到 S3。Macie(A)是 S3 靜態資料;Comprehend topic modeling(B)是發現主題非封鎖。
stem_zh: 某銀行正在開發一個由生成式 AI (GenAI) 驅動、使用 Amazon Bedrock 的 AI 助理，協助該銀行網站使用者處理帳戶查詢與財務指引。該銀行必須確保此 AI 助理在客戶互動過程中不會洩漏任何個人識別資訊 (PII)。此 AI 助理不可在送往 GenAI 模型的 prompt 中包含 PII。此 AI 助理不可回應客戶提供投資建議的要求。該銀行必須蒐集所有客戶互動的稽核日誌，包括客戶互動過程中傳輸的任何圖片或文件。哪一個解決方案能以最少的營運投入滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon Macie 偵測並遮蔽使用者輸入及模型回應中的 PII。套用 prompt engineering 技巧強制模型避開投資建議主題。使用 AWS CloudTrail 擷取對話日誌。
options_zh.B: 使用一個 AWS Lambda 函數搭配 Amazon Comprehend 偵測並遮蔽 PII。使用 Amazon Comprehend 主題建模 (topic modeling) 防止 AI 助理討論投資建議主題。在 Amazon CloudWatch 中設定自訂 metrics 以擷取客戶對話。
options_zh.C: 設定 Amazon Bedrock guardrails，套用敏感資訊政策 (sensitive information policy) 來偵測並過濾 PII。設定主題政策 (topic policy) 以確保 AI 助理避開投資建議主題。使用 Converse API 記錄模型呼叫。啟用傳遞記錄與圖片記錄至 Amazon S3。
options_zh.D: 使用 regex 控制來比對 PII 的模式。套用 prompt engineering 技巧以避免向客戶回傳 PII 或投資建議主題。啟用模型呼叫記錄、傳遞記錄及圖片記錄至 Amazon S3。

stem: A financial services company is developing a customer service AI assistant application that uses a foundation model (FM) in Amazon Bedrock. The application must provide transparent responses by documenting reasoning and by citing sources that are used for Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). The application must capture comprehensive audit trails for all responses to users. The application must be able to serve up to 10,000 concurrent users and must respond to each customer inquiry within 2 seconds. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Enable tracing for Amazon Bedrock agents. Configure structured prompts that direct the FM to provide evidence presentations. Integrate Amazon Bedrock knowledge bases with data sources to enable RAG. Configure the application to reference and cite authoritative content. Deploy the application in a Multi-AZ architecture. Use Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda functions to scale the application. Use Amazon CloudFront to provide low-latency delivery.
options.B: Enable tracing for Amazon Bedrock agents. Integrate a custom RAG pipeline with Amazon OpenSearch Service to retrieve and cite sources. Configure structured prompts to present retrieved evidence. Deploy the application behind an Amazon API Gateway REST API. Use AWS Lambda functions and Amazon CloudFront to scale the application and to provide low latency. Store logs in Amazon S3 and use AWS CloudTrail to capture audit trails.
options.C: Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor latency and error rates. Embed model prompts directly in the application backend to cite sources. Store application interactions with users in Amazon RDS for audits.
options.D: Store generated responses and supporting evidence in an Amazon S3 bucket. Enable versioning on the bucket for audits. Use AWS Glue to catalog retrieved documents. Process the retrieved documents in Amazon Athena to generate periodic compliance reports.

explain: 記錄推理 + 引用 RAG 來源 + 稽核 + 高並發低延遲 + 最少負擔 → agent tracing(推理+稽核)+ Knowledge Bases RAG(內建引用)+ Multi-AZ/API GW/Lambda/CloudFront。自建 RAG+CloudTrail(B)負擔高且 CloudTrail 非回應稽核。
stem_zh: 某金融服務公司正在開發一個客戶服務 AI 助理應用程式，該應用程式使用 Amazon Bedrock 中的 foundation model (FM)。此應用程式必須提供透明的回應，方式是記錄推理過程並引用 Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) 所使用的來源。此應用程式必須為所有給使用者的回應擷取完整的稽核軌跡 (audit trail)。此應用程式必須能夠服務多達 10,000 名並行使用者，且必須在 2 秒內回應每個客戶查詢。哪一個解決方案能以最少的營運開銷滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 為 Amazon Bedrock agents 啟用 tracing。設定結構化 prompt，引導 FM 提供佐證呈現。將 Amazon Bedrock knowledge bases 與資料來源整合以啟用 RAG。設定應用程式以參照並引用具權威性的內容。以 Multi-AZ 架構部署應用程式。使用 Amazon API Gateway 與 AWS Lambda 函數來擴展應用程式。使用 Amazon CloudFront 提供低延遲傳遞。
options_zh.B: 為 Amazon Bedrock agents 啟用 tracing。將自訂 RAG 管線與 Amazon OpenSearch Service 整合以擷取並引用來源。設定結構化 prompt 以呈現擷取到的佐證。將應用程式部署在 Amazon API Gateway REST API 後方。使用 AWS Lambda 函數與 Amazon CloudFront 來擴展應用程式並提供低延遲。將日誌儲存於 Amazon S3，並使用 AWS CloudTrail 擷取稽核軌跡。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch 監控延遲與錯誤率。將模型 prompt 直接嵌入應用程式後端以引用來源。將與使用者的應用程式互動儲存於 Amazon RDS 以供稽核。
options_zh.D: 將產生的回應與佐證資料儲存於 Amazon S3 儲存貯體。在該儲存貯體上啟用版本控制以供稽核。使用 AWS Glue 對擷取到的文件建立目錄。在 Amazon Athena 中處理擷取到的文件以產生定期合規報告。

stem: A healthcare company is developing a document management system that stores medical research papers in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company needs to build a comprehensive metadata framework that will improve search precision for a generative AI (GenAI) application that analyzes the research papers. The metadata framework must include document timestamps, author information, and research domain classifications. The solution must maintain a consistent metadata structure across all uploaded documents. The solution must give foundation models (FMs) the ability to understand document context without accessing the full content. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Store document timestamps in Amazon S3 system metadata. Use S3 object tags to implement domain classification. Implement custom user-defined metadata to store author information.
options.B: Set up S3 Object Lock with legal holds to track document timestamps. Use S3 object tags to store author information. Implement S3 access points for domain classification.
options.C: Use S3 Inventory reports to track document timestamps. Create S3 access points to implement domain classification. Store author information in S3 Storage Lens dashboards.
options.D: Use custom user-defined metadata to store author information. Use S3 Object Lock retention periods to track document timestamps. Use S3 Event Notifications to implement domain classification.

explain: S3 metadata 框架 → 時間戳=S3 system metadata(自動);領域分類=object tags(分類標籤);作者=user-defined metadata(自訂屬性)。Object Lock(B、D)是合規保留;access points/Storage Lens/Inventory 用途錯誤。
stem_zh: 某醫療保健公司正在開發一個文件管理系統，將醫學研究論文儲存於 Amazon S3 儲存貯體。該公司需要建立一個完整的中繼資料 (metadata) 框架，以改善一個分析這些研究論文的生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式的搜尋精確度。此中繼資料框架必須包含文件時間戳記、作者資訊及研究領域分類。此解決方案必須在所有上傳的文件之間維持一致的中繼資料結構。此解決方案必須讓 foundation models (FMs) 能夠在不存取完整內容的情況下理解文件脈絡。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 將文件時間戳記儲存於 Amazon S3 系統中繼資料中。使用 S3 物件標籤 (object tags) 實作領域分類。實作自訂的使用者定義中繼資料 (user-defined metadata) 來儲存作者資訊。
options_zh.B: 設定 S3 Object Lock 搭配法律保留 (legal holds) 來追蹤文件時間戳記。使用 S3 物件標籤儲存作者資訊。實作 S3 access points 進行領域分類。
options_zh.C: 使用 S3 Inventory 報告追蹤文件時間戳記。建立 S3 access points 來實作領域分類。將作者資訊儲存於 S3 Storage Lens 儀表板中。
options_zh.D: 使用自訂的使用者定義中繼資料儲存作者資訊。使用 S3 Object Lock 保留期間 (retention periods) 追蹤文件時間戳記。使用 S3 Event Notifications 實作領域分類。

stem: Example Corp provides a personalized video generation service that millions of enterprise customers use. Customers generate marketing videos by submitting prompts to the company's proprietary generative AI (GenAI) model. To improve output relevance and personalization, Example Corp wants to enhance the prompts by using customer-specific context such as product preferences, customer attributes, and business history. The customers have strict data governance requirements. The customers must retain full ownership and control over their own data. The customers do not require real-time access. However, semantic accuracy must be high and retrieval latency must remain low to support customer experience use cases. Example Corp wants to minimize architectural complexity in its integration pattern. Example Corp does not want to deploy and manage services in each customer's environment unless necessary. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Ensure that each customer sets up an Amazon Q Business index that includes the customer's internal data. Ensure that each customer designates Example Corp as a data accessor to allow Example Corp to retrieve relevant content by using a secure API to enrich prompts at runtime.
options.B: Use federated search with Model Context Protocol (MCP) by deploying real-time MCP servers for each customer. Retrieve data in real time during prompt generation.
options.C: Ensure that each customer configures an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base. Allow cross-account querying so Example Corp can retrieve structured data for prompt augmentation.
options.D: Configure Amazon Kendra to crawl customer data sources. Share the resulting indexes across accounts so Example Corp can query each customer's Amazon Kendra index to retrieve augmentation data.

explain: 客戶保有資料所有權 + 授權第三方 + 不在客戶環境部署服務 → Amazon Q Business 索引(客戶保有)+ 指定 Example Corp 為 data accessor(授權存取)。per-customer MCP server(B)= 在客戶環境部署;跨帳號查詢/分享索引(C、D)削弱所有權。
stem_zh: Example Corp 提供數百萬企業客戶使用的個人化影片產生服務。客戶透過向該公司專屬的生成式 AI (GenAI) 模型送出 prompt 來產生行銷影片。為了改善輸出的相關性與個人化程度，Example Corp 希望利用客戶特定的脈絡（例如產品偏好、客戶屬性及業務歷史）來強化 prompt。這些客戶有嚴格的資料治理需求。客戶必須對自己的資料保有完整的所有權與控制權。客戶不需要即時存取。然而語意準確度必須要高，且擷取延遲必須維持在低水準，以支援客戶體驗的使用情境。Example Corp 希望將其整合模式中的架構複雜度降到最低。Example Corp 不希望在每個客戶的環境中部署與管理服務，除非有必要。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 確保每個客戶都設定一個包含該客戶內部資料的 Amazon Q Business index。確保每個客戶指定 Example Corp 為資料存取者 (data accessor)，讓 Example Corp 能透過安全的 API 擷取相關內容，於執行時強化 prompt。
options_zh.B: 使用搭配 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 的聯合搜尋 (federated search)，為每個客戶部署即時 MCP 伺服器。在產生 prompt 期間即時擷取資料。
options_zh.C: 確保每個客戶設定一個 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base。允許跨帳戶查詢，讓 Example Corp 能擷取結構化資料以擴充 prompt。
options_zh.D: 設定 Amazon Kendra 來爬取客戶的資料來源。在帳戶之間共用產生的索引，讓 Example Corp 能查詢每個客戶的 Amazon Kendra index 以擷取擴充資料。

stem: A company is building a legal research AI assistant that uses Amazon Bedrock with an Anthropic Claude foundation model (FM). The AI assistant must retrieve highly relevant case law documents to augment the FM's responses. The AI assistant must identify semantic relationships between legal concepts, specific legal terminology, and citations. The AI assistant must perform quickly and return precise results. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base to use a default vector search configuration. Use Amazon Bedrock to expand queries to improve retrieval for legal documents based on specific terminology and citations.
options.B: Use Amazon OpenSearch service to deploy a hybrid search architecture that combines vector search with keyword search. Apply an Amazon Bedrock reranker model to optimize result relevance.
options.C: Enable the Amazon Kendra query suggestion feature for end users. Use Amazon Bedrock to perform post-processing of search results to identify semantic similarity in the documents and to produce precise results.
options.D: Use Amazon OpenSearch Service with vector search and Amazon Bedrock Titan embeddings to index and search legal documents. Use custom AWS Lambda functions to merge results with keyword-based filters that are stored in an Amazon RDS database.

explain: 語意關係 + 特定術語/引用(精確)+ 精確結果 → hybrid search(向量語意 + 關鍵字精確術語/引用)+ Bedrock reranker(優化相關性)。純向量(A)漏精確術語;自建 Lambda 合併(D)複雜無 reranker。
stem_zh: 某公司正在建置一個法律研究 AI 助理，該助理使用 Amazon Bedrock 搭配 Anthropic Claude foundation model (FM)。此 AI 助理必須擷取高度相關的判例法文件以強化 FM 的回應。此 AI 助理必須辨識法律概念、特定法律術語與引用文獻之間的語意關係。此 AI 助理必須能快速執行並回傳精確的結果。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 設定 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base 使用預設的向量搜尋 (vector search) 設定。使用 Amazon Bedrock 擴展查詢 (query)，以根據特定術語與引用文獻改善法律文件的擷取。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon OpenSearch Service 部署一個混合搜尋 (hybrid search) 架構，結合向量搜尋與關鍵字搜尋。套用 Amazon Bedrock reranker 模型以最佳化結果相關性。
options_zh.C: 為終端使用者啟用 Amazon Kendra 查詢建議 (query suggestion) 功能。使用 Amazon Bedrock 對搜尋結果進行後處理，以辨識文件中的語意相似度並產生精確的結果。
options_zh.D: 使用 Amazon OpenSearch Service 搭配向量搜尋及 Amazon Bedrock Titan embeddings 來索引與搜尋法律文件。使用自訂的 AWS Lambda 函數，將結果與儲存於 Amazon RDS 資料庫中、以關鍵字為基礎的篩選條件合併。

stem: A company deploys multiple Amazon Bedrock based generative AI (GenAI) applications across multiple business units for customer service, content generation, and document analysis. Some applications show unpredictable token consumption patterns. The company requires a comprehensive observability solution that provides real-time visibility into token usage patterns across multiple models. The observability solution must support custom dashboards for multiple stakeholder groups and provide alerting capabilities for token consumption across all the foundational models that the company's applications use. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use Amazon CloudWatch metrics as data sources to create custom Amazon QuickSight dashboards that show token usage trends and usage patterns across FMs.
options.B: Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights to analyze Amazon Bedrock invocation logs for token consumption patterns and usage attribution by application. Create custom queries to identify high-usage scenarios. Add log widgets to dashboards to enable continuous monitoring.
options.C: Create custom Amazon CloudWatch dashboards that combine native Amazon Bedrock token and invocation CloudWatch metrics. Set up CloudWatch alarms to monitor token usage thresholds.
options.D: Create dashboards that show token usage trends and patterns across the company's FMs by using an Amazon Bedrock zero-ETL integration with Amazon Managed Grafana.
options.E: Implement Amazon EventBridge rules to capture Amazon Bedrock model invocation events. Route token usage data to an Amazon Data Firehose delivery stream that targets Amazon OpenSearch Serverless. Use OpenSearch dashboards to analyze usage patterns.

explain: token 可觀測性 + 即時 + 最少負擔 → 原生 Bedrock CloudWatch metrics 儀表板+alarms(C)+ Logs Insights 依應用歸因 invocation logs(B)。D 的「Bedrock zero-ETL with Managed Grafana」是假功能;QuickSight(A)/自建管道(E)負擔高。
stem_zh: 某公司在多個業務單位部署了多個以 Amazon Bedrock 為基礎的生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式，用於客戶服務、內容產生及文件分析。部分應用程式呈現出不可預測的 token 消耗模式。該公司需要一個完整的可觀測性 (observability) 解決方案，提供對多個模型 token 使用模式的即時可見度。此可觀測性解決方案必須支援為多個利害關係人群組建立自訂儀表板，並為該公司應用程式所使用的所有 foundation model 提供 token 消耗的警示功能。哪一組解決方案能以最少的營運開銷滿足這些需求？（選擇兩項。）

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch metrics 作為資料來源，建立自訂的 Amazon QuickSight 儀表板，顯示跨 FM 的 token 使用趨勢與使用模式。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs Insights 分析 Amazon Bedrock 呼叫日誌的 token 消耗模式，並依應用程式進行使用歸因。建立自訂查詢以辨識高用量情境。將日誌小工具 (log widgets) 加入儀表板以啟用持續監控。
options_zh.C: 建立自訂的 Amazon CloudWatch 儀表板，結合原生的 Amazon Bedrock token 與呼叫 CloudWatch metrics。設定 CloudWatch alarms 以監控 token 使用量門檻。
options_zh.D: 透過 Amazon Bedrock 與 Amazon Managed Grafana 的 zero-ETL 整合，建立顯示跨該公司各 FM 之 token 使用趨勢與模式的儀表板。
options_zh.E: 實作 Amazon EventBridge 規則以擷取 Amazon Bedrock 模型呼叫事件。將 token 使用資料路由至一個以 Amazon OpenSearch Serverless 為目標的 Amazon Data Firehose 傳遞串流。使用 OpenSearch 儀表板分析使用模式。

stem: A company is designing a solution that uses foundation models (FMs) to support multiple AI workloads. Some FMs must be invoked on demand and in real time. Other FMs require consistent high-throughput access for batch processing. The solution must support hybrid deployment patterns and run workloads across cloud infrastructure and on-premises infrastructure to comply with data residency and compliance requirements. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use AWS Lambda to orchestrate low-latency FM inference by invoking FMs hosted on Amazon SageMaker AI asynchronous endpoints.
options.B: Configure provisioned throughput in Amazon Bedrock to ensure consistent performance for high-volume workloads.
options.C: Deploy FMs to Amazon SageMaker AI endpoints with support for edge deployment by using Amazon SageMaker Neo. Orchestrate the FMs by using AWS Lambda to support hybrid deployment.
options.D: Use Amazon Bedrock with auto-scaling to handle unpredictable traffic surges.
options.E: Use Amazon SageMaker JumpStart to host and invoke the FMs.

explain: 一致高吞吐(批次)→ Bedrock provisioned throughput(B);混合雲端+地端(資料駐留)→ SageMaker Neo 邊緣部署 + Lambda(C)。SageMaker 非同步端點(A)非即時;auto-scaling(D)非一致高吞吐;Bedrock 不支援地端。
stem_zh: 某公司正在設計一個使用 foundation models (FMs) 來支援多個 AI 工作負載的解決方案。部分 FM 必須以隨需 (on demand) 且即時的方式呼叫。其他 FM 則需要一致的高吞吐量存取以進行批次處理。此解決方案必須支援混合部署模式，並在雲端基礎設施與地端 (on-premises) 基礎設施上執行工作負載，以符合資料落地 (data residency) 與合規需求。哪一組步驟能滿足這些需求？（選擇兩項。）

options_zh.A: 使用 AWS Lambda 來協調低延遲的 FM 推論，方式是呼叫託管於 Amazon SageMaker AI 非同步端點 (asynchronous endpoints) 上的 FM。
options_zh.B: 在 Amazon Bedrock 中設定 provisioned throughput，以確保高用量工作負載有一致的效能。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon SageMaker Neo 將 FM 部署至支援邊緣部署 (edge deployment) 的 Amazon SageMaker AI 端點。使用 AWS Lambda 協調這些 FM 以支援混合部署。
options_zh.D: 使用具有自動擴展 (auto-scaling) 功能的 Amazon Bedrock 來處理不可預測的流量激增。
options_zh.E: 使用 Amazon SageMaker JumpStart 來託管並呼叫這些 FM。

stem: A company is planning to deploy multiple generative AI (GenAI) applications to five independent business units that operate in multiple countries in Europe and the Americas. Each application uses Amazon Bedrock Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) patterns with business unit-specific knowledge bases that store terabytes of unstructured data. The company must establish well-architected, standardized components for security controls, observability practices, and deployment patterns across all the GenAI applications. The components must be reusable, versioned, and governed consistently. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure Amazon API Gateway REST API endpoints for the GenAI applications. Deploy common security, observability, and RAG patterns based on the AWS Well-Architected Generative AI Lens in standardized AWS CloudFormation templates. Use CloudFormation Guard after the deployment to validate policy compliance in each business unit.
options.B: Create standardized AWS CloudFormation templates to implement security, observability, and RAG patterns based on the AWS Well-Architected Generative AI Lens. Establish a centralized repository that performs version control. Integrate a CI/CD pipeline with CloudFormation Guard to enforce consistent and repeatable deployments across business units.
options.C: Use AWS Service Catalog to define standardized portfolios and versioned products for each business unit. Use the portfolios to enforce security, observability, and RAG patterns based on the AWS Well-Architected Generative AI Lens. Require the business units to use the Service Catalog console to deploy resources.
options.D: Document security controls, observability requirements, and RAG patterns based on the AWS Well-Architected Generative AI Lens in a shared design document. Use Amazon Macie to enforce deployment. Delegate implementation responsibility to each business unit.

explain: 標準化/可重複/版本化/一致治理 → CloudFormation 範本(IaC)+ 集中版本控制 + CI/CD + CloudFormation Guard(部署前強制)。部署後驗證(A)時機錯;文件(D)不可執行 + Macie 誤用。
stem_zh: 某公司正計劃將多個生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式部署至五個獨立的業務單位，這些業務單位在歐洲與美洲的多個國家營運。每個應用程式都使用 Amazon Bedrock 的 Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) 模式，搭配儲存數 TB 非結構化資料、各業務單位專屬的 knowledge bases。該公司必須為所有 GenAI 應用程式建立符合 well-architected 原則、標準化的元件，用於安全控制、可觀測性實務及部署模式。這些元件必須可重複使用、有版本控制，且受到一致的治理。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 為這些 GenAI 應用程式設定 Amazon API Gateway REST API 端點。根據 AWS Well-Architected Generative AI Lens，在標準化的 AWS CloudFormation 範本中部署共用的安全、可觀測性及 RAG 模式。部署後在每個業務單位使用 CloudFormation Guard 驗證政策合規性。
options_zh.B: 建立標準化的 AWS CloudFormation 範本，以根據 AWS Well-Architected Generative AI Lens 實作安全、可觀測性及 RAG 模式。建立一個執行版本控制的集中式儲存庫。整合一個搭配 CloudFormation Guard 的 CI/CD 管線，以強制在各業務單位之間進行一致且可重複的部署。
options_zh.C: 使用 AWS Service Catalog 為每個業務單位定義標準化的產品組合 (portfolios) 與有版本控制的產品。使用這些產品組合，根據 AWS Well-Architected Generative AI Lens 強制執行安全、可觀測性及 RAG 模式。要求各業務單位使用 Service Catalog 主控台來部署資源。
options_zh.D: 在一份共用的設計文件中，根據 AWS Well-Architected Generative AI Lens 記錄安全控制、可觀測性需求及 RAG 模式。使用 Amazon Macie 來強制執行部署。將實作責任委派給各業務單位。

stem: A company upgraded its Amazon Bedrock powered foundation model (FM) that supports a multilingual customer service assistant. After the upgrade, the assistant exhibited inconsistent behavior across languages. The assistant began generating different responses in some languages when presented with identical questions. The company needs a solution to detect and address similar problems for future updates. The evaluation must be completed within 45 minutes for all supported languages. The evaluation must process at least 15,000 test conversations in parallel. The evaluation process must be fully automated and integrated into the CI/CD pipeline. The solution must block deployment if quality thresholds are not met. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a distributed traffic simulation framework that sends translation-heavy workloads to the assistant in multiple languages simultaneously. Use Amazon CloudWatch metrics to monitor latency, concurrency, and throughput. Run simulations before production releases to identify infrastructure bottlenecks.
options.B: Deploy the assistant in multiple AWS Regions with Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing and AWS Global Accelerator to improve global performance. Store multilingual conversation logs in Amazon S3. Perform weekly post-deployment audits to review consistency.
options.C: Create a pre-processing pipeline that normalizes all incoming messages into a consistent format before sending the messages to the assistant. Apply rule-based checks to flag potential hallucinations in the outputs. Focus the evaluation on the normalized text to simplify testing across languages.
options.D: Set up standardized multilingual test conversations with identical meaning. Run the test conversations in parallel by using Amazon Bedrock model evaluation jobs. Apply similarity and hallucination thresholds. Integrate the process into the CI/CD pipeline to block releases that fail.

explain: 跨語言一致性評估 + 並行 + 自動化 + 阻擋部署 → 標準化「相同意義」測試集 + Bedrock model evaluation jobs(並行)+ 相似度/幻覺門檻 + CI/CD 阻擋。流量模擬(A)是測效能非回應品質;部署後稽核(B)無法阻擋。
stem_zh: 某公司升級了其以 Amazon Bedrock 驅動、支援多語言客戶服務助理的 foundation model (FM)。升級後，該助理在不同語言之間表現出不一致的行為。當面對相同的問題時，該助理開始在某些語言中產生不同的回應。該公司需要一個解決方案，以偵測並處理未來更新時類似的問題。此評估必須在 45 分鐘內針對所有支援的語言完成。此評估必須以並行方式處理至少 15,000 個測試對話。此評估流程必須完全自動化並整合至 CI/CD 管線中。此解決方案在未達到品質門檻時必須封鎖部署。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 建立一個分散式流量模擬框架，同時以多種語言將大量翻譯型工作負載送往該助理。使用 Amazon CloudWatch metrics 監控延遲、並行數與吞吐量。在正式環境發行前執行模擬，以辨識基礎設施瓶頸。
options_zh.B: 將該助理部署在多個 AWS Region，搭配 Amazon Route 53 以延遲為基礎的路由 (latency-based routing) 及 AWS Global Accelerator 以改善全球效能。將多語言對話日誌儲存於 Amazon S3。每週執行部署後稽核以檢視一致性。
options_zh.C: 建立一個前處理管線，在將訊息送往該助理之前，將所有傳入的訊息正規化為一致的格式。套用以規則為基礎的檢查，以標示輸出中潛在的幻覺 (hallucinations)。將評估聚焦於正規化後的文字，以簡化跨語言的測試。
options_zh.D: 設定意義相同的標準化多語言測試對話。使用 Amazon Bedrock 模型評估工作 (model evaluation jobs) 以並行方式執行這些測試對話。套用相似度與幻覺門檻。將此流程整合至 CI/CD 管線，以封鎖未通過的發行。

stem: A company is developing a generative AI (GenAI) application that uses Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs). The application has several custom tool integrations. The application has experienced unexpected token consumption surges despite consistent user traffic. The company needs a solution that uses Amazon Bedrock model invocation logging to monitor InputTokenCount metrics and OutputTokenCount metrics. The solution must detect unusual patterns in tool usage and identify which specific tool integrations cause abnormal token consumption. The solution must also automatically adjust thresholds as traffic patterns change. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs to capture model invocation logs. Create CloudWatch dashboards based on InputTokenCount metrics and OutputTokenCount metrics. Configure static CloudWatch alarms with fixed thresholds for each tool integration.
options.B: Store model invocation logs in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use AWS Glue to catalog the logs. Analyze token consumption patterns by using scheduled Amazon Athena queries that generate reports on tool usage trends.
options.C: Use Amazon CloudWatch Logs to capture model invocation logs. Create CloudWatch metric filters to extract tool-specific invocation patterns. Apply CloudWatch anomaly detection alarms that adjust baselines for each tool's metrics.
options.D: Store model invocation logs in an Amazon S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function to process logs in real time. Manually update Amazon CloudWatch alarm thresholds based on token consumption trends that the Lambda function identifies.

explain: 偵測異常 + 識別特定工具 + 自動調整門檻 → CloudWatch metric filters(抽取工具特定指標)+ anomaly detection 警報(自動調整基準)。固定門檻(A)/手動更新(D)不自動調整;Athena 報告(B)是批次。
stem_zh: 某公司正在開發一個使用 Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs) 的生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式。此應用程式有數個自訂工具整合 (tool integrations)。儘管使用者流量一致，此應用程式仍經歷了非預期的 token 消耗激增。該公司需要一個使用 Amazon Bedrock 模型呼叫記錄來監控 InputTokenCount metrics 與 OutputTokenCount metrics 的解決方案。此解決方案必須偵測工具使用中的異常模式，並辨識出哪些特定的工具整合導致異常的 token 消耗。此解決方案還必須在流量模式改變時自動調整門檻。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 擷取模型呼叫日誌。根據 InputTokenCount metrics 與 OutputTokenCount metrics 建立 CloudWatch 儀表板。為每個工具整合設定具有固定門檻的靜態 CloudWatch alarms。
options_zh.B: 將模型呼叫日誌儲存於 Amazon S3 儲存貯體。使用 AWS Glue 對日誌建立目錄。使用排程的 Amazon Athena 查詢分析 token 消耗模式，產生工具使用趨勢報告。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 擷取模型呼叫日誌。建立 CloudWatch metric filters 以擷取各工具特定的呼叫模式。套用 CloudWatch anomaly detection alarms，為每個工具的 metrics 調整基準 (baselines)。
options_zh.D: 將模型呼叫日誌儲存於 Amazon S3 儲存貯體。建立一個 AWS Lambda 函數以即時處理日誌。根據 Lambda 函數所辨識出的 token 消耗趨勢，手動更新 Amazon CloudWatch alarm 門檻。

stem: A company is using Amazon Bedrock to develop an AI-powered application that uses a foundation model (FM) that supports cross-Region inference and provisioned throughput. The application must serve users in Europe and North America with consistently low latency. The application must comply with data residency regulations that require European user data to remain within Europe-based AWS Regions. During testing, the application experiences service degradation when Regional traffic spikes reach service quotas. The company needs a solution that maintains application resilience and minimizes operational complexity. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy separate Amazon Bedrock instances in North American and European Regions. Use a custom routing layer that directs traffic based on user location. Configure Amazon CloudWatch alarms to monitor Regional service usage. Use Amazon SNS to send email alerts to the company when usage approaches specified thresholds.
options.B: Use Amazon Bedrock cross-Region inference profiles by specifying geographical codes in profile IDs when the application calls the InvokeModel API. Configure separate Amazon API Gateway HTTP APIs to direct European and North American users to the appropriate Regional endpoints.
options.C: Deploy a multi-Region Amazon API Gateway HTTP API and AWS Lambda functions that implement retry logic to handle throttling. Configure the Lambda functions to call the FM in the nearest secondary Region when the application reaches service quotas in the primary Region. Use intelligent routing to ensure compliance with data residency requirements.
options.D: Configure provisioned throughput for Amazon Bedrock in multiple Regions. Implement failover logic in the application code to switch between Regions when throttling occurs. Use AWS Global Accelerator to route traffic to the appropriate endpoints based on user location.

explain: 跨區低延遲 + 資料駐留 + 應對配額 + 最少複雜度 → cross-Region inference profiles(地理代碼保留歐洲 + 分散流量)+ API Gateway 區域導流。自訂路由(A)/自建故障轉移(C、D)複雜且可能切出歐洲違反駐留。
stem_zh: 某公司正在使用 Amazon Bedrock 開發一個 AI 驅動的應用程式，該應用程式使用一個支援跨 Region 推論 (cross-Region inference) 與 provisioned throughput 的 foundation model (FM)。此應用程式必須以一致的低延遲服務歐洲與北美的使用者。此應用程式必須符合資料落地 (data residency) 法規，這些法規要求歐洲使用者資料必須保留在歐洲的 AWS Region 內。測試期間，當 Region 流量激增達到服務 quota 時，此應用程式出現服務降級。該公司需要一個能維持應用程式韌性並將營運複雜度降至最低的解決方案。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 在北美與歐洲 Region 部署各自獨立的 Amazon Bedrock 實例。使用自訂的路由層，根據使用者位置導向流量。設定 Amazon CloudWatch alarms 以監控各 Region 的服務使用量。使用 Amazon SNS 在使用量接近指定門檻時向公司寄送電子郵件警示。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon Bedrock 跨 Region 推論設定檔 (cross-Region inference profiles)，方式是在應用程式呼叫 InvokeModel API 時於設定檔 ID 中指定地理代碼。設定各自獨立的 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API，將歐洲與北美使用者導向適當的 Region 端點。
options_zh.C: 部署一個跨多 Region 的 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API 與實作重試邏輯的 AWS Lambda 函數以處理 throttling。設定這些 Lambda 函數，在應用程式於主要 Region 達到服務 quota 時，於最近的次要 Region 呼叫 FM。使用智慧路由以確保符合資料落地需求。
options_zh.D: 在多個 Region 為 Amazon Bedrock 設定 provisioned throughput。在應用程式程式碼中實作容錯移轉 (failover) 邏輯，以在發生 throttling 時於 Region 之間切換。使用 AWS Global Accelerator 根據使用者位置將流量路由至適當的端點。

stem: An international company is building an AI assistant that uses RAG. The company wants the AI assistant to have near real-time, low-latency performance. The AI assistant must provide service to several geographic areas. The company's customers will use proprietary data with the AI assistant. The proprietary data must not leave the company's immediate geographic area. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy an Amazon Bedrock model with a cross-Region model inference profile. Create Amazon S3 buckets in each AWS Region the company operates in. Store a knowledge base in each respective S3 bucket. In each Region, configure Amazon Kendra to interact with the respective knowledge base. In each Region, configure an AWS Lambda function that uses Kendra and Amazon Bedrock to process AI assistant prompts.
options.B: Deploy an Amazon Bedrock model in each AWS Region the company operates in. Configure an Amazon Bedrock cross-Region model inference profile. Configure a vector database that uses Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases. Store the knowledge bases in Amazon S3 in each Region the company operates in.
options.C: Use AWS Outposts to deploy an outpost in each AWS Region the company operates in. Create Amazon S3 buckets to store knowledge bases in each corresponding Region. Deploy Amazon RDS configured as a vector database to each outpost. Deploy an Amazon Bedrock model with a cross-Region inference profile in a central Region.
options.D: Configure a knowledge base stored in the Amazon S3 Express One Zone storage class in each AWS Local Zone the company operates in. Use Amazon RDS to deploy a vector database in each Local Zone the company operates in. Deploy a large language model (LLM) to Amazon EC2 instances in each Local Zone. Configure the AI assistant to route prompts to the model in the respective Local Zone.

explain: RAG + 多區 + 低延遲 + 資料駐留 → 每區部署 Bedrock 模型 + Knowledge Bases 向量 DB + 知識庫存各區 S3。Kendra(A)非 Bedrock RAG 向量元件;Outposts(C)是地端非 AWS 多區;EC2 自建 LLM(D)負擔高。
stem_zh: 某跨國公司正在建置一個使用 RAG 的 AI 助理。該公司希望此 AI 助理具有近乎即時的低延遲效能。此 AI 助理必須為數個地理區域提供服務。該公司的客戶將使用專屬資料搭配此 AI 助理。這些專屬資料不得離開公司所在的直接地理區域。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 部署一個搭配跨 Region 模型推論設定檔的 Amazon Bedrock 模型。在公司營運的每個 AWS Region 建立 Amazon S3 儲存貯體。在各自的 S3 儲存貯體中儲存一個 knowledge base。在每個 Region，設定 Amazon Kendra 與各自的 knowledge base 互動。在每個 Region，設定一個使用 Kendra 與 Amazon Bedrock 來處理 AI 助理 prompt 的 AWS Lambda 函數。
options_zh.B: 在公司營運的每個 AWS Region 部署一個 Amazon Bedrock 模型。設定一個 Amazon Bedrock 跨 Region 模型推論設定檔。設定一個使用 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases 的向量資料庫。在公司營運的每個 Region 將 knowledge bases 儲存於 Amazon S3。
options_zh.C: 使用 AWS Outposts 在公司營運的每個 AWS Region 部署一個 outpost。建立 Amazon S3 儲存貯體，在每個對應的 Region 儲存 knowledge bases。在每個 outpost 部署設定為向量資料庫的 Amazon RDS。在一個中央 Region 部署一個搭配跨 Region 推論設定檔的 Amazon Bedrock 模型。
options_zh.D: 在公司營運的每個 AWS Local Zone，設定一個儲存於 Amazon S3 Express One Zone 儲存類別的 knowledge base。使用 Amazon RDS 在公司營運的每個 Local Zone 部署一個向量資料庫。在每個 Local Zone 將一個大型語言模型 (LLM) 部署至 Amazon EC2 實例。設定 AI 助理，將 prompt 路由至各自 Local Zone 中的模型。

stem: A company is building a generative AI (GenAI) application that processes financial reports and provides summaries for analysts. The application must run two compute environments. In one environment, AWS Lambda function must use the Python SDK to analyze reports on demand. In the second environment, Amazon EKS containers must use the JavaScript SDK to batch process multiple reports on a schedule. The application must maintain conversational context throughout multi-tum interactions, use the same foundation model (FM) across environments, and ensure consistent authentication. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use the Amazon Bedrock InvokeModel API with a separate authentication method for each environment. Store conversation states in Amazon DynamoDB. Use custom I/O formatting logic for each programming language.
options.B: Use the Amazon Bedrock Converse API directly in both environments with a common authentication mechanism that uses IAM roles. Store conversation states in Amazon ElastiCache. Creating programming language-specific wrappers for model parameters.
options.C: Create a centralized Amazon API Gateway REST API endpoint that handles all model interactions by using the InvokeModel API. Store interaction history in application process memory in each Lambda function or EKS container. Use environment variables to configure model parameters.
options.D: Use the Amazon Bedrock Converse API and IAM roles for authentication. Pass previous messages in the request messages array to maintain conversational context. Use programming language-specific SDKs to establish consistent API interfaces.

explain: 跨環境一致 FM + 多輪脈絡 + 一致認證 → Converse API(一致介面+多輪)+ messages array 傳對話歷史(脈絡)+ IAM 角色(一致認證)。獨立認證(A)不一致;process memory(C)易失不跨實例。
stem_zh: 某公司正在建置一個處理財務報告並為分析師提供摘要的生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式。此應用程式必須執行兩個運算環境。在其中一個環境中，AWS Lambda 函數必須使用 Python SDK 隨需分析報告。在第二個環境中，Amazon EKS 容器必須使用 JavaScript SDK 依排程批次處理多份報告。此應用程式必須在多輪 (multi-turn) 互動過程中維持對話脈絡、在各環境間使用相同的 foundation model (FM)，並確保一致的驗證。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon Bedrock InvokeModel API，並為每個環境採用各自獨立的驗證方法。將對話狀態儲存於 Amazon DynamoDB。為每種程式語言使用自訂的 I/O 格式化邏輯。
options_zh.B: 在兩個環境中直接使用 Amazon Bedrock Converse API，並採用一個使用 IAM roles 的共用驗證機制。將對話狀態儲存於 Amazon ElastiCache。為模型參數建立各程式語言專屬的封裝 (wrappers)。
options_zh.C: 建立一個集中式的 Amazon API Gateway REST API 端點，使用 InvokeModel API 處理所有模型互動。在每個 Lambda 函數或 EKS 容器的應用程式處理程序記憶體中儲存互動歷史。使用環境變數設定模型參數。
options_zh.D: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Converse API 與 IAM roles 進行驗證。在請求的 messages 陣列中傳入先前的訊息以維持對話脈絡。使用各程式語言專屬的 SDK 來建立一致的 API 介面。

stem: A company is building a serverless application that uses AWS Lambda functions to help students around the world summarize notes. The application uses Anthropic Claude through Amazon Bedrock. The company observed that most of the traffic occurs during evenings in each time zone. Users report experiencing throttling errors during peak usage times in their times zones. The company needs to resolve the throttling issues by ensuring continuous operation of the application. The solution must maintain application performance quality. The company needs a solution that does not require a fixed hourly cost during low traffic periods. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create custom Amazon CloudWatch metrics to monitor model errors. Set provisioned throughput to a value that is safely higher than the peak traffic observed.
options.B: Create custom Amazon CloudWatch metrics to monitor model errors. Set up a failover mechanism to redirect invocations to a backup AWS Region when the errors exceed a specified threshold.
options.C: Enable invocation logging in Amazon Bedrock. Monitor key metrics such as Invocations, InputTokenCount, OutputTokenCount, and Invocation Throttles. Distribute traffic across cross-Region inference endpoints.
options.D: Enable invocation logging in Amazon Bedrock. Monitor InvocationLatency, InvocationClientErrors, and InvocationServerErrors metrics. Distribute traffic across multiple versions of the same model.

explain: 節流 + 低流量不需固定成本 → cross-Region inference endpoints(分散流量解節流 + 按用量,無固定成本)。provisioned throughput(A)是固定成本違反需求;故障轉移(B)是被動備援;同區多版本(D)不解決區域配額。
stem_zh: 某公司正在建置一個使用 AWS Lambda 函數的無伺服器應用程式，協助全球學生摘要筆記。此應用程式透過 Amazon Bedrock 使用 Anthropic Claude。該公司觀察到大多數流量發生在各時區的傍晚。使用者回報在其所在時區的尖峰使用時段遭遇 throttling 錯誤。該公司需要透過確保應用程式持續運作來解決 throttling 問題。此解決方案必須維持應用程式的效能品質。該公司需要一個在低流量期間不需固定每小時成本的解決方案。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 建立自訂的 Amazon CloudWatch metrics 以監控模型錯誤。將 provisioned throughput 設定為一個安全地高於所觀察到尖峰流量的值。
options_zh.B: 建立自訂的 Amazon CloudWatch metrics 以監控模型錯誤。設定一個容錯移轉 (failover) 機制，在錯誤超過指定門檻時將呼叫重新導向至備援的 AWS Region。
options_zh.C: 在 Amazon Bedrock 中啟用呼叫記錄。監控 Invocations、InputTokenCount、OutputTokenCount 及 Invocation Throttles 等關鍵 metrics。將流量分散至跨 Region 推論端點。
options_zh.D: 在 Amazon Bedrock 中啟用呼叫記錄。監控 InvocationLatency、InvocationClientErrors 及 InvocationServerErrors metrics。將流量分散至同一模型的多個版本。

stem: A company is developing a new AI-powered application that needs to integrate with various specialized tools. These tools currently run as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers on the local machines of developers and do not maintain states between invocations. The company plans to deploy each MCP server as an AWS Lambda function to support the company's production application. The solution must be accessible to both internal applications and authorized third-party partners. The solution must use strict authentication and authorization controls. Which additional steps will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create a custom Lambda invocation transport by using the Lambda Invoke API. Implement IAM authentication and grant InvokeFunction permissions to authorized users and roles.
options.B: Expose the Lambda functions through Amazon API Gateway REST API endpoints. Implement API keys for authentication. Configure the applications that need to access the MCP servers to use standard HTTP requests instead of the MCP protocol.
options.C: Create Lambda function URLs and enable a custom Streamable HTTP transport and SigV4. Implement AWS IAM authentication. Grant InvokeFunctionUrl permissions to authorized users and roles.
options.D: Expose the Lambda function through Amazon API Gateway HTTP API endpoints with the Streamable HTTP transport. Use Amazon Cognito to implement OAuth authentication. Configure API Gateway to validate OAuth tokens.

explain: MCP on Lambda + 最少負擔(含第三方)→ Lambda Function URL(免管 API Gateway)+ Streamable HTTP + SigV4/IAM(IAM 可跨帳號授權第三方)。別因「第三方」反射選 OAuth(D);Function URL+IAM 元件最少。放棄 MCP(B)錯。
stem_zh: 某公司正在開發一個新的 AI 驅動應用程式，需要與各種專門工具整合。這些工具目前以 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 伺服器的形式在開發人員的本機上執行，且在呼叫之間不維持狀態。該公司計劃將每個 MCP 伺服器部署為一個 AWS Lambda 函數，以支援該公司的正式環境應用程式。此解決方案必須能讓內部應用程式與經授權的第三方合作夥伴皆可存取。此解決方案必須使用嚴格的驗證與授權控制。哪些額外步驟能以最少的營運開銷滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Lambda Invoke API 建立一個自訂的 Lambda 呼叫傳輸。實作 IAM 驗證，並將 InvokeFunction 權限授予經授權的使用者與 roles。
options_zh.B: 透過 Amazon API Gateway REST API 端點公開這些 Lambda 函數。實作 API keys 進行驗證。設定需要存取 MCP 伺服器的應用程式使用標準 HTTP 請求，而非 MCP 協定。
options_zh.C: 建立 Lambda function URLs 並啟用自訂的 Streamable HTTP 傳輸與 SigV4。實作 AWS IAM 驗證。將 InvokeFunctionUrl 權限授予經授權的使用者與 roles。
options_zh.D: 透過搭配 Streamable HTTP 傳輸的 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API 端點公開這些 Lambda 函數。使用 Amazon Cognito 實作 OAuth 驗證。設定 API Gateway 以驗證 OAuth tokens。

stem: A company has a generative AI (GenAI) application that uses Amazon Bedrock to provide real-time responses to customer queries. The company has noticed intermittent failures with API calls to foundation models (FMs) during peak traffic periods. The company needs a solution to handle transient errors and provide detailed observability into FM performance. The solution must prevent cascading failures during throttling events and provide distributed tracing across service boundaries to identify latency contributors. The solution must also enable correlation of performance issues with specific FM characteristics. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Implement a custom retry mechanism with a fixed delay of 1 second between retries. Configure Amazon CloudWatch alarms to monitor the application's error rates and latency metrics.
options.B: Configure the AWS SDK with standard retry mode and exponential backoff with jitter. Use AWS X-Ray tracing with annotations to identify and filter service components.
options.C: Implement client-side caching of all FM responses. Add custom logging statements in the application code to record API call durations.
options.D: Configure the AWS SDK with adaptive retry mode. Use AWS CloudTrail distributed tracing to monitor throttling events.

explain: 處理暫時錯誤 + 防連鎖 + 分散式追蹤 + 關聯 FM 特徵 → 指數退避+jitter(防連鎖)+ AWS X-Ray annotations(分散式追蹤+過濾關聯)。固定延遲(A)不防連鎖;CloudTrail(D)是 API 稽核非分散式追蹤。
stem_zh: 某公司有一個使用 Amazon Bedrock 對客戶查詢提供即時回應的生成式 AI (GenAI) 應用程式。該公司注意到在尖峰流量期間，對 foundation models (FMs) 的 API 呼叫出現間歇性失敗。該公司需要一個解決方案來處理暫時性錯誤，並對 FM 效能提供詳細的可觀測性。此解決方案必須在 throttling 事件期間防止級聯故障 (cascading failures)，並提供跨服務邊界的分散式追蹤 (distributed tracing) 以辨識延遲的成因。此解決方案還必須能將效能問題與特定 FM 特性建立關聯。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 實作一個自訂的重試機制，重試之間採用 1 秒的固定延遲。設定 Amazon CloudWatch alarms 以監控應用程式的錯誤率與延遲 metrics。
options_zh.B: 將 AWS SDK 設定為標準重試模式 (standard retry mode)，並採用搭配 jitter 的指數退避 (exponential backoff)。使用搭配註解 (annotations) 的 AWS X-Ray tracing 來辨識並篩選服務元件。
options_zh.C: 實作所有 FM 回應的用戶端快取 (client-side caching)。在應用程式程式碼中加入自訂的記錄陳述式以記錄 API 呼叫的持續時間。
options_zh.D: 將 AWS SDK 設定為調適性重試模式 (adaptive retry mode)。使用 AWS CloudTrail 分散式追蹤來監控 throttling 事件。

stem: A company is building a video analysis platform on AWS. The platform will analyze a large video archive by using Amazon Rekognition and Amazon Bedrock. The platform must comply with predefined privacy standards. The platform must also use secure model I/O, control foundation model (FM) access patterns, and provide an audit of who accessed what and when. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure VPC endpoints for Amazon Bedrock model API calls. Implement Amazon Bedrock Guardrails to filter harmful or unauthorized content in prompts and responses. Use Amazon Bedrock trace events to track all agent and model invocations for auditing purposes. Export the traces to Amazon CloudWatch Logs as an audit record of model usage. Store all prompts and outputs in Amazon S3 with server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS).
options.B: Define access control by using IAM with attribute-based controls to map departments to specific permissions. Configure VPC endpoints for Amazon Bedrock model API calls. Use IAM condition keys to enforce specific GuardrailIdentifier and ModelId values. Configure AWS CloudTrail to capture management and data events for S3 objects and KMS key usage activities. Enable S3 server access logging to record detailed file-level interactions with the video archives. Send all CloudTrail logs to AWS CloudTrail Lake. Set up Amazon CloudWatch alarms to detect and alert on unexpected activity from Amazon Bedrock, Amazon Rekognition, and AWS KMS.
options.C: Restrict access to services by using VPC endpoint policies. Use AWS Config to track resource changes and compliance with security rules. Use server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) to encrypt data at rest. Store the model's I/O in separate Amazon S3 buckets. Enable S3 server access logging to track file-level interactions.
options.D: Configure AWS CloudTrail Insights to analyze API call patterns across accounts and detect anomalous activity in Amazon Bedrock, Amazon Rekognition, Amazon S3, and AWS KMS. Deploy Amazon Macie to scan and classify the video archive. Use server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) to encrypt all stored data. Configure CloudTrail to capture KMS API usage events for audit purposes. Configure Amazon EventBridge rules to process CloudTrail Insights anomalies and Macie findings. Use CloudWatch alarms to trigger automated notifications and security responses when potential security issues are detected.

explain: 隱私+安全I/O+控制FM存取+稽核誰何時存取什麼 → VPC endpoint + IAM condition keys(GuardrailId/ModelId 控制FM存取)+ CloudTrail data events + S3 access logging + CloudTrail Lake。Config(C)非存取稽核;Macie(D)無法分類影片;trace events(A)非存取稽核。
stem_zh: 某公司正在 AWS 上建置一個影片分析平台。此平台將使用 Amazon Rekognition 與 Amazon Bedrock 來分析大量的影片封存資料。此平台必須符合預先定義的隱私標準。此平台還必須使用安全的模型 I/O、控制 foundation model (FM) 的存取模式，並提供誰在何時存取了什麼的稽核紀錄。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 為 Amazon Bedrock 模型 API 呼叫設定 VPC 端點。實作 Amazon Bedrock Guardrails 以過濾 prompt 與回應中有害或未經授權的內容。使用 Amazon Bedrock trace events 追蹤所有 agent 與模型呼叫以供稽核之用。將這些追蹤匯出至 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 作為模型使用的稽核紀錄。將所有 prompt 與輸出儲存於使用 AWS KMS keys 之伺服器端加密 (SSE-KMS) 的 Amazon S3。
options_zh.B: 使用 IAM 搭配以屬性為基礎的控制 (attribute-based controls) 定義存取控制，將部門對應至特定權限。為 Amazon Bedrock 模型 API 呼叫設定 VPC 端點。使用 IAM 條件鍵 (condition keys) 強制執行特定的 GuardrailIdentifier 與 ModelId 值。設定 AWS CloudTrail 以擷取 S3 物件與 KMS key 使用活動的管理事件與資料事件。啟用 S3 伺服器存取記錄以記錄與影片封存資料的詳細檔案層級互動。將所有 CloudTrail 日誌傳送至 AWS CloudTrail Lake。設定 Amazon CloudWatch alarms 以偵測並對來自 Amazon Bedrock、Amazon Rekognition 及 AWS KMS 的非預期活動發出警示。
options_zh.C: 使用 VPC 端點政策限制對服務的存取。使用 AWS Config 追蹤資源變更與安全規則的合規性。使用 AWS KMS keys 之伺服器端加密 (SSE-KMS) 加密靜態資料。將模型的 I/O 儲存於各自獨立的 Amazon S3 儲存貯體。啟用 S3 伺服器存取記錄以追蹤檔案層級互動。
options_zh.D: 設定 AWS CloudTrail Insights 以分析跨帳戶的 API 呼叫模式，並偵測 Amazon Bedrock、Amazon Rekognition、Amazon S3 及 AWS KMS 中的異常活動。部署 Amazon Macie 以掃描並分類影片封存資料。使用 AWS KMS keys 之伺服器端加密 (SSE-KMS) 加密所有儲存的資料。設定 CloudTrail 以擷取 KMS API 使用事件供稽核之用。設定 Amazon EventBridge 規則以處理 CloudTrail Insights 異常與 Macie 發現項目。使用 CloudWatch alarms 在偵測到潛在安全問題時觸發自動化通知與安全回應。

stem: An insurance company uses existing Amazon SageMaker AI infrastructure to support a web-based application that allows customers to predict what their insurance premiums will be. The company stores customer data that is used to train the SageMaker AI model in an Amazon S3 bucket. The dataset is growing rapidly. The company wants a solution to continuously re-train the model. The solution must automatically re-train and re-deploy the model to the application when an employee uploads a new customer data file to the S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Glue to run an ETL job on each uploaded file. Configure the ETL job to use the AWS SDK to invoke the Sage Maker AI model endpoint. Use real-time inference with the endpoint to re-deploy the model after it is re-trained on the updated customer dataset.
options.B: Create an AWS Lambda function and webhook handlers to generate an event when an employee uploads a new file. Configure SageMaker Pipelines to re-deploy the model after it is re-trained on the updated customer dataset. Use Amazon EventBridge to create an event bus. Set the Lambda function event as the source and SageMaker Pipelines as the target.
options.C: Create an AWS Step Functions Express workflow with AWS SDK integrations to retrieve the customer data from the S3 bucket when an employee uploads a new file to the S3 bucket. Use a SageMaker Data Wrangler flow to export the data from the S3 bucket to SageMaker Autopilot. Use SageMaker Autopilot to re-deploy the model after it has been re-trained on the updated customer dataset.
options.D: Create an AWS Step Functions Standard workflow. Configure the first state to call an AWS Lambda function to respond when an employee uploads a new file to the S3 bucket. Use a pipeline in SageMaker Pipelines to re-deploy the model after it has been re-trained on the updated customer dataset. Use the next state in the workflow to run the pipeline when the first state receives a response.

explain: 「上傳新檔自動重訓＋重部署 + 狀態管理編排」→ Step Functions Standard(支援長時間執行＋狀態管理,適合可能跑很久的訓練,避開 Express 5 分上限)+ Lambda 回應 S3 上傳 + SageMaker Pipelines(重訓＋部署)。B 用 webhook handlers 對內部 S3 上傳過度複雜,且透過自訂事件巴士觸發缺狀態管理;Express(C)5 分上限重訓會超時且 Autopilot 是 AutoML 非既有模型重訓;Glue＋即時推論(A)沒有重訓步驟。
stem_zh: 某保險公司使用既有的 Amazon SageMaker AI 基礎設施來支援一個以網頁為基礎的應用程式，讓客戶能預測其保費將是多少。該公司將用於訓練 SageMaker AI 模型的客戶資料儲存於一個 Amazon S3 儲存貯體。資料集正在快速成長。該公司希望有一個持續重新訓練模型的解決方案。此解決方案必須在員工將新的客戶資料檔案上傳至 S3 儲存貯體時，自動重新訓練模型並將其重新部署至應用程式。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 AWS Glue 對每個上傳的檔案執行一個 ETL 工作。設定該 ETL 工作使用 AWS SDK 呼叫 SageMaker AI 模型端點。使用該端點的即時推論，在模型於更新後的客戶資料集上重新訓練後重新部署模型。
options_zh.B: 建立一個 AWS Lambda 函數與 webhook 處理常式，在員工上傳新檔案時產生事件。設定 SageMaker Pipelines，在模型於更新後的客戶資料集上重新訓練後重新部署模型。使用 Amazon EventBridge 建立一個事件匯流排 (event bus)。將 Lambda 函數事件設為來源，並將 SageMaker Pipelines 設為目標。
options_zh.C: 建立一個搭配 AWS SDK 整合的 AWS Step Functions Express 工作流程，在員工將新檔案上傳至 S3 儲存貯體時從該儲存貯體擷取客戶資料。使用 SageMaker Data Wrangler 流程將資料從 S3 儲存貯體匯出至 SageMaker Autopilot。使用 SageMaker Autopilot 在模型於更新後的客戶資料集上重新訓練後重新部署模型。
options_zh.D: 建立一個 AWS Step Functions Standard 工作流程。設定第一個狀態以在員工將新檔案上傳至 S3 儲存貯體時呼叫一個 AWS Lambda 函數作出回應。使用 SageMaker Pipelines 中的一個管線，在模型於更新後的客戶資料集上重新訓練後重新部署模型。使用工作流程中的下一個狀態，在第一個狀態收到回應時執行該管線。

stem: A company uses Amazon Bedrock to implement a Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)-based system to serve medical information to users. The company needs to compare multiple chunking strategies, evaluate the generation quality of two foundation models (FMs), and enforce quality thresholds for deployment. Which Amazon Bedrock evaluation configuration will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a retrieve-only evaluation job that uses a supported version of Anthropic Claude Sonnet as the evaluator model. Configure metrics for context relevance and context coverage. Define deployment thresholds in a separate CI/CD pipeline.
options.B: Create a retrieve-and-generate evaluation job that uses custom precision at k metrics and an LLM-as-a-judge metric that uses a scale of 1-5. Include each chunking strategy in the evaluation dataset. Use a supported version of Anthropic Claude Sonnet to evaluate responses from both FMs.
options.C: Create a separate evaluation job for each chunking strategy and FM combination. Use Amazon Bedrock built-in metrics for correctness and completeness. Manually review scores before deployment approval.
options.D: Set up a pipeline that uses multiple retrieve-only evaluation jobs to assess retrieval quality. Create separate evaluation jobs for both FMs that use Amazon Nova Pro as the LLM-as-a-judge model. Evaluate based on faithfulness and citation precision metrics.

explain: 評估生成品質 + 比較分塊 + 兩 FM + 門檻 → retrieve-and-generate 評估(評生成)+ 各分塊納入資料集 + LLM-as-a-judge。retrieve-only(A、D)只評檢索不評生成;手動審查(C)非強制門檻。
stem_zh: 某公司使用 Amazon Bedrock 實作一個以 Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) 為基礎的系統，向使用者提供醫療資訊。該公司需要比較多種分塊策略 (chunking strategies)、評估兩個 foundation models (FMs) 的產生品質，並為部署強制執行品質門檻。哪一個 Amazon Bedrock 評估設定能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 建立一個僅擷取 (retrieve-only) 的評估工作，使用受支援版本的 Anthropic Claude Sonnet 作為評估者模型。設定 context relevance 與 context coverage 的 metrics。在另一個獨立的 CI/CD 管線中定義部署門檻。
options_zh.B: 建立一個擷取並產生 (retrieve-and-generate) 的評估工作，使用自訂的 precision at k metrics 以及採用 1 到 5 分制的 LLM-as-a-judge metric。將每種分塊策略納入評估資料集中。使用受支援版本的 Anthropic Claude Sonnet 評估來自兩個 FM 的回應。
options_zh.C: 為每種分塊策略與 FM 的組合建立各自獨立的評估工作。使用 Amazon Bedrock 內建的 correctness 與 completeness metrics。在核准部署前手動檢視分數。
options_zh.D: 設定一個使用多個僅擷取 (retrieve-only) 評估工作的管線以評估擷取品質。為兩個 FM 建立各自獨立、使用 Amazon Nova Pro 作為 LLM-as-a-judge 模型的評估工作。根據 faithfulness 與 citation precision metrics 進行評估。

stem: A wildlife conservation agency operates zoos globally. The agency uses various sensors, trackers, and audiovisual recorders to monitor animal behavior. The agency wants to launch a generative AI (GenAI) assistant that can ingest multimodal data to study animal behavior. The GenAI assistant must support natural language queries, avoid speculative behavioral interpretations, and maintain audit logs for ethical research audits. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Ingest raw videos into Amazon Rekognition to detect animal postures and expressions. Use Amazon Data Firehose to stream sensor and GPS data into an Amazon S3 data lake. Prompt an Amazon Bedrock foundation model (FM) by using basic templates that are stored in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Use IAM policies to control access. Use AWS CloudTrail for audit logging.
options.B: Use Amazon SageMaker Processing and Amazon Transcribe to pre-process multimodal data. Ingest summaries into an Amazon Bedrock Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) knowledge base. Apply Amazon Bedrock guardrails to restrict speculative outputs. Use AWS AppConfig to manage prompt templates. Use AWS CloudTrail to log research activity for audits.
options.C: Use Amazon OpenSearch Serverless to index behavioral logs and telemetry events. Use Amazon Comprehend to extract entities. Use Amazon Bedrock to build a layer to answer questions. Embed study summaries into OpenSearch Serverless documents. Use IAM to control access. Use AWS CloudTrail to log user interactions with the AI assistant.
options.D: Configure Amazon Q Business to federate data across Amazon S3, Amazon Kinesis, and Amazon SageMaker Feature Store. Configure Amazon EventBridge to invoke data ingestion jobs. Use custom AWS Lambda functions to filter large language model (LLM) outputs for ethical compliance before returning results to users.

explain: 多模態 + 自然語言 + 避免推測 + 稽核 → SageMaker Processing/Transcribe(多模態預處理)+ Bedrock RAG(自然語言)+ Guardrails(限制推測性輸出)+ CloudTrail(稽核)。基本範本(A)/自建 Lambda 過濾(D)無法可靠避免推測。
stem_zh: 某野生動物保育機構在全球營運動物園。該機構使用各種感測器、追蹤器及視聽錄製設備來監控動物行為。該機構希望推出一個能擷取多模態 (multimodal) 資料以研究動物行為的生成式 AI (GenAI) 助理。此 GenAI 助理必須支援自然語言查詢、避免臆測性的行為詮釋，並維持稽核日誌以供倫理研究稽核之用。哪一個解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 將原始影片擷取至 Amazon Rekognition 以偵測動物姿態與表情。使用 Amazon Data Firehose 將感測器與 GPS 資料串流至 Amazon S3 資料湖。使用儲存於 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 的基本範本來向 Amazon Bedrock foundation model (FM) 下 prompt。使用 IAM 政策控制存取。使用 AWS CloudTrail 進行稽核記錄。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon SageMaker Processing 與 Amazon Transcribe 預先處理多模態資料。將摘要擷取至一個 Amazon Bedrock Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) knowledge base。套用 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 以限制臆測性的輸出。使用 AWS AppConfig 管理 prompt 範本。使用 AWS CloudTrail 記錄研究活動以供稽核。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon OpenSearch Serverless 索引行為日誌與遙測事件。使用 Amazon Comprehend 擷取實體 (entities)。使用 Amazon Bedrock 建立一個回答問題的層。將研究摘要嵌入 (embed) 至 OpenSearch Serverless 文件中。使用 IAM 控制存取。使用 AWS CloudTrail 記錄使用者與 AI 助理的互動。
options_zh.D: 設定 Amazon Q Business 以跨 Amazon S3、Amazon Kinesis 及 Amazon SageMaker Feature Store 聯合 (federate) 資料。設定 Amazon EventBridge 以呼叫資料擷取工作。使用自訂的 AWS Lambda 函數，在將結果回傳給使用者之前篩選大型語言模型 (LLM) 的輸出以符合倫理規範。

stem: A company uses an organization in AWS Organizations with all features enabled to manage multiple AWS accounts. Employees use Amazon Bedrock across multiple accounts. The company must prevent specific topics and proprietary information from being included in prompts to Amazon Bedrock models. The company must ensure that employees can use only approved Amazon Bedrock models. The company centrally manages IAM roles for employees. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Create an IAM permissions boundary for each employee's IAM role. Configure the permissions boundary to require an approved Amazon Bedrock guardrail identifier to invoke Amazon Bedrock models. Create an SCP that allows employees to use only approved models.
options.B: Create an SCP that allows employees to use only approved models. Configure the SCP to require employees to specify a guardrail identifier in calls to invoke an approved model.
options.C: Create an SCP that prevents an employee from invoking a model if a centrally deployed guardrail identifier is not specified in a call to the model. Create a permissions boundary on each employee's IAM role that allows each employee to invoke only approved models.
options.D: Use AWS CloudFormation to create a custom Amazon Bedrock guardrail that has a block filtering policy. Use stack sets to deploy the guardrail to each account in the organization.
options.E: Use AWS CloudFormation to create a custom Amazon Bedrock guardrail that has a mask filtering policy. Use stack sets to deploy the guardrail to each account in the organization.

explain: 組織多帳號集中管理 → SCP 同時做「限核准模型 + 要求指定 guardrail identifier」(B,集中可擴展)+ block filtering guardrail + stack sets 跨帳號部署(D)。permissions boundary(A、C)需逐角色套用負擔高;mask(E)是遮蔽非「防止包含」(用 block)。
stem_zh: 某公司使用啟用所有功能的 AWS Organizations 中的 organization 來管理多個 AWS 帳戶。員工在多個帳戶中使用 Amazon Bedrock。該公司必須防止特定主題與專屬機密資訊被包含在傳送給 Amazon Bedrock 模型的 prompt 中。該公司必須確保員工只能使用核准的 Amazon Bedrock 模型。該公司集中管理員工的 IAM roles。哪一組解決方案能滿足這些需求？（選擇兩項。）

options_zh.A: 為每位員工的 IAM role 建立一個 IAM permissions boundary。設定該 permissions boundary 以要求必須提供核准的 Amazon Bedrock guardrail 識別碼才能呼叫 Amazon Bedrock 模型。建立一個 SCP，僅允許員工使用核准的模型。
options_zh.B: 建立一個 SCP，僅允許員工使用核准的模型。設定該 SCP 以要求員工在呼叫核准模型時必須指定 guardrail 識別碼。
options_zh.C: 建立一個 SCP，當員工在呼叫模型時未指定集中部署的 guardrail 識別碼時，便阻止其呼叫該模型。在每位員工的 IAM role 上建立一個 permissions boundary，僅允許每位員工呼叫核准的模型。
options_zh.D: 使用 AWS CloudFormation 建立一個具有封鎖（block）過濾政策的自訂 Amazon Bedrock guardrail。使用 stack sets 將該 guardrail 部署到 organization 中的每個帳戶。
options_zh.E: 使用 AWS CloudFormation 建立一個具有遮罩（mask）過濾政策的自訂 Amazon Bedrock guardrail。使用 stack sets 將該 guardrail 部署到 organization 中的每個帳戶。

stem: A company is designing an API for a generative AI (GenAI) application that uses a foundation model (FM) that is hosted on a managed model service. The API must stream responses to reduce latency, enforce token limits to manage compute resource usage, and implement retry logic to handle model timeouts and partial responses. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Integrate an Amazon API Gateway HTTP API with an AWS Lambda function to invoke Amazon Bedrock. Use Lambda response streaming to stream responses. Enforce token limits within the Lambda function. Implement retry logic for model timeouts by using Lambda and API Gateway timeout configurations.
options.B: Connect an Amazon API Gateway HTTP API directly to Amazon Bedrock. Simulate streaming by using client-side polling. Enforce token limits on the frontend. Configure retry behavior by using API Gateway integration settings.
options.C: Connect an Amazon API Gateway WebSocket API to an Amazon ECS service that hosts a containerized inference server. Stream responses by using the WebSocket protocol. Enforce token limits within Amazon ECS. Handle model timeouts by using ECS task lifecycle hooks and restart policies.
options.D: Integrate an Amazon API Gateway REST API with an AWS Lambda function that invokes Amazon Bedrock. Use Lambda response streaming to stream responses. Enforce token limits within the Lambda function. Implement retry logic by using Lambda and API Gateway timeout configurations.

explain: 「串流 + token 限制 + 重試 + 最少負擔 + Bedrock 託管」→ API Gateway REST API + Lambda + Lambda response streaming(串流)+ Lambda 內 token 限制 + 逾時重試,全 serverless 免管。〔註:A(HTTP API + Lambda,其餘相同)亦為部分題庫答案——HTTP API 更輕更省延遲更低;但考試慣例常以「REST API + Lambda response streaming」為標準答案,故本題依使用者定案選 D。〕用戶端輪詢(B)非真串流;ECS 容器(C)自管負擔最高。
stem_zh: 某公司正在為一個 generative AI (GenAI) 應用程式設計 API，該應用程式使用託管於受管模型服務上的 foundation model (FM)。此 API 必須串流（stream）回應以降低延遲、強制執行 token 限制以管理運算資源使用量，並實作重試邏輯以處理模型逾時與部分回應。哪一種解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 將 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API 與一個 AWS Lambda 函式整合以呼叫 Amazon Bedrock。使用 Lambda response streaming 來串流回應。在 Lambda 函式內強制執行 token 限制。透過 Lambda 與 API Gateway 的逾時設定為模型逾時實作重試邏輯。
options_zh.B: 將 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API 直接連接到 Amazon Bedrock。透過用戶端輪詢（client-side polling）來模擬串流。在前端強制執行 token 限制。透過 API Gateway 整合設定來設定重試行為。
options_zh.C: 將 Amazon API Gateway WebSocket API 連接到一個託管容器化推論伺服器的 Amazon ECS 服務。使用 WebSocket 協定串流回應。在 Amazon ECS 內強制執行 token 限制。透過 ECS task 生命週期掛勾（lifecycle hooks）與重啟政策處理模型逾時。
options_zh.D: 將 Amazon API Gateway REST API 與一個呼叫 Amazon Bedrock 的 AWS Lambda 函式整合。使用 Lambda response streaming 來串流回應。在 Lambda 函式內強制執行 token 限制。透過 Lambda 與 API Gateway 的逾時設定實作重試邏輯。

stem: A retail company is using Amazon Bedrock to develop a customer service AI assistant. Analysis shows that 70% of customer inquiries are simple product questions that a smaller model can effectively handle. However, 30% of inquiries are complex return policy questions that require advanced reasoning. The company wants to implement a cost-effective model selection framework to automatically route customer inquiries to appropriate models based on inquiry complexity. The framework must maintain high customer satisfaction and minimize response latency. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST implementation effort?

options.A: Create a multi-stage architecture that uses a small foundation model (FM) to classify the complexity of each inquiry. Route simple inquiries to a smaller, more cost-effective model. Route complex inquiries to a larger, more capable model. Use AWS Lambda functions to handle the routing logic.
options.B: Use Amazon Bedrock intelligent prompt routing to automatically analyze inquiries. Route simple product inquiries to smaller models, and route complex return policy inquiries to more capable larger models.
options.C: Implement a single-model solution that uses an Amazon Bedrock mid-sized foundation model (FM) with on-demand pricing. Include special instructions in model prompts to handle both simple and complex inquiries by using the same model.
options.D: Create separate Amazon Bedrock endpoints for simple and complex inquiries. Implement a rule-based routing system based on keyword detection. Use on-demand pricing for the smaller model and provisioned throughput for the larger model.

explain: 依複雜度自動路由模型 + 成本效益 + 最少實作 → Bedrock intelligent prompt routing(內建自動路由)。自建分類器+Lambda(A)/規則式關鍵字(D)實作多;單一模型(C)無路由且成本差。
stem_zh: 某零售公司正在使用 Amazon Bedrock 開發一個客服 AI 助理。分析顯示，70% 的客戶詢問是較小型模型即可有效處理的簡單產品問題。然而，30% 的詢問是需要進階推理的複雜退貨政策問題。該公司希望實作一個具成本效益的模型選擇框架，以根據詢問的複雜度自動將客戶詢問路由至適當的模型。該框架必須維持高客戶滿意度並將回應延遲降至最低。哪一種解決方案能以最少的實作工作量滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 建立一個多階段架構，使用一個小型 foundation model (FM) 來分類每個詢問的複雜度。將簡單詢問路由至較小型、更具成本效益的模型。將複雜詢問路由至較大型、能力更強的模型。使用 AWS Lambda 函式處理路由邏輯。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon Bedrock intelligent prompt routing 自動分析詢問。將簡單的產品詢問路由至較小型模型，並將複雜的退貨政策詢問路由至能力更強的較大型模型。
options_zh.C: 實作一個單一模型解決方案，使用採隨需（on-demand）定價的 Amazon Bedrock 中型 foundation model (FM)。在模型 prompt 中加入特殊指示，以使用同一個模型來處理簡單與複雜的詢問。
options_zh.D: 為簡單與複雜詢問分別建立各自的 Amazon Bedrock endpoint。實作一個以關鍵字偵測為基礎的規則型路由系統。對較小型模型使用隨需定價，對較大型模型使用 provisioned throughput。

stem: A specialty coffee company has a mobile app that generates personalized coffee roast profiles by using Amazon Bedrock with a three-stage prompt chain. The prompt chain converts user inputs into structured metadata, retrieves relevant logs for coffee roasts, and generates a personalized roast recommendation for each customer. Users in multiple AWS Regions report inconsistent roast recommendations for identical inputs, slow inference during the retrieval step, and unsafe recommendations such as brewing at excessively high temperatures. The company must improve the stability of outputs for repeated inputs. The company must also improve app performance and the safety of the app's outputs. The updated solution must ensure 99.5% output consistency for identical inputs and achieve inference latency of less than 1 second. The solution must also block unsafe or hallucinated recommendations by using validated safety controls. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy Amazon Bedrock with provisioned throughput to stabilize inference latency. Apply Amazon Bedrock guardrails that have semantic denial rules to block unsafe outputs. Use Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management to manage prompts by using approval workflows.
options.B: Use Amazon Bedrock Agents to manage chaining. Log model inputs and outputs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Use logs from Amazon CloudWatch to perform A/B testing for prompt versions.
options.C: Cache prompt results in Amazon ElastiCache. Use AWS Lambda functions to pre-process metadata and to trace end-to-end latency. Use AWS X-Ray to identify and remediate performance bottlenecks.
options.D: Use Amazon Kendra to improve roast log retrieval accuracy. Store normalized prompt metadata within Amazon DynamoDB. Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate multistep prompts.

explain: 輸出一致性 + 低延遲 + 阻擋不安全/幻覺 → provisioned throughput(穩定低延遲)+ Guardrails semantic denial(阻擋不安全)+ Prompt Management(一致性)。B、C、D 都缺「阻擋不安全輸出」的安全控制。
stem_zh: 某精品咖啡公司有一個行動應用程式，使用 Amazon Bedrock 搭配三階段 prompt chain 來產生個人化的咖啡烘焙設定檔。此 prompt chain 將使用者輸入轉換為結構化中繼資料、擷取相關的咖啡烘焙紀錄，並為每位顧客產生個人化的烘焙建議。位於多個 AWS Regions 的使用者回報，相同輸入卻得到不一致的烘焙建議、擷取步驟期間推論速度緩慢，以及不安全的建議（例如以過高溫度沖煮）。該公司必須改善重複輸入時輸出的穩定性。該公司也必須改善應用程式效能與應用程式輸出的安全性。更新後的解決方案必須確保相同輸入有 99.5% 的輸出一致性，並達到低於 1 秒的推論延遲。該解決方案還必須透過經過驗證的安全控制來封鎖不安全或產生幻覺的建議。哪一種解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 部署採用 provisioned throughput 的 Amazon Bedrock 以穩定推論延遲。套用具有語意拒絕規則的 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 以封鎖不安全的輸出。使用 Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management 透過核准工作流程來管理 prompt。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Agents 來管理串接（chaining）。將模型輸入與輸出記錄到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 的記錄來對 prompt 版本執行 A/B 測試。
options_zh.C: 將 prompt 結果快取於 Amazon ElastiCache。使用 AWS Lambda 函式預先處理中繼資料並追蹤端對端延遲。使用 AWS X-Ray 來識別並修正效能瓶頸。
options_zh.D: 使用 Amazon Kendra 改善烘焙紀錄擷取的準確度。將正規化後的 prompt 中繼資料儲存於 Amazon DynamoDB。使用 AWS Step Functions 來協調多步驟 prompt。

stem: A company is developing a generative AI (GenAI) application by using Amazon Bedrock. The application will analyze patterns and relationships in the company's data. The application will process millions of new data points daily across AWS Regions in Europe, North America, and Asia before storing the data in Amazon S3. The application must comply with local data protection and storage regulations. Data residency and processing must occur within the same continent. The application must also maintain audit trails of the application's decision-making processes and provide data classification capabilities. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy the application in each Region with local IAM policies. Use Amazon Bedrock cross-Region inference to distribute the workload. Use Amazon CloudWatch to log AI decision-making processes and data processing activities. Manually track compliance certifications across Regions.
options.B: Use SCPs with AWS Organizations to manage location-specific permissions. Use AWS CloudTrail immutable logs to audit the decision-making processes. Import a custom model into Amazon Bedrock and deploy the model to each Region.
options.C: Use Amazon S3 Object Lock with Region-specific S3 bucket policies. Pre-process the data points within the Region based on geographic origin before sending the data points to Amazon Bedrock. Use Amazon Macie to classify the data. Use AWS CloudTrail immutable logs to audit the decision-making processes.
options.D: Create separate AWS accounts for each Region with individual compliance frameworks. Use Amazon SageMaker AI with custom monitoring to track model performance and compliance with data residency requirements. Create manual reports for each regulatory jurisdiction.

explain: 資料駐留同大陸 + 稽核 + 資料分類 → 區域內依地理來源預處理(駐留)+ S3 Object Lock/區域政策 + Macie(S3 資料分類)+ CloudTrail 不可變日誌。cross-Region 分散(A)可能跨大陸;手動追蹤/報告(A、D)易錯;缺分類(B)。
stem_zh: 某公司正在使用 Amazon Bedrock 開發一個 generative AI (GenAI) 應用程式。該應用程式將分析該公司資料中的模式與關聯性。該應用程式每天會在歐洲、北美與亞洲的多個 AWS Regions 處理數百萬筆新資料點，之後再將資料儲存於 Amazon S3。該應用程式必須遵守當地的資料保護與儲存法規。資料的存放地點（data residency）與處理必須發生在同一個洲內。該應用程式也必須維護其決策過程的稽核軌跡，並提供資料分類能力。哪一種解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 在每個 Region 部署該應用程式並搭配當地的 IAM policies。使用 Amazon Bedrock cross-Region inference 來分散工作負載。使用 Amazon CloudWatch 記錄 AI 決策過程與資料處理活動。手動追蹤各 Region 的合規認證。
options_zh.B: 使用 AWS Organizations 的 SCP 來管理特定位置的權限。使用 AWS CloudTrail 不可變更（immutable）記錄來稽核決策過程。將自訂模型匯入 Amazon Bedrock 並將該模型部署到每個 Region。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon S3 Object Lock 並搭配特定 Region 的 S3 bucket 政策。在將資料點傳送至 Amazon Bedrock 之前，先根據地理來源於該 Region 內預先處理資料點。使用 Amazon Macie 來分類資料。使用 AWS CloudTrail 不可變更記錄來稽核決策過程。
options_zh.D: 為每個 Region 建立各自獨立的 AWS 帳戶並搭配各自的合規框架。使用 Amazon SageMaker AI 搭配自訂監控來追蹤模型效能與是否符合 data residency 需求。為每個法規管轄區建立手動報表。

stem: A financial services company is deploying a generative AI (GenAI) application that uses Amazon Bedrock to assist customer service representatives to provide personalized investment advice to customers. The company must implement a comprehensive governance solution that follows responsible AI practices and meets regulatory requirements. The solution must detect and prevent hallucinations in recommendations. The solution must have safety controls for customer interactions. The solution must also monitor model behavior drift in real time and maintain audit trails of all prompt-response pairs for regulatory review. The company must deploy the solution within 60 days. The solution must integrate with the company's existing compliance dashboard and respond to customers within 200 ms. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Configure Amazon Bedrock guardrails to apply custom content filters and toxicity detection. Use Amazon Bedrock Model Evaluation to detect hallucinations. Store prompt-response pairs in Amazon DynamoDB to capture audit trails and set a TTL. Integrate Amazon CloudWatch custom metrics with the existing compliance dashboard.
options.B: Deploy Amazon Bedrock and use AWS PrivateLink to access the application securely. Use AWS Lambda functions to implement custom prompt validation. Store prompt-response pairs in an Amazon S3 bucket and configure S3 Lifecycle policies. Create custom Amazon CloudWatch dashboards to monitor model performance metrics.
options.C: Use Amazon Bedrock Agents and Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases to ground responses. Use Amazon Bedrock Guardrails to enforce content safety. Use Amazon OpenSearch Service to store and index prompt-responses pairs. Integrate OpenSearch Service with Amazon QuickSight to create compliance reports and to detect model behavior drift.
options.D: Use Amazon SageMaker Model Monitor to detect model behavior drift. Use AWS WAF to filter content. Store customer interactions in an encrypted Amazon RDS database. Use Amazon API Gateway to create custom HTTP APIs to integrate with the compliance dashboard.

explain: 偵測幻覺 + 安全 + 即時漂移 + 稽核 + 最少負擔 → Guardrails(安全)+ Model Evaluation(幻覺)+ DynamoDB+TTL(稽核)+ CloudWatch 自訂指標整合儀表板(即時漂移)。SageMaker Model Monitor(D)非 Bedrock + WAF 非內容安全;QuickSight(C)是批次非即時。
stem_zh: 某金融服務公司正在部署一個使用 Amazon Bedrock 的 generative AI (GenAI) 應用程式，以協助客服代表為客戶提供個人化的投資建議。該公司必須實作一個遵循負責任 AI 實務並符合法規要求的全面治理解決方案。該解決方案必須偵測並防止建議中的幻覺。該解決方案必須具備針對客戶互動的安全控制。該解決方案還必須即時監控模型行為漂移（drift），並維護所有 prompt-response 配對的稽核軌跡以供法規審查。該公司必須在 60 天內部署該解決方案。該解決方案必須與該公司現有的合規儀表板整合，並在 200 毫秒內回應客戶。哪一種解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 設定 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 以套用自訂內容過濾器與毒性偵測。使用 Amazon Bedrock Model Evaluation 來偵測幻覺。將 prompt-response 配對儲存於 Amazon DynamoDB 以擷取稽核軌跡並設定 TTL。將 Amazon CloudWatch 自訂 metrics 與現有的合規儀表板整合。
options_zh.B: 部署 Amazon Bedrock 並使用 AWS PrivateLink 安全地存取該應用程式。使用 AWS Lambda 函式實作自訂 prompt 驗證。將 prompt-response 配對儲存於 Amazon S3 bucket 並設定 S3 Lifecycle 政策。建立自訂的 Amazon CloudWatch 儀表板以監控模型效能 metrics。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Agents 與 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases 來為回應提供依據（ground）。使用 Amazon Bedrock Guardrails 來強制執行內容安全。使用 Amazon OpenSearch Service 來儲存並索引 prompt-response 配對。將 OpenSearch Service 與 Amazon QuickSight 整合以建立合規報表並偵測模型行為漂移。
options_zh.D: 使用 Amazon SageMaker Model Monitor 偵測模型行為漂移。使用 AWS WAF 過濾內容。將客戶互動儲存於加密的 Amazon RDS 資料庫。使用 Amazon API Gateway 建立自訂 HTTP API 以與合規儀表板整合。

stem: A company uses AWS Lake Formation to set up a data lake that contains databases and tables for multiple business units across multiple AWS Regions. The company wants to use a foundation model (FM) through Amazon Bedrock to perform fraud detection. The FM must ingest sensitive financial data from the data lake. The data includes some customer personally identifiable information (PII). The company must design an access control solution that prevents PII from appearing in a production environment. The FM must access only authorized data subsets that have PII redacted from specific data columns. The company must capture audit trails for all data access. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a separate dataset in a separate Amazon S3 bucket for each business unit and Region combination. Configure S3 bucket policies to control access based on IAM roles that are assigned to FM training instances. Use S3 access logs to track data access.
options.B: Configure the FM to authenticate by using IAM roles and Lake Formation permissions based on LF-Tag expressions. Define business units and Regions as LF-Tags that are assigned to databases and tables. Use AWS CloudTrail to collect comprehensive audit trails of data access.
options.C: Use direct IAM principal grants on specific databases and tables in Lake Formation. Create a custom application layer that logs access requests and further filters sensitive columns before sending data to the FM.
options.D: Configure the FM to request temporary credentials from AWS STS. Access the data by using presigned S3 URLs that are generated by an API that applies business unit and Regional filters. Use AWS CloudTrail to collect comprehensive audit trails of data access.

explain: 欄位層級遮蔽 PII + 授權子集 + 跨業務/區域 + 稽核 → Lake Formation LF-Tag 表達式(欄位層級+標籤式授權)+ IAM 角色 + CloudTrail。S3 桶政策(A)/presigned URL(D)是物件層級做不到欄位;直接授權(C)不可擴展+自建。
stem_zh: 某公司使用 AWS Lake Formation 建置一個資料湖，內含跨多個 AWS Regions、多個業務單位的資料庫與資料表。該公司希望透過 Amazon Bedrock 使用一個 foundation model (FM) 來執行詐欺偵測。該 FM 必須從資料湖擷取敏感的財務資料。該資料包含部分客戶個人身分識別資訊（PII）。該公司必須設計一個存取控制解決方案，以防止 PII 出現在正式環境中。該 FM 只能存取已從特定資料欄位中將 PII 遮蔽（redacted）的授權資料子集。該公司必須擷取所有資料存取的稽核軌跡。哪一種解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 為每個業務單位與 Region 的組合在各自獨立的 Amazon S3 bucket 中建立各自的資料集。設定 S3 bucket 政策，根據指派給 FM 訓練執行個體的 IAM roles 來控制存取。使用 S3 存取記錄來追蹤資料存取。
options_zh.B: 設定該 FM 使用 IAM roles 進行驗證，並根據 LF-Tag 運算式套用 Lake Formation 權限。將業務單位與 Regions 定義為指派給資料庫與資料表的 LF-Tags。使用 AWS CloudTrail 收集全面的資料存取稽核軌跡。
options_zh.C: 在 Lake Formation 中對特定資料庫與資料表使用直接的 IAM principal 授權。建立一個自訂的應用程式層，記錄存取請求並在將資料傳送給 FM 之前進一步過濾敏感欄位。
options_zh.D: 設定該 FM 向 AWS STS 請求臨時憑證。透過一個套用業務單位與 Region 過濾條件的 API 所產生的 presigned S3 URL 來存取資料。使用 AWS CloudTrail 收集全面的資料存取稽核軌跡。

stem: A company runs a Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) application that uses Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases to perform regulatory compliance queries. The application uses the RetrieveAndGenerateStream API. The application retrieves relevant documents from a knowledge base that contains more than 50,000 regulatory documents, legal precedents, and policy updates. The RAG application is producing suboptimal responses because the initial retrieval often returns semantically similar but contextually irrelevant documents. The poor responses are causing model hallucinations and incorrect regulatory guidance. The company needs to improve the performance of the RAG application so it returns more relevant documents. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Deploy an Amazon SageMaker endpoint to run a fine-tuned ranking model. Use an Amazon API Gateway REST API to route requests. Configure the application to make requests through the REST API to rerank the results.
options.B: Use Amazon Comprehend to classify documents and apply relevance scores. Integrate the RAG application's reranking process with Amazon Textract to run document analysis. Use Amazon Neptune to perform graph-based relevance calculations.
options.C: Implement a retrieval pipeline that uses the Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases Retrieve API to perform initial document retrieval. Call the Amazon Bedrock Rerank API to rerank the results. Invoke the InvokeModelWithResponseStream operation to generate responses.
options.D: Use the latest Amazon reranker model through the reranking configuration within Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases. Use the model to improve document relevance scoring and to reorder results based on contextual assessments.

explain: 語意近但不相關 + 改善相關性 + 最少負擔 → Bedrock Knowledge Bases 內建 reranking configuration(只需啟用)。自建管道 Retrieve+Rerank+InvokeModel(C)負擔較高;SageMaker 自訓(A)最高;Comprehend/Textract/Neptune(B)非 rerank。
stem_zh: 某公司運行一個使用 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases 來執行法規合規查詢的 Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) 應用程式。該應用程式使用 RetrieveAndGenerateStream API。該應用程式從一個包含超過 50,000 份法規文件、法律判例與政策更新的 knowledge base 中擷取相關文件。此 RAG 應用程式產生次佳的回應，因為初始擷取常常傳回語意相似但在情境上不相關的文件。這些不佳的回應導致模型幻覺與錯誤的法規指引。該公司需要改善此 RAG 應用程式的效能，使其能傳回更相關的文件。哪一種解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足此需求？

options_zh.A: 部署一個 Amazon SageMaker endpoint 來運行一個微調過的排序（ranking）模型。使用 Amazon API Gateway REST API 來路由請求。設定該應用程式透過此 REST API 發出請求以對結果重新排序（rerank）。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon Comprehend 來分類文件並套用相關性分數。將此 RAG 應用程式的重新排序流程與 Amazon Textract 整合以執行文件分析。使用 Amazon Neptune 執行以圖形（graph）為基礎的相關性運算。
options_zh.C: 實作一個擷取管線，使用 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases Retrieve API 來執行初始文件擷取。呼叫 Amazon Bedrock Rerank API 以對結果重新排序。呼叫 InvokeModelWithResponseStream 操作來產生回應。
options_zh.D: 透過 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases 內的重新排序設定，使用最新的 Amazon reranker 模型。使用該模型改善文件相關性評分，並根據情境評估重新排列結果順序。

stem: A company is developing a customer communication platform that uses an AI assistant powered by an Amazon Bedrock foundation model (FM). The AI assistant summarizes customer messages and generates initial response drafts. The company wants to use Amazon Comprehend to implement layered content filtering. The layered content filtering must prevent sharing of offensive content, protect customer privacy, and detect potential inappropriate advice solicitation. Inappropriate advice solicitation includes requests for unethical practices, harmful activities, or manipulative behaviors. The solution must maintain acceptable overall response times, so all pre-processing filters must finish before the content reaches the FM. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use parallel processing with asynchronous API calls. Use toxicity detection for offensive content. Use prompt safety classification for inappropriate advice solicitation. Use personally identifiable information (PII) detection without redaction.
options.B: Use custom classification to build an FM that detects offensive content and inappropriate advice solicitation. Apply personally identifiable information (PII) detection as a secondary filter only when messages pass the custom classifier.
options.C: Deploy a multi-stage process. Configure the process to use prompt safety classification first, then toxicity detection on safe prompts only, and finally personally identifiable information (PII) detection in streaming mode. Route flagged messages through Amazon EventBridge for human review.
options.D: Use toxicity detection with thresholds configured to 0.5 for all categories. Use parallel processing for both prompt safety classification and personally identifiable information (PII) detection with entity redaction. Apply Amazon CloudWatch alarms to filter metrics.

explain: 分層過濾(冒犯+隱私+不當請求)+ 維持回應時間 → 並行 parallel + toxicity + prompt safety + PII with redaction(遮蔽才保護隱私)。PII 不遮蔽(A)無效;多階段串接+EventBridge 人工審(C)延遲高;自建 FM 分類(B)成本高。
stem_zh: 某公司正在開發一個客戶溝通平台，該平台使用由 Amazon Bedrock foundation model (FM) 驅動的 AI 助理。此 AI 助理會摘要客戶訊息並產生初步回應草稿。該公司希望使用 Amazon Comprehend 來實作分層式內容過濾。此分層式內容過濾必須防止分享冒犯性內容、保護客戶隱私，並偵測潛在的不當建議索取行為。不當建議索取行為包括對不道德實務、有害活動或操縱性行為的請求。該解決方案必須維持可接受的整體回應時間，因此所有前置處理過濾器都必須在內容到達 FM 之前完成。哪一種解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用搭配非同步 API 呼叫的平行處理。使用毒性偵測來偵測冒犯性內容。使用 prompt 安全分類來偵測不當建議索取行為。使用不含遮蔽（redaction）的個人身分識別資訊（PII）偵測。
options_zh.B: 使用自訂分類來建立一個可偵測冒犯性內容與不當建議索取行為的 FM。僅在訊息通過自訂分類器後，才將個人身分識別資訊（PII）偵測作為次要過濾器套用。
options_zh.C: 部署一個多階段流程。設定該流程先使用 prompt 安全分類，接著僅對安全的 prompt 執行毒性偵測，最後以串流模式執行個人身分識別資訊（PII）偵測。透過 Amazon EventBridge 將被標記的訊息路由給人工審查。
options_zh.D: 使用毒性偵測，並將所有類別的閾值設定為 0.5。對 prompt 安全分類與個人身分識別資訊（PII）偵測（含實體遮蔽）兩者使用平行處理。套用 Amazon CloudWatch 警報來過濾 metrics。

stem: A software as a service (SaaS) company is building a recommendation model that uses Amazon SageMaker AI to support an application that recommends airline cabin upgrades to customers.
