The company will host SageMaker AI models on Amazon Bedrock by using Amazon Bedrock Custom Model Import. Airline companies will use the application to send customized offers to customers. The model must examine the travel history of customers to help make more relevant recommendations. The company stores customer travel history data in an Amazon RDS database. The company must ensure that the application delivers consistent, relevant, and accurate results across multiple airlines and customer populations. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases to implement a RAG architecture to analyze customer travel history data to give the application semantic search capabilities. Use the semantic search capabilities to retrieve relevant booking patterns, preferences, and loyalty information to generate personalized cabin upgrade recommendations. Apply Amazon Bedrock guardrails to filter content. Use AWS Step Functions and AWS Lambda functions to orchestrate validation workflows to reduce hallucinations.
options.B: Implement text-to-SQL transformations with SQL validations to accurately retrieve relevant booking patterns, preferences, and loyalty information from the RDS database. Use the results to generate personalized cabin upgrade recommendations. Apply Amazon Bedrock guardrails to filter content. Use AWS Step Functions and AWS Lambda functions to orchestrate validation workflows to reduce hallucinations.
options.C: Use Amazon OpenSearch Service to implement vector searches of customer travel history embeddings. Use the vector searches to give the application the ability to perform similarity-based retrieval of booking patterns, preferences, and loyalty information to generate personalized cabin upgrade recommendations. Apply Amazon Bedrock guardrails to filter responses. Use confidence scoring and semantic similarity searches to reduce hallucinations.
options.D: Implement text-to-SQL transformations with SQL validations to accurately retrieve relevant booking patterns, preferences, and loyalty information from the RDS database. Use the results to generate personalized cabin upgrade recommendations. Apply Amazon Bedrock guardrails to filter responses. Use confidence scoring and semantic similarity searches to reduce hallucinations.

explain: 結構化資料(RDS)精確檢索 + 一致準確 + 減幻覺 → text-to-SQL + SQL 驗證 + Step Functions/Lambda 驗證工作流。RAG/向量搜尋(A、C)適合非結構化;B vs D:結構化用「驗證工作流」減幻覺(B),非語意相似度搜尋(D)。
stem_zh: 某軟體即服務（SaaS）公司正在建立一個使用 Amazon SageMaker AI 的推薦模型，以支援一個向客戶推薦航空艙等升級的應用程式。該公司將透過 Amazon Bedrock Custom Model Import 把 SageMaker AI 模型託管於 Amazon Bedrock 上。航空公司將使用此應用程式向客戶發送客製化優惠。該模型必須檢視客戶的旅遊歷史，以協助提出更相關的推薦。該公司將客戶旅遊歷史資料儲存於 Amazon RDS 資料庫中。該公司必須確保此應用程式在多家航空公司與多種客戶群體間提供一致、相關且準確的結果。哪一種解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases 實作一個 RAG 架構，以分析客戶旅遊歷史資料，賦予應用程式語意搜尋能力。使用語意搜尋能力擷取相關的訂位模式、偏好與會員忠誠度資訊，以產生個人化的艙等升級推薦。套用 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 以過濾內容。使用 AWS Step Functions 與 AWS Lambda 函式協調驗證工作流程以減少幻覺。
options_zh.B: 實作搭配 SQL 驗證的 text-to-SQL 轉換，以從 RDS 資料庫準確擷取相關的訂位模式、偏好與會員忠誠度資訊。使用結果產生個人化的艙等升級推薦。套用 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 以過濾內容。使用 AWS Step Functions 與 AWS Lambda 函式協調驗證工作流程以減少幻覺。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon OpenSearch Service 實作客戶旅遊歷史 embeddings 的向量搜尋。使用向量搜尋賦予應用程式對訂位模式、偏好與會員忠誠度資訊進行相似度型擷取的能力，以產生個人化的艙等升級推薦。套用 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 以過濾回應。使用信心評分與語意相似度搜尋以減少幻覺。
options_zh.D: 實作搭配 SQL 驗證的 text-to-SQL 轉換，以從 RDS 資料庫準確擷取相關的訂位模式、偏好與會員忠誠度資訊。使用結果產生個人化的艙等升級推薦。套用 Amazon Bedrock guardrails 以過濾回應。使用信心評分與語意相似度搜尋以減少幻覺。

stem: A company is using Amazon Bedrock to develop a customer support AI assistant. The AI assistant must respond to customer questions about their accounts. The AI assistant must not expose personal information in responses. The company must comply with data residency policies by ensuring that all processing occurs within the same AWS Region where each customer is located. The company wants to evaluate how effective the AI assistant is at preventing the exposure of personal information before the company makes the AI assistant available to customers. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure a cross-Region Amazon Bedrock guardrail to apply sensitive information filters. Set the guardrail to detect mode during development and testing. Switch to block mode for production deployment.
options.B: Configure an Amazon Bedrock guardrail to apply sensitive information filters. Set the guardrail to mask mode during development and testing. Switch to block mode for production deployment. Deploy a copy of the guardrail to each Region where the company operates.
options.C: Configure an Amazon Bedrock guardrail to apply content and topic filters. Set the guardrail to detect mode during development, testing, and production. Disable invocation logging for the Amazon Bedrock model.
options.D: Configure a cross-Region Amazon Bedrock guardrail to apply a set of content and word filters. Set the guardrail to detect mode during development and testing. Switch to mask mode for production deployment.

explain: 不暴露 PII + 資料駐留各區處理 + 部署前評估 → 敏感資訊過濾器 + mask(評估可觀察)/block(生產阻擋)+ 每區部署 guardrail(駐留)。cross-Region(A、D)違反駐留;content/word filters(C、D)非 PII 工具;生產只 detect(C)會暴露。
stem_zh: 某公司正在使用 Amazon Bedrock 開發一個客戶支援 AI 助理。此 AI 助理必須回應客戶關於其帳戶的問題。此 AI 助理在回應中不得揭露個人資訊。該公司必須遵守 data residency 政策，確保所有處理都發生在每位客戶所在的同一個 AWS Region 內。該公司希望在向客戶提供此 AI 助理之前，評估此 AI 助理在防止揭露個人資訊方面的有效程度。哪一種解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 設定一個 cross-Region Amazon Bedrock guardrail 以套用敏感資訊過濾器。在開發與測試期間將該 guardrail 設為偵測（detect）模式。在正式部署時切換為封鎖（block）模式。
options_zh.B: 設定一個 Amazon Bedrock guardrail 以套用敏感資訊過濾器。在開發與測試期間將該 guardrail 設為遮罩（mask）模式。在正式部署時切換為封鎖（block）模式。在該公司營運的每個 Region 部署一份該 guardrail 的副本。
options_zh.C: 設定一個 Amazon Bedrock guardrail 以套用內容與主題過濾器。在開發、測試與正式環境期間將該 guardrail 設為偵測（detect）模式。停用 Amazon Bedrock 模型的呼叫記錄（invocation logging）。
options_zh.D: 設定一個 cross-Region Amazon Bedrock guardrail 以套用一組內容與字詞過濾器。在開發與測試期間將該 guardrail 設為偵測（detect）模式。在正式部署時切換為遮罩（mask）模式。

stem: A university recently digitized a collection of archival documents, academic journals, and manuscripts. The university stores the digital files in an AWS Lake Formation data lake. The university hires a GenAI developer to build a solution to allow users to search the digital files by using text queries. The solution must return journal abstracts that are semantically similar to a user's query. Users must be able to search the digitized collection based on text and metadata that is associated with the journal abstracts. The metadata of the digitized files does not contain keywords. The solution must match similar abstracts to one another based on the similarity of their text. The data lake contains fewer than 1 million files. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use Amazon Titan Embeddings in Amazon Bedrock to create vector representations of the digitized files. Store embeddings in the OpenSearch Neural Plugin for Amazon OpenSearch Service.
options.B: Use Amazon Comprehend to extract topics from the digitized files. Store the topics and file metadata in an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL database. Query the abstract metadata against the data in the Aurora database.
options.C: Use Amazon SageMaker AI to deploy a sentence-transformer model. Use the model to create vector representations of the digitized files. Store embeddings in an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL database that has the pgvector extension.
options.D: Use Amazon Titan Embeddings in Amazon Bedrock to create vector representations of the digitized files. Store embeddings in an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL Serverless database that has the pgvector extension.

explain: 語意相似搜尋 + 中小規模(<100萬)+ 最少負擔 → 託管 Titan Embeddings + Aurora PostgreSQL Serverless + pgvector。OpenSearch(A)是大規模工具+管叢集;自建 SageMaker 嵌入(C)負擔高;Comprehend 主題(B)非語意相似。
stem_zh: 某大學最近將一批檔案文件、學術期刊與手稿數位化。該大學將這些數位檔案儲存於 AWS Lake Formation 資料湖中。該大學聘請一位 GenAI 開發人員建立一個解決方案，讓使用者能以文字查詢搜尋這些數位檔案。該解決方案必須傳回與使用者查詢在語意上相似的期刊摘要。使用者必須能夠根據與期刊摘要相關聯的文字與中繼資料來搜尋這個數位化典藏。這些數位化檔案的中繼資料不含關鍵字。該解決方案必須根據摘要文字的相似度，將彼此相似的摘要互相比對。此資料湖包含少於 100 萬個檔案。哪一種解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 在 Amazon Bedrock 中使用 Amazon Titan Embeddings 為數位化檔案建立向量表示。將 embeddings 儲存於 Amazon OpenSearch Service 的 OpenSearch Neural Plugin 中。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon Comprehend 從數位化檔案中擷取主題。將主題與檔案中繼資料儲存於 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 資料庫。針對 Aurora 資料庫中的資料查詢摘要中繼資料。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon SageMaker AI 部署一個 sentence-transformer 模型。使用該模型為數位化檔案建立向量表示。將 embeddings 儲存於具有 pgvector 擴充功能的 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 資料庫。
options_zh.D: 在 Amazon Bedrock 中使用 Amazon Titan Embeddings 為數位化檔案建立向量表示。將 embeddings 儲存於具有 pgvector 擴充功能的 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL Serverless 資料庫。

stem: A financial services company wants to use Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs) to analyze call center recordings. When calls end, the call center stores recordings as MP3 files in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company needs to generate summaries and sentiment analysis for the recordings in a structured format as soon as new files are created. The recordings average 20 MB in size. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate a workflow to process the recordings. Configure steps to invoke Amazon Transcribe to convert audio to text, validate job completion, and to invoke an AWS Lambda function to process the text by using Amazon Bedrock FMs to generate structured analysis output.
options.B: Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate a workflow to process the recordings. Configure steps to invoke Amazon Transcribe to convert audio to text, validate job completion, and to directly invoke Amazon Bedrock FMs to generate summaries and sentiment analysis in JSON format.
options.C: Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate a workflow to process the recordings. Configure steps to invoke Amazon Transcribe to convert audio to text, validate job completion, and to invoke an AWS Lambda function to create a prompt to invoke Amazon Bedrock FMs to generate structured analysis output.
options.D: Configure the source S3 bucket to send events to Amazon EventBridge. Create an EventBridge rule to invoke the Step Functions workflow when an object is created in the bucket.
options.E: Configure the source S3 bucket to send notifications to the Step Functions workflow when an object is created in the bucket.

explain: S3 新檔觸發(必經 EventBridge,S3 不能直接觸發 Step Functions,刪 E)→ D;Transcribe→Lambda 建 prompt→Bedrock 結構化(C 明確「建立 prompt」優於 A;直接呼叫 B 較難可靠結構化)。
stem_zh: 某金融服務公司希望使用 Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs) 來分析客服中心的錄音。當通話結束時，客服中心會將錄音以 MP3 檔案形式儲存於 Amazon S3 bucket。該公司需要在新檔案建立後立即以結構化格式為這些錄音產生摘要與情感分析。這些錄音平均大小為 20 MB。哪一組解決方案能滿足這些需求？（選擇兩項。）

options_zh.A: 使用 AWS Step Functions 協調一個工作流程來處理錄音。設定各步驟以呼叫 Amazon Transcribe 將音訊轉換為文字、驗證工作完成，並呼叫一個 AWS Lambda 函式以使用 Amazon Bedrock FMs 處理文字並產生結構化分析輸出。
options_zh.B: 使用 AWS Step Functions 協調一個工作流程來處理錄音。設定各步驟以呼叫 Amazon Transcribe 將音訊轉換為文字、驗證工作完成，並直接呼叫 Amazon Bedrock FMs 以 JSON 格式產生摘要與情感分析。
options_zh.C: 使用 AWS Step Functions 協調一個工作流程來處理錄音。設定各步驟以呼叫 Amazon Transcribe 將音訊轉換為文字、驗證工作完成，並呼叫一個 AWS Lambda 函式來建立一個 prompt 以呼叫 Amazon Bedrock FMs 產生結構化分析輸出。
options_zh.D: 設定來源 S3 bucket 將事件傳送至 Amazon EventBridge。建立一個 EventBridge 規則，在 bucket 中建立物件時呼叫此 Step Functions 工作流程。
options_zh.E: 設定來源 S3 bucket 在 bucket 中建立物件時將通知傳送至此 Step Functions 工作流程。

stem: A medical device company wants to feed reports of medical procedures that used the company's devices into an AI assistant. To protect patient privacy, the AI assistant must expose patient personally identifiable information (PII) only to surgeons. The AI assistant must redact PII for engineers. The AI assistant must reference only medical reports that are less than 3 years old. The company stores reports in an Amazon S3 bucket as soon as each report is published. The company has already set up an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base. The AI assistant uses Amazon Cognito to authenticate users. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Enable Amazon Macie PII detection on the S3 bucket. Use an S3 trigger to invoke an AWS Lambda function that redacts PII from the reports. Configure the Lambda function to delete outdated documents from the bucket and to invoke knowledge base syncing.
options.B: Invoke an AWS Lambda function to sync the S3 bucket and the knowledge base when a new report is uploaded to the bucket. Use a second Lambda function to invoke Amazon Comprehend to detect and redact PII if a user is part of the engineer Cognito user group. Set up an S3 Lifecycle configuration to remove reports that are older than 3 years from the bucket.
options.C: Set up an S3 Lifecycle configuration on the bucket to remove reports that are older than 3 years. Schedule an AWS Lambda function to run daily syncs between the bucket and the knowledge base. When users interact with the AI assistant, call the ApplyGuardrail configuration that matches the user's Cognito user group to redact PII from the agent's responses if appropriate.
options.D: Create a second knowledge base. Set up an S3 Lifecycle configuration on the bucket to remove reports that are older than 3 years. Invoke an AWS Lambda function that syncs the bucket with the original knowledge base when a new report is uploaded to the bucket. Use Amazon Comprehend to detect and redact PII before syncing the bucket with the second knowledge base. When a user interacts with the AI assistant, redirect the model to the appropriate knowledge base depending on the user's Cognito user group.

explain: 依角色差異化 PII(醫生暴露/工程師遮蔽)+ 只用近 3 年 → S3 Lifecycle(移除過時)+ ApplyGuardrail 依 Cognito 群組在「回應時」動態遮蔽。來源永久遮蔽(A)醫生也看不到;兩個 KB(D)過度設計。
stem_zh: 某醫療器材公司希望將使用該公司器材之醫療程序的報告饋入一個 AI 助理。為保護病患隱私，此 AI 助理只能向外科醫師揭露病患的個人身分識別資訊（PII）。此 AI 助理必須為工程師遮蔽 PII。此 AI 助理只能參考少於 3 年的醫療報告。該公司在每份報告發布後便立即將報告儲存於 Amazon S3 bucket。該公司已經設定好一個 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base。此 AI 助理使用 Amazon Cognito 來驗證使用者。哪一種解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 在 S3 bucket 上啟用 Amazon Macie PII 偵測。使用 S3 觸發器呼叫一個 AWS Lambda 函式，從報告中遮蔽 PII。設定該 Lambda 函式以刪除 bucket 中過期的文件並呼叫 knowledge base 同步。
options_zh.B: 當有新報告上傳至 bucket 時，呼叫一個 AWS Lambda 函式以同步 S3 bucket 與 knowledge base。使用第二個 Lambda 函式，在使用者屬於工程師 Cognito 使用者群組時呼叫 Amazon Comprehend 偵測並遮蔽 PII。設定 S3 Lifecycle 設定以從 bucket 移除超過 3 年的報告。
options_zh.C: 在 bucket 上設定 S3 Lifecycle 設定以移除超過 3 年的報告。排程一個 AWS Lambda 函式每天在 bucket 與 knowledge base 之間執行同步。當使用者與此 AI 助理互動時，呼叫與該使用者 Cognito 使用者群組相符的 ApplyGuardrail 設定，以在適當情況下從代理的回應中遮蔽 PII。
options_zh.D: 建立第二個 knowledge base。在 bucket 上設定 S3 Lifecycle 設定以移除超過 3 年的報告。當有新報告上傳至 bucket 時，呼叫一個 AWS Lambda 函式以將 bucket 與原始 knowledge base 同步。使用 Amazon Comprehend 在將 bucket 與第二個 knowledge base 同步之前偵測並遮蔽 PII。當使用者與此 AI 助理互動時，根據該使用者的 Cognito 使用者群組將模型重新導向至適當的 knowledge base。

stem: A large ecommerce company has deployed a foundation model (FM) to generate product descriptions. The company's engineering team monitors technical metrics such as token usage, latency, and error rates by using Amazon CloudWatch. The company's marketing team tracks business metrics such as conversion rates and revenue impact in its own systems. The company needs a unified observability solution that correlates technical performance with business outcomes. The solution must provide automatic alerts to stakeholders when operational metrics indicate degradation. The solution must provide comprehensive visibility across both technical and business metrics. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create CloudWatch dashboards that include technical metrics and imported business metrics. Configure CloudWatch composite alarms that combine technical data and business data. Use Amazon SNS to set up notifications to stakeholders.
options.B: Use Amazon Managed Grafana to visualize technical metrics from CloudWatch with business metrics from external sources. Configure Amazon Managed Grafana alerts to invoke AWS Lambda functions. Configure the Lambda functions to remediate issues automatically when metrics exceed predefined thresholds.
options.C: Stream CloudWatch metrics to Amazon S3 by using CloudWatch metric streams. Create Amazon QuickSight dashboards to visualize the combined technical metrics and business metrics. Set up Amazon EventBridge rules to send notifications to stakeholders when metrics exceed predefined thresholds.
options.D: Configure CloudWatch custom dashboards that integrate operational metrics with imported business metrics. Set up CloudWatch composite alarms with anomaly detection. Use Amazon SNS to create alarm actions to notify stakeholders when correlated metrics indicate performance issues.

explain: 統一可觀測性 + 偵測降級 + 警報 → CloudWatch 整合儀表板 + composite alarms with anomaly detection(偵測降級)+ SNS。A 只有固定門檻無 anomaly detection;自動修復(B)超出需求;QuickSight(C)是批次非即時。
stem_zh: 某大型電子商務公司已部署一個 foundation model (FM) 來產生產品描述。該公司的工程團隊使用 Amazon CloudWatch 監控諸如 token 使用量、延遲與錯誤率等技術 metrics。該公司的行銷團隊則在自己的系統中追蹤諸如轉換率與營收影響等業務 metrics。該公司需要一個統一的可觀測性解決方案，將技術效能與業務成果相互關聯。該解決方案必須在操作 metrics 顯示效能劣化時自動向利害關係人發出警示。該解決方案必須在技術與業務 metrics 兩方面提供全面的可見性。哪一種解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 建立包含技術 metrics 與匯入之業務 metrics 的 CloudWatch 儀表板。設定結合技術資料與業務資料的 CloudWatch 複合警報（composite alarms）。使用 Amazon SNS 設定向利害關係人的通知。
options_zh.B: 使用 Amazon Managed Grafana 將來自 CloudWatch 的技術 metrics 與來自外部來源的業務 metrics 一起視覺化。設定 Amazon Managed Grafana 警報以呼叫 AWS Lambda 函式。設定這些 Lambda 函式在 metrics 超過預先定義的閾值時自動修正問題。
options_zh.C: 使用 CloudWatch metric streams 將 CloudWatch metrics 串流至 Amazon S3。建立 Amazon QuickSight 儀表板以視覺化結合後的技術 metrics 與業務 metrics。設定 Amazon EventBridge 規則，在 metrics 超過預先定義的閾值時向利害關係人發送通知。
options_zh.D: 設定整合操作 metrics 與匯入之業務 metrics 的 CloudWatch 自訂儀表板。設定具有異常偵測（anomaly detection）的 CloudWatch 複合警報。使用 Amazon SNS 建立警報動作，在相互關聯的 metrics 顯示效能問題時通知利害關係人。

stem: A GenAI developer is evaluating Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs) to enhance a Europe-based company's internal business application. The company has a multi-account landing zone in AWS Control Tower. The company uses SCPs to allow its accounts to use only the eu-north-1 Region and the eu-west-1 Region. All customer data must remain in private networks within the approved AWS Regions. The GenAI developer selects an FM based on analysis and testing and hosts the model in the eu-central-1 Region and the eu-west-3 Region. The GenAI developer must enable access to the FM for the company's employees. The GenAI developer must ensure that requests to the FM are private and remain with the same Regions as the FM. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy an AWS Lambda function that is exposed by a private Amazon API Gateway REST API to a VPC in eu-north-1. Create a VPC endpoint for the selected FM in eu-central-1 and eu-west-3. Extend existing SCPs to allow employees to use the FM. Integrate the REST API with the business application.
options.B: Deploy the FM on Amazon EC2 instances in eu-north-1. Deploy a private Amazon API Gateway REST API in front of the EC2 instances. Configure an Amazon Bedrock VPC endpoint. Integrate the REST API with the business application.
options.C: Configure the FM to use cross-Region inference through an eu.amazon.* endpoint to ensure that all calls remain within Europe. Configure an Amazon Bedrock VPC endpoint. Extend existing SCPs to allow employees to use the FM through inference profiles in Europe-based Regions where the FM is available. Use an inference profile to integrate Amazon Bedrock with the business application.
options.D: Deploy the FM in Amazon SageMaker AI in eu-north-1. Configure a SageMaker AI VPC endpoint. Extend existing SCPs to allow employees to use the SageMaker AI endpoint. Integrate the FM in SageMaker AI with the business application.

explain: Bedrock FM 跨歐洲 + 資料保留歐洲 + 私有 + SCP 區域限制 → Geographic cross-Region inference(eu.* 端點保留歐洲)+ Bedrock VPC endpoint(私有)+ 調整 SCP + inference profile。EC2(B)/SageMaker(D)自建負擔高且偏離 Bedrock。
stem_zh: 一位 GenAI 開發人員正在評估 Amazon Bedrock foundation models (FMs)，以強化一家位於歐洲的公司的內部業務應用程式。該公司在 AWS Control Tower 中有一個多帳戶登陸區（landing zone）。該公司使用 SCP 僅允許其帳戶使用 eu-north-1 Region 與 eu-west-1 Region。所有客戶資料都必須保留在核准的 AWS Regions 內的私有網路中。該 GenAI 開發人員根據分析與測試選定一個 FM，並將該模型託管於 eu-central-1 Region 與 eu-west-3 Region。該 GenAI 開發人員必須為該公司員工啟用對此 FM 的存取。該 GenAI 開發人員必須確保對此 FM 的請求為私有，且停留在與該 FM 相同的 Regions 內。哪一種解決方案能滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 部署一個由位於 eu-north-1 的 VPC 中的私有 Amazon API Gateway REST API 所公開的 AWS Lambda 函式。在 eu-central-1 與 eu-west-3 為所選的 FM 建立 VPC endpoint。擴充現有的 SCP 以允許員工使用此 FM。將此 REST API 與業務應用程式整合。
options_zh.B: 在 eu-north-1 的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署此 FM。在這些 EC2 執行個體前方部署一個私有 Amazon API Gateway REST API。設定一個 Amazon Bedrock VPC endpoint。將此 REST API 與業務應用程式整合。
options_zh.C: 設定此 FM 透過 eu.amazon.* endpoint 使用 cross-Region inference，以確保所有呼叫都停留在歐洲境內。設定一個 Amazon Bedrock VPC endpoint。擴充現有的 SCP，以允許員工在該 FM 可用的、位於歐洲的 Regions 中透過 inference profiles 使用此 FM。使用一個 inference profile 將 Amazon Bedrock 與業務應用程式整合。
options_zh.D: 在 eu-north-1 的 Amazon SageMaker AI 中部署此 FM。設定一個 SageMaker AI VPC endpoint。擴充現有的 SCP 以允許員工使用此 SageMaker AI endpoint。將 SageMaker AI 中的此 FM 與業務應用程式整合。

stem: A healthcare company is developing an application to process medical queries. The application must answer complex queries with high accuracy by reducing semantic dilution. The application must refer to domain-specific terminology in medical documents to reduce ambiguity in medical terminology. The application must be able to respond to 1,000 queries each minute with response times less than 2 seconds. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use Amazon API Gateway to route incoming queries to an Amazon Bedrock agent. Configure the agent to use an Anthropic Claude model to decompose queries and an Amazon Titan model to expand queries. Create an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base to store the reference medical documents.
options.B: Configure an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base to store the reference medical documents. Enable query decomposition in the knowledge base. Configure an Amazon Bedrock flow that uses a foundation model (FM) and the knowledge base to support the application.
options.C: Use Amazon SageMaker AI to host custom ML models for both query decomposition and query expansion. Configure Amazon Bedrock knowledge bases to store the reference medical documents. Encrypt the documents in the knowledge base.
options.D: Create an Amazon Bedrock agent to orchestrate multiple AWS Lambda functions to decompose queries. Create an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base to store the reference medical documents. Use the agent's built-in knowledge base capabilities. Add deep research and reasoning capabilities to the agent to reduce ambiguity in the medical terminology.

explain: 複雜查詢減語意稀釋 + RAG + 高效能 + 最少負擔 → Knowledge Base 內建 query decomposition + RAG + flow。agent 自建分解/擴展(A、D)實作多;SageMaker 自訂模型(C)負擔最高;深度研究(D)較慢可能超 2 秒。
stem_zh: 某醫療保健公司正在開發一個處理醫療查詢的應用程式。該應用程式必須透過減少語意稀釋（semantic dilution）以高準確度回答複雜查詢。該應用程式必須參考醫療文件中特定領域的術語，以減少醫療術語上的歧義。該應用程式必須能夠每分鐘回應 1,000 筆查詢，且回應時間少於 2 秒。哪一種解決方案能以最少的營運負擔滿足這些需求？

options_zh.A: 使用 Amazon API Gateway 將傳入的查詢路由至一個 Amazon Bedrock agent。設定該 agent 使用 Anthropic Claude 模型來分解查詢，並使用 Amazon Titan 模型來擴展查詢。建立一個 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base 來儲存參考的醫療文件。
options_zh.B: 設定一個 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base 來儲存參考的醫療文件。在該 knowledge base 中啟用查詢分解（query decomposition）。設定一個使用 foundation model (FM) 與該 knowledge base 的 Amazon Bedrock flow 來支援此應用程式。
options_zh.C: 使用 Amazon SageMaker AI 託管用於查詢分解與查詢擴展的自訂 ML 模型。設定 Amazon Bedrock knowledge bases 來儲存參考的醫療文件。將 knowledge base 中的文件加密。
options_zh.D: 建立一個 Amazon Bedrock agent 來協調多個 AWS Lambda 函式以分解查詢。建立一個 Amazon Bedrock knowledge base 來儲存參考的醫療文件。使用該 agent 內建的 knowledge base 能力。為該 agent 加入深度研究與推理能力，以減少醫療術語上的歧義。
